Name: xetverse
Description:
About : Xetverse
Founded in November 2019, Xetverse is a forward-thinking Indian independent record label and Web3 technology brand. We are dedicated to bridging the gap between underground music culture and the future of digital ownership.
At our core, we serve as a launchpad for independent artists, specifically focusing on the global promotion of Indian Phonk and electronic music. Beyond the studio, Xetverse is a pioneer in the Web3 ecosystem, specializing in high-value digital collectibles (NFTs) and virtual community building.
Our Services
Independent Music Publishing: We operate as a self-managed record label, providing a global platform for independent Phonk and Funk artists to showcase their sounds.
Web3 & NFT Development: We specialize in the creation and curation of complex digital art and collectibles. Our flagship projects include long-term NFT art developments that blend cosmic aesthetics with blockchain technology.
Virtual Branding & Community: We build "virtual brands" for the Web3 era, fostering decentralized communities where creators and fans interact directly through digital assets.
Digital Design & Artistic Direction: Led by our design-focused leadership, we provide high-level creative direction for AI-generated art, electronic music branding, and immersive visual storytelling.
Mission
To empower independent creators by providing the technological tools and artistic platforms they need to level up their careers in the digital age.
Founder: Manish Gautam (Zezonworld)
Founded: 2019
Specialties: Phonk Music, Web3, Digital Collectibles, Music Production, NFT Art.

Name: Schoolz
Description:
Schoolz is A tech-driven, affordable, and convenient transportation service, that provides solutions for participatory transportation services through a smartphone application and website for parents, schools, businesses, and employees.

we promise the best service to ensure the safety and comfort of our kids and to guarantee the reassuring of thousands of parents by using modern technology to track every step of our kids once they leave the house until their return.
 
We are aware of how parents worry about their lovely kids. All parents have a daily battle! They need to ensure that kids’ trip from home to school is safe and on time. On the other hand, they deal with their stresses to go to work on time too!
 
The happiest moment in your day as a parent is the moment when you make sure your kids reached school safely. 
 
We want this happiness to last all day, so in Schoolz we took on doing our best to find an idea that solves this conflict and provides safety and comfort to all members of the family.
We used all available technology to track kids and the vehicle driving them home door to the school door and the way back, step by step and moment by moment even before the moment they leave the house.
 
we choose our captains carefully and make sure they met the highest standards of proper dealing with kids to ensure a safe comfort trip.
 
Our goal is to reduce the stress put on the family by providing top quality service with competitive fees, and help you avoid problems of school bus such as high fees you might don't get what you paid for, as what happened in the second term of the school year 2019-2020. In addition to the most important is tracking every step our kids take at every moment for you, parents, to feel calm besides safety and comfort.
 
Schoolz introduces solutions to all these problems and more. We have a team of experts that works continuously to ensure the transportation process is smooth, smart, and integrated by just one click.

Name: Mapsted
Description:
With 100+ patents, Mapsted is a pioneer in indoor location technology, known for its unmatched accuracy, reliability and versatility. Since its establishment in 2014, Mapsted has become a global leader in location-based technology solutions. What sets us apart is our patented award-winning technology that doesn't require expensive external hardware for positioning, making it highly accurate, scalable and cost-effective.

Mapsted's indoor positioning system is the most precise on the market for indoor marketing and location-based targeting. Achieving one-meter accuracy without Bluetooth beacons or additional external hardware, Mapsted eliminates concerns about maintenance and installation costs.

Mapsted offers advanced front and back-end solutions to meet the evolving needs of the global business community. The company operates in three distinct technology segments:

Location Positioning Technology: Mapsted provides products that enable seamless outdoor-indoor navigation without the reliance on beacons, Wi-Fi, or additional external hardware.

Location Marketing Technology: Mapsted empowers clients to find their target audience and enhance customer engagement through advanced market segmentation and targeted notification tools.

Location Analytics Technology: Mapsted equips businesses with comprehensive insights into customer behavior through its location-based analytics suite, enabling them to elevate their companies to the next level.

With technology deployed on 850 million+ sq. ft. of space over six continents, Mapsted is proud provide cutting-edge location technology solutions to a wide range of industries, including: 

Big Box Retail 
Corporate Offices
Higher Education 
Hospitals & Healthcare 
Museums & Art Galleries
Resorts & Parks
Stadiums
Trade Shows & Exhibitions
Railway Stations & Airports
Retail Malls

Name: Ignite
Description:
We are helping UK entrepreneurs build better businesses. 

3-6 months of startup support and investment from a global network of founders, mentors and investors.

Since 2011 Ignite have supported over 500 founders who have raised over £200m in venture capital from some of the world's leading investors. 

Current programme:
A funded, 3 month pre-accelerator for idea-stage founders, or founders without an idea, looking to start working on the idea full-time.

The pre-accelerator is only open to founders or companies based in the North East (County Durham, Northumberland and Tyne and Wear).

The pre-accelerator is a 3 month full-time programme that helps entrepreneurs to develop their business idea, launch an MVP, get their first customers and figure out what to do next. We are looking for entrepreneurs who want to solve (or already solving) real-world problems with innovative technology-led ideas.

But if you’ve not got an idea but you think entrepreneurship is for you, or you’ve got a skill set that could lend itself to working on building a new business (especially within data and or ageing), we’d love to hear from you.

The pre-accelerator programme includes:

- £10,000 net investment (structured as a convertible loan)
- 3-month course covering product development, marketing, sales, operations, hiring and fundraising
- Mentoring from experienced entrepreneurs, mentors and investors
- 3 months of office space in Newcastle (with the potential for discounts post-programme)
- A fast-track to the final interviews of next Ignite accelerator programme (in the following year).

Name: Brand Festival
Description:
Dal 2017 Brand Festival è l’evento di discussione e confronto sul Branding e sull’Identità.
Eventi, incontri e iniziative dedicate alla comunicazione e al marketing con al centro lo sviluppo di strategie di marca, nazionali e locali.
Per farlo abbiamo scelto un centro storico al posto di un centro congressi, e la provincia al posto delle grandi città, l’habitat perfetto per far incontrare la cultura italiana e la quotidianità con il branding.

La marca è un sistema vivo che si nutre delle persone, del territorio e delle imprese con cui entra in relazione. Sono questi legami a generare nuove identità e nuovi equilibri, in cui spesso si nasconde il vero elemento distintivo.
In un contesto sempre più fluido, dove il locale e il globale si mescolano e la comunicazione diventa sempre più articolata, i racconti di marca devono riuscire a riflettere l’anima dell’impresa. L’identità di marca si evolve attraversando questi mondi, arricchendosi di sfumature, significati e contaminazioni.

Trovare armonia tra identità personale, radici territoriali e brand significa creare connessioni autentiche e sinergie capaci di generare valore.

Name: BUS.com.br
Description:
O mundo está cada vez mais conectado. Do começo das civilizações até aqui foram milhares de anos de evoluções e inovações. Desde o descobrimento do fogo à criação da internet, um longo caminho foi percorrido. Mas, ainda não acabou. Buscamos sempre mais. Tanto evoluir como inovar são as bases de apoio para quem quer melhorar a sociedade e nós acreditamos nisso. 

No isolamento, todos passamos a refletir sobre o que realmente importa: viver em liberdade e estar sempre perto de quem gostamos. Viajar tem tudo a ver com isso! A vontade de sair de casa aliada à alta no preço das passagens aéreas fez com que muitos procurassem outros meios de locomoção e o ônibus se demonstrou uma excelente opção para atender esta demanda. Portanto, a busca por tickets cresceu consideravelmente e um mercado que já é sólido, agora, se reinventa para atender seu novo perfil de usuário, o digital.

A Bus nasceu para simplificar a pesquisa de passagens na internet e, com informações claras e objetivas, visa melhorar a experiência do viajante ao planejar seu roteiro. Em nosso site estão disponíveis mais 5 mil destinos nacionais e as mais de 300 viações parceiras garantem opções que podem atender mais pessoas com a comodidade de não precisar enfrentar filas nas rodoviárias para, assim, otimizar seu dia-a-dia. 

E, sim, nós sabemos que existem players concorrentes apresentando um alto nível de qualidade neste segmento, no qual, iniciamos agora. Eles são as nossas referências. Sonhamos maximizar nossos resultados explorando todo nosso potencial criativo para alcançar números tão expressivos quanto os dos que já são consolidados. 

Porque viver na contemporaneidade é isso: uma constante avaliação de processos, viabilizando soluções que abram caminhos para que mais pessoas alcancem seus objetivos. Por isso, trabalhamos numa equipe alinhada que entende a eficácia do equilíbrio entre resultados e bem-estar para sempre oferecer uma melhor performance e de excelência. 

Vem de Bus!

Somos una empresa especializada en soluciones integrales para la gestión de talento, el aprendizaje organizacional y la eficiencia operativa. Contamos con cuatro productos principales:

Forward Platform es nuestra plataforma tecnológica para la gestión integral del talento. Centraliza la formación, automatiza el análisis de datos de desempeño, fortalece la comunicación interna y permite el seguimiento eficiente de actividades y resultados. Todo en un sistema unificado y personalizable.

Forward Content es nuestra oferta de contenidos a la medida. Creamos objetos de aprendizaje y materiales de comunicación multimedia mediante la metodología DCT (Desarrollo Creativo de Talento), que combina pedagogía, creatividad y tecnología para generar experiencias de aprendizaje memorables y eficaces.

Forward AI transforma la gestión del talento con inteligencia artificial. Ofrecemos herramientas inteligentes para evaluaciones de desempeño personalizadas, capacitación online adaptativa, programas de incentivos efectivos y comunicación interna fluida. Simplificamos procesos y optimizamos resultados.

Forward GovTech está enfocado en soluciones de transformación digital para gobiernos. Desarrollamos herramientas y aplicaciones que optimizan la gestión pública, mejoran la eficiencia y conectan a las instituciones con la ciudadanía mediante tecnología e inteligencia artificial de última generación.

En FORWARD, cada solución es única, diseñada para ti. Trabajamos con enfoque en la personalización, agilidad, calidad y precios competitivos. Nuestro propósito es claro: conectar personas y organizaciones para aprender, compartir y crecer juntos.

Description:
LifeSaver Mobile helps companies prevent employee phone use while driving by automatically detecting drives and blocking cell phones, with no beacons or dongles. Cell phone related distracted driving is an epidemic responsible for over 25% of U.S. auto collisions and over $33 billion annually in insurance claims.  Our data driven solution has been validated by agents from a top 10 auto insurer and by millions of miles of consumer driving.  We were recently featured in the Washington Post and NY Times among other media mentions.

Our solution is unique because it not only reduces distracted driving, but it also provides a connected driver platform using only the mobile device.  With these dual benefits, LifeSaver is a great fit for auto insurers and fleet operators looking to reduce their claims and exposure from this growing problem.

WHO WE ARE: 
At Allconnect, we believe in making it easy to shop for, compare and set up home services like internet, TV, phone, utilities and more. Since 1998, we’ve helped more than 33 million customers across the country set up home services and switch providers. Members will enjoy free access to our premium content, which will include market reports on the UK’s top IT solutions providers and distributors, as well as big interviews with the industry’s top CEOs and commentators.

Before we launched, it was plain that sustainability was becoming an increasingly prominent topic for vendors and their channel partners, as well as their mutual end customers. This is why we are allotting special attention to tracking the channel’s sustainable transformation, alongside other important trends such as how the rise of generative AI, the move away from traditional metal-based partner programmes, shifting working and technology patterns and industry efforts to improve diversity, inclusion and workplace culture.

Above all, we have our sights set on becoming the most trusted source of high-quality news and information for the UK IT channel.

That’s why more and more channel professionals are making IT Channel Oxygen the one tab they keep open on their browser.

Name: Instituto Fogo Cruzado
Description:
Contamos tiros e somos o maior banco de dados abertos sobre a violência armada da América Latina.


O Fogo Cruzado usa tecnologia para produzir e divulgar dados abertos e colaborativos sobre violência armada, fortalecendo a democracia através da transformação social e da preservação da vida. 

Com uma metodologia própria e inovadora, o laboratório de dados da instituição produz mais de 40 indicadores inéditos sobre violência nas regiões metropolitanas do Rio, Recife, Salvador, Belém e, em breve, em mais cidades brasileiras.

Através de um aplicativo de celular, o Fogo Cruzado recebe e disponibiliza informações sobre tiroteios, checadas em tempo real por uma equipe especializada e local. Estas informações estão disponíveis no primeiro banco de dados aberto sobre violência armada da América Latina, que pode ser acessado gratuitamente pela API do Instituto.

Seguindo o propósito de popularizar o conhecimento sobre segurança pública e direitos, o Fogo Cruzado usa técnicas de comunicação para tornar dados sobre violência armada mais acessíveis, visando qualificar e promover debates na sociedade.

Name: ITTN, Ireland's Travel Trade Network

Ireland’s Travel Trade Network (ITTN) has been providing Ireland’s travel industry, north and south, with independent insightful, professional reporting for over 55 years.

The ITTN Group is made up of travel trade news site ittn.ie, which includes its daily newsletter TNT (Travel News Today), delivered into your inbox every day at 4pm. ITTN’s newest site, traveltimes.ie, covers outbound travel and includes features and destination pieces aimed at the consumer market. For all inbound travel, there is travel2ireland, while The Travel Directory is Ireland’s travel trade’s one-stop-shop for all suppliers contact details, training webinars, agent collateral, offers and incentives! 

You can also find ITTN on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube and tiktok

And finally, there’s the Irish travel industry’s annual ‘Oscars’ – the Irish Travel Trade Awards Gala Dinner!

Name: biliyor muydunuz?
Description:
Merak, öğrenmenin ilk adımıdır.
“Biliyor muydunuz?” tam da bu adımda hayatına dokunmak için var.

Bu sayfada her gün şaşırtıcı, öğretici ve farkındalık yaratan bilgiler seni bekliyor. Bilginin sıkıcı olması gerekmediğini, küçük detayların hayatımıza nasıl renk katabileceğini göstermek istiyoruz.

Amacımız sadece bilgi vermek değil;
 Merak uyandırmak,
 Öğrenmeye ilham olmak,
 Herkesin günlük hayatında kullanabileceği genel kültür, farkındalık ve gelişim içerikleri sunmak.

Günlük yaşantından bilim ve tarih notlarına, psikolojiden kişisel gelişime kadar pek çok konuda “Aa gerçekten mi?” dedirtecek paylaşımlar burada olacak.

Her güne bir bilgi, her bilgiye bir anlam!

 Takipte kal, merakın eksik olmasın.
#BiliyorMuYdunuz

Name: GittiGidiyor
Description:
Türkiye’nin ilk online pazaryeri GittiGidiyor olarak 2001 yılında faaliyete başladık. Yenilikleri takip eden genç ve dinamik ekibimizle 2011 yılında e-ticaretin küresel liderlerinden eBay'in çatısı altına girdik. 2022 yılı itibarıyla toplam 35 milyon kayıtlı kullanıcımızla 50 kategoride 25 milyon ürüne ev sahipliği yapıyoruz. Türkiye’nin en büyük teknoloji şirketlerinden biri olarak KOBİ ve büyük işletmelerin dijitalleşme yolculuğuna öncülük ediyor, platformumuzda mağaza açıp işlerini büyütmelerine olanak sağlıyoruz. Bir eBay şirketi olarak globale açılan penceremiz sayesinde Türk markalarını ve ürünlerini 190 pazarda milyonlarca aktif kullanıcıyla buluşturuyoruz. 
Tüm paydaşlarımıza güç kazandırmak ve herkes için ekonomik fırsat yaratmak amacıyla hareket ediyoruz. Çalışanlarımız, alıcı ve satıcılarımızdan oluşan geniş topluluğumuzu güçlendirmek için çalışıyoruz. Çeşitlilikten beslenen kolektif bilincin gücüne inanıyoruz. Sektörde fark yaratan genç ve dinamik kurum kültürümüz, DNA’mıza işleyen değerlerimizi yansıtıyor: “Topluluğumuzu Güçlendir”, “Cesaretle Yenilik Kat”, “Etki Yarat”, “Herkesi Kucakla” ve “Etik Kurallarımıza Uygun Davran”. 
Great Place to Work tarafından belirlenen Türkiye’nin En İyi İşverenleri listesinde 2017 yılından beri en üst sıralarda yer almanın gururunu yaşıyoruz. 2022’de “Türkiye’nin En İyi İşverenleri Listesi”nde 250-499 Çalışan Kategorisi’nde ikinci olduk.  Çeşitlilik ve dahil etme politikamızla Diversity Özel Ödülü’nü son altı yılda beş defa kazandık. 2021 yılında açıklanan Great Place to Work özel ödülleri kapsamında, “IT’nin En İyi İşvereni” seçildik ve “Yaşam Boyu Öğrenme Ödülü”nün de sahibi olduk.

Face à la crise qu'a traversé la Côte d'Ivoire il y a plus d'une décennie, il est impossible de s'abriter derrière des grilles de lecture préconçues. L'analyse de faits avérés, la prise de distance, le recul, la confrontation d'idées, l'argumentation sont pour nous préférables aux réflexes partisans ou militants.

Name: Droom
Description:
Droom offers a 21st-century e-commerce experience for automobiles. Droom offers India’s largest selection of automobiles with over 2.9 lacs vehicles online in 1,100 cities — both used & new, cars & 2-wheelers, and other vehicles too. For buyers, Droom offers India’s finest automobile buying experience online with trust, selection, low price, and convenience second to none. Every vehicle sold at Droom goes through a proprietary and technology-driven rigorous 1,100-point inspection and certification for its condition, pricing, and history.  Because Droom invests in technology and AI vs. physical stores and thousands of people, the automobiles sold at Droom are cheaper than other options available to the consumers.  From our mobile apps or websites, users can search for vehicles or create buying requirements, book vehicles, get loans and insurance, and finally get the vehicle delivered to their doorstep.  Buyers can return the vehicle before making full payment and the best part is every vehicle comes with six months warranty (up to Rs. 50 lacs).  Droom also offers individual sellers the ability to sell their used vehicles to our large network of over 20k dealers for the best price and fast turnaround in a fully transparent manner from the comfort of your home.  Droom is also working with leading OEM and EV manufacturers to bring automobile buyers the largest assortment of new vehicles with the paperwork, loan & insurance, and delivery at the doorstep. Droom is the market leader in the automobile e-commerce segment and since its inception, Droom has sold over 400K vehicles and served over 1.5 million happy customers with its products and services.
Droom is among the most trusted consumer internet brands in India often recognized for its innovative approach and technology and is backed by marquee global investors including Lightbox, Digital Garage, Toyota Group, Recruit, Beenext, Beenos, 57 Stars and many multibillion-dollar family offices in SE Asia and Hong Kong.

Name: theSkimm
Description:
We are a digital media company, dedicated to succinctly giving women the information they need to make confident decisions. We make it easier to live smarter.

At our core, we are writers, editors, producers, designers, marketers, engineers, analysts, sellers, creatives, and strategists all working together to achieve this goal.

Every day we’re breaking down the news, trends, policies, and politics that impact women so that they can navigate their daily lives and futures – from managing their paychecks to casting their ballots – with confidence.  We provide our dedicated audience of millions with reliable, non-partisan, information, informing and empowering them while fitting into their daily routines.


Since disrupting the media landscape and defining a new category a decade ago, we have become a trusted source for our audience of millions by seamlessly integrating into their existing routines, fundamentally changing the way they consume news and make decisions. Today theSkimm ecosystem includes the Daily Skimm, the Daily Skimm: Weekend, Skimm Money and Skimm Your Life newsletters, “9 to 5ish with theSkimm” podcast, theSkimm mobile app, and Skimm Studios which creates innovative in-house video and audio content. Our first book, How to Skimm Your Life debuted at #1 on The New York Times Best Seller list. Through Skimm Impact, our purpose-driven platform, we are proud to support get-out-the-vote efforts with Skimm Your Ballot, which has spurred more than one million voting-related actions across the last three election cycles, and its #ShowUsYourLeave movement, creating transparency and change for Paid Family Leave in the U.S.

Name: SalesDaily.co
Description: Subscribe to the SalesDaily Newsletter to bring the best resources directly to your inbox! We curate top-tier content from LinkedIn, podcasts, YouTube, and blogs, all designed to boost your career. Learn from top performers and gain the insights you need to excel in the sales industry.

Name: Vox
Description:
We live in a world with too much news and not enough understanding. Audiences are sending a clear signal: News fatigue and avoidance are up, public trust in the media is down.

Vox is the antidote. Audiences trust Vox because we tell them what truly matters and how to think about it. We do the work — sift through information, read the studies, talk to experts, and gather a range of perspectives. We don’t drown you in panic-inducing headlines. We’re not obsessed with being the first to break the news; we’re focused on being helpful to you. We offer clarity, insight, and tools to help you live a better life. And we have fun, too.

Our audience is at the heart of everything we do. We’re not focused on serving people in power — we’re focused on serving you, our audience. We want you to walk away from a Vox story and feel like you’ve learned something new, or understand a topic more deeply.

Our journalism is written and produced to be accessible to all, whether you’re a subject-matter expert or hearing about something for the very first time. We report urgently and thoroughly on the most important stories shaping our world, but also on issues the rest of the media neglects. We explain some of the biggest challenges humanity faces, but we also offer ideas and solutions to confront them.

Name: Autism Spectrum News
Description:
Autism Spectrum News (ASN), published by the 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization Mental Health News Education, began as a quarterly print publication in 2008. In response to readership feedback, ASN became an online-only publication in 2021. ASN was developed to provide the autism community with a trusted source of evidence-based information and education, the latest in scientific research, clinical treatment best practices, family issues, advocacy, and vital community resources.

ASN raises the level of the autism field by serving as a central repository of quality, practical information written by leading professionals in autism service delivery and research, family members, and autistic adults. The publication’s content guides autistic individuals, parents, and service providers in the right direction from the very beginning while taking efforts to avoid the promotion of unsafe and unproven interventions and treatment methods. 

In keeping with the publication’s evidence-based mission, the esteemed ASN Editorial Board will only accept articles and advertising offering science-based information and/or treatments proven safe and effective for autistic individuals.

ASN provides hope through education by collaborating with leading provider agencies and educational institutions across the US that are improving lives every day. The publication serves to unite and improve our evolving systems of care and advocate on behalf of individuals and their families to reduce the harmful effects of stigma in the community.

Join us on "Cybersecurity Insights," your new LinkedIn home for all cybersecurity matters. We're delighted to welcome you and excited to embark on this enlightening journey towards cyber-awareness together!

Description:
Sweatcoin is a health & fitness app that turns steps into motivation and real-world rewards. Whether you’re strolling to the shop or running a marathon, you’re earning sweatcoins. From gadgets to gear, to exclusive discounts and exotic trips, steps unlock it all.
The more you walk, the more rewarding it becomes. And the better you feel.

We keep it simple, but what we’ve built is anything but ordinary:
-200M+ downloads
-Top 10 Health & Fitness app globally
-#1 app in 42+ countries
-23 trillion steps walked by our users (yes, that’s moon-and-back numbers)
-20% boost in daily movement for the average user
-$200M+ in rewards delivered
-1,300+ brand partners and counting, like Nike, adidas, lululemon

But we don’t just count steps. We change behaviour and we’ve got the science to prove it. Our work with leading researchers (including the British Journal of Sports Medicine) and the NHS shows real, measurable impact. In a pre-diabetes trial, 85% of participants stuck with the programme, losing weight simply by walking more.

Backed by investors like Goodwater Capital, Greylock Partners, LHV Bank, and Twitch founder Justin Kan, Sweatcoin is more than an app, we’re a valuable partner in health & fitness. We make movement matter. Some of the world’s most trusted voices – The New York Times, CBS, Forbes, Fortune, Reuters, Huffington Post – have taken note.

Our Mission
Making 1 billion people more active every day.

Who we are

We’re a global team from 30+ nationalities, proudly remote-first, with a London HQ and team members across every timezone from São Paulo to Singapore. We’re a curious, creative bunch who believe culture is something you build, not inherit. We believe culture is something you build - not inherit - and we move fast, have fun, and genuinely care about the people (and steps) behind the product.

Join us. Let’s make movement matter.

Swayamwhere is a trust-first Indian matrimony app for Gen-Z & Millennials, and the families who love them. We make serious matchmaking simple, respectful, and transparent so you can move from browsing to meaningful conversations with confidence.

WHAT WE DO
We combine verified identities, values-first discovery, and optional parent collaboration to help you find compatible, commitment-minded matches, without noise or guesswork.

HOW IT WORKS
• Verified Profiles: ID + selfie checks and active moderation reduce catfishing and spam.
• Green-Flag Scanner: Surfaces alignment across values, habits, life goals, and family preferences.
• My View  Parent View: Privately involve parents when you’re ready, share context, not screenshots.
• Consent-First Chat: Mutual interest unlocks conversation, with block/report and safety prompts.
• Honest UX: Clear intent tags (timeline, relocation, lifestyle), photo guidelines, profile transparency.

WHY SWAYAMWHERE
• Safety by Design: Document checks + human/AI moderation + zero-tolerance policies.
• Built for India: Respect for tradition without stereotyping; inclusive language; optional community fields.
• Real Progress: Fewer swipes, more aligned matches, tools that move you forward, together.

PRIVACY & TRUST
You control what’s shared and with whom. We minimize data collection, never sell personal data, and make visibility easy to manage.

WHO WE SERVE
Singles seeking committed, family-forward relationships, and parents who want transparency without taking over.

Follow us for launch updates, product previews, and roles on our growing team.
Find your somewhere. Belong forever.

De foodcultuur in deze steden wordt dagelijks populairder. Met zo’n ruim aanbod is het soms lastig kiezen en daar biedt de Buik een oplossing voor. Ook in deze vreemde tijden van afhalen, bezorgen, wandelingen en dinerboxen.

De Buik is een journalistiek en prijswinnend platform voor en door liefhebbers van lekker eten, drinken en mooie producten, is onafhankelijk en heeft een positieve instelling, maar waar nodig ook constructief kritisch. De Buik is eind 2013 opgericht en werd in korte tijd razend populair. Het platform blijft groeien, is actief in Amsterdam, Rotterdam en Utrecht en is druk doende met meerdere nieuwe steden voor komend jaar.

Schrijf je in voor onze nieuwsbrief op de site: www.debuik.nl of volg ons op Facebook, Twitter en Instagram (elke stad heeft een eigen account).

Wil je adverteren op de Buik of gebruik maken van de kennis, expertise, creativiteit en het netwerk van de Buik, neem dan contact met ons op.

Name: Military Trailblazer Office Hours
Description:
As fellow veterans and military spouses who've navigated the civilian career transition, we know firsthand how challenging it can be to find your footing in the tech world. While our primary focus is supporting the military community, EVERYONE is welcome!

Our live, interactive sessions offer something for everyone on their Salesforce journey. From Q&A sessions where you get straight answers to Salesforce technology questions, to hands-on coding workshops focusing on practical development and Apex programming, to guided learning through Trailhead modules where experienced practitioners share insights you won't find in official documentation. We regularly invite industry leaders, Salesforce MVPs, and other experts for deeper insights.

We understand the unique challenges facing military spouses, transitioning service members, and veterans trying to break into or advance in the Salesforce community. Whether you need career transition guidance, want to sharpen technical skills, or are looking to connect with people who understand your journey, we've built a collaborative environment that supports you.

Getting involved is simple: follow this page for event notifications and join our Slack workspace for day-of notifications and collaboration. Whether you're starting your Salesforce journey or looking to give back, we're here to support your growth and connect you with a community that values your military experience.

Name: Borja on Stocks
Description:
No Borja on Stocks publicamos dez análises por semana, cinco a ações europeias, nomeadamente das bolsas de Lisboa, Madrid e Amesterdão e cinco a ações americanas cotadas nas bolsas de Nova Iorque (NYSE e Nasdaq).

No total temos mais de 2.400 análises publicadas e é muito provável que já tenhamos analisado várias vezes as ações que tem em carteira.

Ocasionalmente encontramos uma ação que consideramos extraordinariamente atrativa e na análise a essa ação indicamos, de forma objetiva, a entrada num TOP de ações selecionadas.

Depois da entrada no TOP essa ação é acompanhada com atualizações à análise inicial e comentários no nosso Fórum, onde também respondemos às questões e dúvidas dos nossos Subscritores, para que se sintam sempre apoiados ao longo do investimento.

Até que, finalmente, seja porque o preço alvo de longo prazo é atingido, seja porque a história de investimento se tornou inválida, publicamos uma nova análise a justificar a saída do TOP à cotação de fecho seguinte.

Desta forma cada Subscritor pode seguir – ou não, fica ao seu critério – as entradas e saídas dos TOPs, replicando na sua própria carteira de investimento os movimentos que vamos fazendo.

Amacımız, her gün milyonlarca kullanıcıya ilham veren, güldüren, şaşırtan ve düşündüren viral videoları keşfetmek, üretmek ve yaymaktır.

Dijital içerik dünyasında başarı, sadece “izlenmekle” değil — paylaşılmakla ölçülür.
Biz de bu anlayışla; trendleri yakından takip ediyor, sosyal medyanın nabzını tutuyor ve izleyicilere yüksek etkileşimli videolar sunuyoruz.

 Viral Videos’ta neler bulacaksınız?

• En güncel viral akımlar ve trend içerikler,
• İlham veren hikâyeler ve kısa video formatları,
• Yaratıcı sosyal deneyler, eğlenceli anlar ve dikkat çekici paylaşımlar,
• Dünyanın dört bir yanından öne çıkan içerik üreticileri.

Viral Videos olarak hedefimiz; yalnızca izlenmek değil, insanların konuştuğu, paylaştığı ve benimsediği bir dijital topluluk oluşturmak.
Her videomuzun arkasında etkileşim, duygu ve yaratıcılık var.
Bizim için her paylaşım, milyonlara ulaşabilecek bir hikâyenin başlangıcıdır.

 Misyonumuz
Sosyal medyada pozitif, eğlenceli ve yaratıcı içeriklerle milyonlara ulaşarak dijital dünyayı daha ilham verici bir yer haline getirmek.

 Vizyonumuz
Küresel ölçekte en çok takip edilen, en güvenilir ve en yaratıcı viral içerik platformlarından biri olmak.

Name: Dijital Kafa
Description:
Dijital Kafa, dijital dönüşümün gücünü keşfetmek ve teknolojiyi iş süreçlerinde etkin bir şekilde kullanarak markaların geleceğe güçlü bir şekilde adım atmalarını sağlamak amacıyla kurulmuş bir şirkettir. Dijital dünyanın hızla değişen dinamiklerine ayak uydurabilen, yenilikçi ve stratejik çözümlerle markalarımıza değer katmayı hedefliyoruz.

Kendi alanlarında lider olmak isteyen şirketlere, dijital stratejiler, teknoloji danışmanlığı, veri analitiği, dijital pazarlama çözümleri ve dijital dönüşüm süreçlerinde rehberlik ediyoruz. Dijital Kafa, yalnızca teknoloji odaklı değil, aynı zamanda yaratıcı ve yenilikçi yaklaşımlarla da iş süreçlerini dönüştürmeyi amaçlıyor.

Amacımız, şirketlerin dijitalleşme süreçlerini hızlandırarak, iş verimliliklerini artırmak ve pazarlarında daha rekabetçi olmalarına yardımcı olmaktır. İşletmelerin dijital dönüşüm yolculuklarında karşılaştıkları zorluklara pratik ve sürdürülebilir çözümler sunuyoruz. Teknoloji ile desteklediğimiz dijital pazarlama, veri analitiği ve otomasyon süreçleri ile şirketlerin performansını en üst düzeye çıkarmayı hedefliyoruz.

Dijital Kafa olarak, dijital dünyada daha etkin ve verimli olabilmek için sürekli gelişen teknolojilerle donanmış, alanında uzman bir ekip ile çalışıyoruz. Her müşterimizin ihtiyacına özel çözümler sunarak, onları dijital dünyada başarıya taşımak için durmaksızın çalışıyoruz.

Gelin, Dijital Kafa ile geleceğin dijital dünyasında yerinizi alın ve her fırsatı en verimli şekilde değerlendirin.

Name: Andi
Description:
Andi is search for the next generation using generative AI. Instead of links, Andi gives you answers - like asking a smart friend. Andi uses language models combined with live data to generate answers to questions, and to explain and summarize information combined from the best sources.

Search is broken because of SEO spam, ads, and surveillance capitalism. Andi cuts through the clutter to get you straight to the knowledge you need. It presents it visually in a way that's easy to understand, and protects you from ad tech and distraction.

Name: CARFAX Europe

Our mission is to continuously expand throughout Europe. Over the past years we have become an integral part of the European automotive industry: Hundreds of thousands of consumers have trusted us to provide them with reliable Vehicle History information and our business partners, including dealerships, law enforcement agencies, insurance companies and members of the finance sector actively use our services on a daily basis.

In Europe, CARFAX is currently operating under CARFAX Europe GmbH, in Sweden under CARFAX Sverige AB, in Spain under CARFAX Historial de Vehiculos and in the Netherlands under CARFAX Nederland B.V.

JOIN TEAM CARFAX - AND FIND A "GREAT PLACE TO WORK."

It's not just because of our yearly Oktoberfest visits.
It's not just that we have hikes into the mountains and frequent celebrations – we are used to work hard, but play harder.

You'll be working for a company that makes a difference in our European society. We attract creative people who are do-ers, movers and shakers. We believe in the wisdom of crowds. Our policy is "no jerks allowed."

We're passionate about our mission to help millions of consumers buy safe, reliable used cars.If our culture and our work sounds appealing, do you think you're CARFAX material?

Let's find out!

You can find our actual job postings here on LinkedIn or on our Career Website www.carfax.eu/career

Over 130 million users per month choose Uptodown to download apps from our catalog. We're available in 17 languages, offering a legal software distribution platform that is accessible from any web browser, as well as through our native Android app. Uptodown focuses its efforts on offering a different way of bringing apps toa  wider audience, leading the way in the acquisition of organic traffic.

Although we are a multi-platform marketplace, over 80% of our traffic comes from Android. Over the past few years, we've focused our efforts to hone in on the Android app ecosystem. 

A solid part of Uptodown is centered on adding value to its content. Uptodown isn't just a complete app repository, we also provide reliable information (app reviews, videos and all kinds of additional editorial content) created in-house by our team of editors. The website provides in-depth coverage of Canada's most innovative startups, entrepreneurs, venture capitalists, and investors. CanadaVenture.news covers the latest news, trends, and insights in the Canadian startup scene, and is dedicated to supporting the growth and development of the startup ecosystem.

The website features a wide range of content, including news articles, in-depth interviews with founders and investors, industry reports, and analysis. CanadaVenture.news is focused on highlighting the stories of innovative startups from across Canada, with a focus on tech startups, social enterprises, and impact-driven businesses.

CanadaVenture.news is designed to be a valuable resource for entrepreneurs, investors, and startup enthusiasts. The website provides practical advice and insights on topics such as fundraising, marketing, product development, team building, and scaling a business. It also provides an opportunity for startups to showcase their products and services and to connect with potential investors, partners, and customers.

In addition to its online content, CanadaVenture.news also produces live events, workshops, and webinars designed to bring together startups, investors, and industry experts. The events provide opportunities for networking, learning, and collaboration, and feature keynote speakers from the startup community and beyond.

The team at CanadaVenture.news is made up of experienced journalists and editors who are passionate about the startup ecosystem. They are committed to providing comprehensive and accurate coverage of the Canadian startup scene and to highlighting the stories of innovative and impactful startups.

Name: Marketing Miner
Description:
Marketing Miner is an SEO tool for all data-driven marketers. Gain valuable insights with over 40 features to skyrocket your website rankings. User-friendly interface and bulk data analysis features to save your time and effort. 

We can help you with: 

Keyword Research
Collect detailed data of keywords that people are searching for and what your competition is using to increase your organic traffic. 

SEO Audit 
Scan any website to check its search visibility or identify technical SEO issues such as broken links, duplicate content, indexation issues, missing meta descriptions, and more. 

Rank Tracking
Find out which landing pages and keywords bring the most traffic to your site and what SERP features appear for them. Monitor your rankings over time and keep an eye on up to 5 competitors to see how they perform in search results. 

Competitor Analysis 
See what keywords and content are performing best for your competitors. Conduct deeper competitor research and leverage data in your favor to make data-driven decisions. 

Brand Monitoring 
Monitor mentions of your brand, competitors or keywords in your niche. Create alerts to respond at the right moment and save your reputation.  

Link Building 
Find new link building opportunities to strengthen your backlink profile and obtain contact details where possible. Set up email alerts to get notified whenever there's a change or if any of your backlinks are removed.

Bulk Data Analysis 
If you’re looking for a quick way to analyze data for up to 100,000 keywords, domains or URLs, Marketing Miner is your best choice. Simply upload your list of keywords, domains or links and leave all the hard work to us!

Name: Nuclia • The RAG-as-a-Service company

Low-code from data processing to search. Nuclia is an end-to-end and easy- to-use API, able to process any kind of data, to supercharge applications with an AI-powered search engine.

- Out-of-the-box searching semantic & neural search engine
Search by concept, not by keyword. This makes it easier to find exactly what users are looking for. It all saves time and helps uncover knowledge. 100% multilingual.

- Automatic insight detection (named entity recognition)
Nuclia automatically detects and extracts named entities: locations, people, names of products, etc. Nuclia can also be trained to detect your own specific named entities.

- Integrate Nuclia to your own application
Nuclia API let your team to integrate Flaps to empower your applications with a neural & natural language understanding engine

Name: Lezzet Arayanlara
Description:
Lezzet Arayanlara Nedir?
Sürdürülebilir çiftçilik ve lüks perakendeciliğin uyum içinde kucaklaştığı Lezzetarayanlara.com dünyasına hoş geldiniz. Lezzetarayanlara.com olarak, ülke çapında kaliteli ve lezzetli  peynirler, özel yiyecekler üreten, tedarik eden, satan ve sunan peynir uzmanları ve meraklılarıyız.

Lezzetarayanlara.com olarak tüm müşterilerimize sınıfının en iyisi bir deneyim sunmaya kendimizi adadık. Özenli paketleme yöntemleri, taze ürün garantisi ve hizmete önem veren bir ekiple, müşterilerin markamızla etkileşimini geliştirmenin yollarına sürekli olarak yatırım yapıyoruz.

Hem ürünlerimizi nasıl tedarik ettiğimiz hem de müşterilerimizle nasıl çalıştığımız konusunda titiz bir işletmeyiz. Lezzetarayanlara.com’u daha yakından tanıyabilmek için iki dakikalık mola verin ve ender mutfak lezzetlerimizden bazılarına bir göz atın.


Paylaşmayı çok seviyoruz. Bu nedenle, Lezzetarayanlara.com’un ürünlerini çevrimiçi olarak Lezzetarayanlara.com adresinde satışa sunduk. Ürünlerimizin teslimatını İstanbul için aynı gün içinde kendi araçlarımızla sağlamaktayız. Türkiye’nin her yerine ise en fazla 3 gün içinde ürünlerimizi ulaştırmaktayız.  Bu ürünler tazeliklerini uzun süre korusun diye son kullanma tarihi en uzun olanlardan seçilen , en taze ürünlerdir.

Lezzetarayanlara.com, çok keyif aldığımız “pazar deneyimini” yeniden yaratma arzusundan doğdu. Online mağazamızda, Türkiye’nin dört bir yanına gönderim sağladığımız ürünlerimiz, mükemmel şekilde paketlenmiş olup  uzun ömürlüdür. Lezzetarayanlara.com kahvaltının vazgeçilmezi olan çok çeşitli peynirleri, reçelleri, balları, hardalları, sirkeleri, zeytinyağları ve kurutulmuş etleri masanıza getiriyor. Raftaki her bir ürün, Türkiye’nin belirli bir bölgesinden bir mutfak geleneğini temsil ediyor. Mağazamızda gözbebeğimiz olan çok çeşitli peynirlerimiz, peynir tabaklarımız ve çeşit çeşit farklı lezzetlerimiz bulunuyor.

Lezzetarayanlara.com olarak üretici olmanın verdiği tecrübeyle tüm süreçleri tek elden yapıyoruz.

Description:

Name: Mentes Que Pensam
Description:

A startup começou a ser estruturada em 2020, em meio à pandemia, e iniciou operação em 2021. As soluções e produtos da Mentes que Pensam disponíveis para uma base de mais de 57 mil clientes, a maior parte varejistas. São empresas de 38 segmentos diferentes, de diversos tamanhos.

Operando no modelo SaaS (Software as a Service), a Mentes que Pensam conta com uma plataforma única de APIs e integrações, totalmente amigável e padronizada para uma integração rápida e simples. Essa plataforma permite aos clientes das software houses gerirem, em um único ambiente, o negócio e as operações financeiras da empresa, com a oferta de multisserviços, como Pix – sistema de pagamento instantâneo que vem proporcionando redução de custos ao lojista, plataforma de cobrança, pagamentos e recebimentos, ou uma conta ou carteira digital, de forma integrada.

Name: Picture Soluções em TI
Description:
A Picture TI foi fundada em 1996, e vem desde então, crescendo seu portfólio de serviços e soluções oferecidas. Tendo como uma de suas principais características a expertise no desenvolvimento de soluções para atender as necessidades do mercado corporativo construiu, ao longo desses anos, uma extensa carteira de clientes com muitos casos de sucesso.

Para garantir o desenvolvimento de um portfólio de soluções estruturadas e modulares, que se encaixem perfeitamente no tamanho e necessidades das empresas Clientes, a Picture TI vem firmando parcerias com grandes empresas e corporações globais, garantindo assim, um portfólio de soluções com tecnologia de ponta que acompanha as evoluções e inovações de um mercado tão dinâmico como o de TI.

Como entende que parte deste sucesso são os seus funcionários, investe sistematicamente no treinamento, qualificação e certificação de seu time. Esta estratégia vem garantindo a Picture TI uma vantagem competitiva valiosa: o core-team de TI conta com um grupo extremamente competente e qualificado, com alguns membros desde a fundação da empresa. É este time de primeira que desenvolve as soluções e projetos, gerando aos Clientes Corporativos experiências únicas de parceria e entrosamento positivos, promovendo assim o relacionamento e suporte aos seus Clientes.

Evidenciando este momento positivo de crescimento e expansão, a Picture TI posicionou e reafirmou sua missão de criar relacionamentos de longo prazo com seus Clientes, agregando valor e entregando com qualidade todos os serviços de seu portfólio.

Çeşitli sektörlere yetişmiş kaynak sağladığı Star Development Bootcamp Programı yeni mezunlara gerçek projelerde tecrübe kazandırırken, kurumlara ihtiyaç duydukları alanlarda deneyim sahibi yetenekler sunar. “İşi işte bulmanın en hızlı yolu” yaklaşımı ile geliştirilmiş Star Development Bootcamp Programı kurumlara ihtiyaç duydukları proje ekiplerini maliyet etkin bir yolla sunar ve bu ekiplerin kurum içindeki sürekliliğinin devam etmesini sağlar.

Her zaman müşterileri için yenilik, özen ve memnuniyetle optimum çözümler sunmayı hedefleyen Bilge Adam Teknoloji, 22 yılı aşkın tecrübesi, 600'den fazla nitelikli mühendis dahil olmak üzere 1.000'den fazla tam zamanlı çalışan, 900'den fazla şirket ve devlet kurumuna hizmet vermektedir.

If you are a licensed PI or law enforcement (local, state, or federal) official with experience in surveillance, undercover work, or background checks, we’d love to hear from you today: http://www.trustify.info/apply.

Being in the Trustify network is ideal for investigators wanting to make extra money on the side. We'll offer you new cases you take when you want them, and you can focus on working on cases. No pressure, no obligations, no hassle, just a little extra income.

My heart sank when I realized my mother (76 years old) was missing. I called the police, but I felt really helpless when they said they’d said they’d “do what they could”. So I booked a private investigator through Trustify and within a few hours we found her. I was so relieved to know she was safe! - Megan M, Washington, DC

Name: Battery Talk
Description:
We are Jeff Bell and Aubert Demaray, professionals in the battery industry who aim to enable conversations across different players in the field of energy storage, and "speak the unspoken" of battery science. Things you don't see in a lab, things companies won't discuss. We will try to share some non-confidential lessons learned and discuss what is public with a critical eye and critical thinking. We are affectionately calling this endeavor, Battery Talk.

The origins of Battery Talk began at a monthly community event called The Battery Brunch (https://www.batterybrunch.org/) where we would give presentations. Originally it was just a hobby we both enjoyed, but as we started to put in more of our time to educate the community we decided it was time to level up and give ourselves a dedicated channel on youtube which would allow us to reach a larger audience. 

Our vision is to provide a resource for everyone to learn about batteries, battery companies, and battery technology. We want to enable you the viewer with the ability to sift through all the media ad hype, provide a basic understanding of a technology that is omni-present in our everyday lives, and present a perspective you may not find through a simple google search.

We will cover topics ranging from startup battery companies  to tier 1 manufactures, battery basics to emerging R&D technologies, and round it all up with our take on current events in the battery industry.  This will manifest itself in the form of several segments:

Battery Basics, a show dedicated to giving lessons about batteries from fundamentals to advance concepts. 

Who’s doing it right, a show dedicated to looking at different battery companies unique challenges, successes, and outlook.

The Current, a show dedicated to giving hot takes on current events specifically related to the field of energy storage. Some of which might get spicy.

We hope you enjoy all the videos we will be uploading. Thanks! Like.comment.subcribe.

Name: MONKEY FIRST
Description:
MONKEY FIRST est une start-up technologique (B2B SaaS) basée à Paris et dédiée à l'expérience client des marques.

MONKEY FIRST a créé un outil innovant exclusif permettant de mesurer de manière détaillée et spécifique au secteur les expériences réelles de vos clients et de vos concurrents.

POURQUOI ?

Parce que le succès durable d'une marque est indissociable de la qualité perçue de l'expérience client et de sa profonde cohérence.

Parce que l'expérience client est par nature multidimensionnelle, composée de perceptions subjectives et d'éléments factuels, en amont et en aval de l'achat (recherche de produits, support de vente, parcours on et off-line, paiement, livraison, service après-vente, etc.)


COMMENT ?

En utilisant les technologies les plus récentes et l'extrême richesse de l'information disponible en ligne aujourd'hui pour développer un outil de scoring exclusif :
- Mis à jour en permanence,
- Constitué d'un grand nombre d'indicateurs,
- Construit sur la collecte et la synthèse d'un volume considérable de comportements et de réactions de clients,
- Décliné selon différents critères d'analyse,
- Totalement indépendant de vos propres données.


QU'EST-CE QUE CELA VOUS APPORTE ?

Le MonkeyScore complet vous permet d'obtenir une note simple, directe et concrète :
- MESURER la qualité réelle de l'expérience client associée à votre marque et ses progrès possibles.
- VOUS COMPARER à vos principaux concurrents dans votre secteur d'activité, globalement, par étapes clés et par canaux de communication et de vente.
- COMPRENDRE en profondeur les forces et les faiblesses de l'expérience client actuelle.
- AGIR sur les facteurs clés de transformation et d'optimisation possibles.

Le Score d'Expérience Client Intégral vous offre une base de mesure et de comparaison précise, ainsi qu'une base d'analyse fiable et indépendante. 

Exclusivement au service de vos défis clients !

Name: The Money Manual
Description:
The Money Manual was launched in 2017, and is dedicated to educating the next generation of women investors. With the unprecedented interest in investing underfoot, and the democratization of investing taking place, we want to make sure women don’t get left behind.

A few of our goals as a site:

1. We want to do everything we can to encourage women to invest, and to do it as early as possible, and as often as possible. The earlier women do it, the more they will utilize the power of compound interest. Encouraging the habit of investing is also important to truly get on the path to growing wealth. The old days of putting your money in a savings account and watching it grow into a big chunk of change are over. We want to help educate our readers that when they “save money” they should really then be investing it.

2. We want to open up the conversation around investing. Talking about investing shouldn’t be a boy’s club, it should be an everyone is welcome club. We hope that by starting the conversation our readers will continue it with their friends, family, and well, everyone!

3. The tools and resources available to investors today are complete game-changers. Want to buy a share of Tesla today? It’s as easy as buying a toothbrush on Amazon. We want to help our readers pick the best tools for their situation, and utilize them to their fullest? One example? Just turning on auto-investing has been proven to be highly effective in helping people grow wealth over time.

Part of The Aragon Company. Learn more at https://aragonco.com.

Name: SETUP

We kijken daarbij niet naar de komende vijf of tien jaar, maar juist naar nu en morgen: de "dagelijkse toekomst" van technologie. Hoe bepaalt bijvoorbeeld de welzijnsscore van jouw wijk hoe jij wordt behandeld? En is het niet fijn om een robot te hebben die geen taken van je overneemt, maar deze juist gezellig sámen met jou doet? Met visuele ontwerpen, installaties, performances en exposities maken we alledaagse technologische vraagstukken invoelbaar. Zo starten we een discussie over de wenselijkheid van automatisering, big data en meer, waarvoor je geen datawetenschapper hoeft te zijn om deze te volgen.

Trickshot’s mission is to bring live sports to new worlds, unlocking the massive potential of 3D data to change the way we interact with sport. 

We are building a self-service tool that enables clubs to create 3D experiences featuring the most talked about moment from the weekend’s action, and push these out to fans within minutes, to form social filters, interactive challenges or integrations with other gaming communities. 

We believe getting 3D data from matches into the hands of fans will empower them to create content unlike anything else, and generate new revenue streams for rights holders, clubs and leagues. 

Trickshot’s team has broad and varied XR experience, having developed one of the world’s first volumetric capture apps for sport, placed giant avatars of Messi doing kick-ups next to the world’s tallest building, and produced award winning 3D motion graphics for The Chemical Brothers epic world tours.

Name: Times de Luxe
Description:
Lüks dünyaya dair öncü sektörleri kapsayan bir formatla kapsamı geniş bir yayınla karşınızdayız.
Yolculuğumuz birçoğunuzun bildiği üzere Mrsagel.com ile başladı. Blog olarak başlayan heyecanımız her geçen gün daha da büyüyerek bizi kurumsal bir yapıya dönüştürdü. Bu gerçeklik ve ihtiyacın sonucu olarak dijital altyapımızı güçlendiriyoruz. Değişimi sadece dijital altyapımızı güçlendirmekle sınırlı bırakmıyoruz. Yepyeni bir yayıncılık, çağdaş habercilik ilkeleriyle kurumsal yapımızı güçlendiriyoruz. İçeriklerimizin kapsamı ve sunumuna kadar birçok alanda radikal bir dönüşüm yaşıyoruz. “dijital habercilik “ formatının sürekli çevirimiçi olmasından geldiğine inanıyoruz. Bu sayede okurlarımızla kuracağımız iletişimin “sürekliliğini” sağlamayı hedefliyoruz.

Alanında Türkiye’nin en güncel sesi olmamızın yanı sıra ele alacağımız sektörlerin sosyo historik önemini vurgulayan bir tarz geliştiriyoruz. “lüks “ün ayrıcalıklı yanının güncel kısmı kadar geçmişiyle de ele alınmasının doğru olacağı kanaatindeyiz.  Bu hedef doğrultusunda lüks markaların ilginç hikayelerle dolu geçmişlerine değineceğiz. Titiz araştırmalar ve konularla ilgili görsellerle üst segment saat ve mücevher markalarına dair zengin içerikli makaleler bulacaksınız.  Amacımız okurlarımıza markalara dönük gerçek bilgi vermek kadar bilinçli satın alma konusunda ilham vermek ve trendlerden haberdar etmektir.
Seyahat rehberliğinden, saat ve mücevher markalarının ürün tanıtımlarına, otomobil ve yat tutkusundan, jet, teknoloji, modaya dair birçok lüks alanında sizleri bilgilendireceğiz.
Keyifli zaman geçirmenizi dileriz...

-Times de Luxe ekibi-

Name: Revista Babar

Revista digital de literatura infantil y juvenil: reseñas de libros, noticias, articulos, entrevistas, premios y concursos, novedades editoriales, enlaces...

Babar es originariamente una revista impresa que nació en 1989 como una experiencia de animación a la lectura en el colegio Federico García Lorca de Arganda del Rey, de manos de Antonio Ventura y su grupo de alumnos.

Con el paso del tiempo, la revista se fue profesionalizando cada vez más, y lo que en un principio no era sino una actividad extraescolar fue difundiéndose y ampliándose hasta llegar a convertirse en lo que es hoy, un portal especializado en literatura infantil y juvenil con difusión internacional.

Premio Platero 2006 (Consejo General del Libro)
Premio Nacional de Fomento de la Lectura 2017 (Ministerio de Educación, Cultura y Deporte)

Name: BRQ Business Research Quarterly
Description:
BRQ Business Research Quarterly is the official journal of ACEDE (Spanish Academy of Management). It is a peer reviewed, Open Access journal with no Article Processing Charges which provides widespread coverage of high quality research in a broad range of topics such as human resource management, organization theory, strategic management, corporate governance, managerial economics, marketing, finance, accounting and operations management. 

BRQ is widely known for pushing authors to maximize the relevance and scientific originality of their problem statements, as well as by estimulating methodological approaches that reflect multidisciplinary, diverse and plural efforts. 

The journal’s main concern is that articles have strong theoretical foundations, meet the highest analytical standards, and provide new insights that contribute to the better understanding of managerial phenomena.

As a leading and innovative journal, BRQ is indexed by Clarivate JCR and ABS-AJG, among others.

Name: Zimmer Magazine
Description: We aim to keep the written word alive in an era where screens overrun pages and AI threatens to take over traditional crafts. In this digital age, where social media has become exhausting, where the lull of the everyday schedule leaves us with much to be desired, why not take a chance with something that is pure and timeless? Taking time out to read not only provides a break from our fast-paced lives, but is a healing form of escapism. In a time when literature is becoming increasingly distant, reduced to soundbites and fleeting trends, we're aiming to give a platform to the voices that have long been pushed to the margins. The way our society views literature - as a vast and complex tapestry of who we are - is fading, dulled by an industry that too often amplifies the familiar while overlooking the raw and unheard. In this day and age, it's becoming more and more important to seek out stories that challenge, deepen, and expand our understanding of the world. Through uplifting marginalised voices within literature, we hope to breathe life back into the literary world, restoring its power to heal and connect from a different perspective. Literature should not be about the polished, comfortable parts - more about being alive, and reflecting the full range of who we are.

Name: Cooperative Indigo
Description:
The Indigo Cooperative is a non profit organization founded in 2012 by Stéphane de Freitas, also known under his artist name, SdF. The Indigo Cooperative’s projects encourages innovation in the reflection and the creation of social link. The aim is to improve living-together in France, the cohesion of a diversity of individuals, that, beyond their social and cultural differences, cultivate a common vision of citizen values.

Indigo stems from an artistic concept resulting in the harmonious mix of blue and red, colors that naturally oppose one another in our minds. Indigo’s social network embodies the translation of this concept in the heart of everyday interactions through its projects.

Our actions respond to the following tryptic: TO THINK - TO SPEAK - TO ACT

We think together  : The Arenas
The Arenas are reflection circles aimed at developing a community of engaged individuals, eager to improve living together by brainstorming on transversal themes like education, culture, economy, urbanization....


We speak together : Eloquentia
Since 2012, the Indigo Cooperative has developed the “Eloquentia" program, aimed at improving students’ public speaking by implementing a debate culture in high schools and universities. This program has been recognized as public interest.
We want to build up the young generation’s self-confidence through public speaking, regardless of their socio-cultural origins.

We act together : Indigo
Indigo is a social network of mutual help that aspires to mend the social link and revolutionize the access to goods and services thanks to the creation of a complementary currency, “the currency of generosity”. Users can therefore exchange all objects or services they need, for free, thanks to the Digo. The application also enables non profits to recruit volunteers for their actions. 

Website : indigo.world
Facebook : Indigo World

Name: Climate Journal
Description:
The Biggest Story of our Time: Climate Change |

Climate coverage needs to evolve to rise to the challenge of shaping the climate narrative.

Journalism has a massive role in providing credible, engaging and thought-provoking content to help people better understand current climate affairs while highlighting risks and rewards linked to climate action or inaction in all walks of life, from policy to business and everyday choices.

We are dedicated to expanding the climate frontier by uncovering climate stories that matter and providing readers with reliable, trustworthy, and diverse information.

Our focus is to provide credible, authentic and independent climate coverage, adopting a climate solutionist journalism approach that presents opportunities besides challenges and threats.

The Climate Journal is empowered by the Irish social enterprise Purpose Content Studio, which is on a mission to change the climate narrative and upskill the next generation of journalists and communication professionals to get actively involved with climate communication.

We created the Future Feature Program to support aspiring storytellers to make change happen by using their skills for good.

Name: Paradigm Shift
Description:
Did you ever think about submitting those research papers you wrote in university and becoming a published author? Ever thought of publishing articles on topics that resonate with you? Welcome to Paradigm Shift – a global politics publication & academic hub for students, graduates, & aspiring writers. That means we aim to provide the global youth with a platform where they can conduct meaningful research, as well as publish their work to showcase their writing proficiency.

Paradigm Shift’s content type primarily focuses on articles and research papers. The subject matter of our content revolves around international relations, global politics, current affairs, and Pakistan. In other words, published pieces could range from the civil war in Libya to rising tensions between Pakistan and India; from the trade war between China and America to the illegal Israeli settlements in Palestine; from the One Belt One Road initiative to the rise of the political right in Europe. If your work falls within our purview and passes the editorial review, we would be honored to publish your submissions!

Name: Cooperative Indigo
Description:
The Indigo Cooperative is a non profit organization founded in 2012 by Stéphane de Freitas, also known under his artist name, SdF. The Indigo Cooperative’s projects encourages innovation in the reflection and the creation of social link. The aim is to improve living-together in France, the cohesion of a diversity of individuals, that, beyond their social and cultural differences, cultivate a common vision of citizen values.

Indigo stems from an artistic concept resulting in the harmonious mix of blue and red, colors that naturally oppose one another in our minds. Indigo’s social network embodies the translation of this concept in the heart of everyday interactions through its projects.

Our actions respond to the following tryptic: TO THINK - TO SPEAK - TO ACT

We think together  : The Arenas
The Arenas are reflection circles aimed at developing a community of engaged individuals, eager to improve living together by brainstorming on transversal themes like education, culture, economy, urbanization....


We speak together : Eloquentia
Since 2012, the Indigo Cooperative has developed the “Eloquentia" program, aimed at improving students’ public speaking by implementing a debate culture in high schools and universities. This program has been recognized as public interest.
We want to build up the young generation’s self-confidence through public speaking, regardless of their socio-cultural origins.

We act together : Indigo
Indigo is a social network of mutual help that aspires to mend the social link and revolutionize the access to goods and services thanks to the creation of a complementary currency, “the currency of generosity”. Users can therefore exchange all objects or services they need, for free, thanks to the Digo. The application also enables non profits to recruit volunteers for their actions. 

Website : indigo.world
Facebook : Indigo World
Twitter : @Indigocommunity

Contact : contact@lacooperativeindigo.fr

Name: Vivacidade Internet e Comunicação Ltda.
Description: A idéia do VIVAcidade surgiu em 1999 em Sorocaba, SP, onde foi desenvolvida por dois estudantes universitários. Em 2001, começa a programação simples em html. Em 2002, o protótipo original e inédito é registrado no INPI (Instituto Nacional da Propriedade Industrial) em São Paulo como software de cidade. Em 2003, o VIVAcidade contrata uma empresa de São Paulo para fazer a programação e um novo design. No mesmo ano, adquire junto à FAPESP o domínio "ponto com ponto br". Em 2004, o VIVAcidade entra no ar provisoriamente. No mesmo ano, é registrado o domínio internacional "ponto com". Em 2005, após estudos sobre legislação e novas tecnologias, entra no ar oficialmente o site VIVAcidade. Em dezembro de 2005, é registrado o Estatuto da sociedade empresária denominada "VIVACIDADE INTERNET E COMUNICAÇÃO LTDA." na Junta Comercial do Estado de São Paulo. No final de janeiro de 2006, é adquirido o CNPJ junto à Receita Federal. A Inscrição Estadual como Serviço de Telecomunicação foi adquirida no início de maio de 2006. Em 19.12.2006, o INPI publica na Revista da Propriedade Industrial (RPI) número 1876 o deferimento judicial para a expedição do Certificado de Patente referente ao processo 05015-3 cujo título é VIVACIDADE. Em 09 de maio de 2007, o VIVAcidade foi objeto de reportagem do Jornal Bom Dia de Sorocaba. Em 14 de maio de 2007, o VIVAcidade recebe Votos de Congratulações da Câmara Municipal de Sorocaba “por divulgar o município pelos quatro cantos do mundo através da internet”. Em 2008, o site VIVAcidade é indicado ao Prêmio iBest 2008 na categoria Cidadania, sub-categoria Serviços ao Cidadão. Ainda em 2008, o VIVAcidade tem seu conteúdo noticioso e informativo divulgado também através do Google Notícias. Constantemente, novas idéias e soluções inovadoras vão sendo incorporadas ao site e divulgadas em sua área de textos e notícias.

Name: The Legal Affair
Description:
The legal system in India has seen decades of changes brought about by new regimes and the needs of the country’s populous. Knowledge and information about the country’s laws, however, remain shrouded in mystery, and often imperceivable more than inaccessible to the people of the country at large. 

For centuries societies have devised laws to ensure equal treatment, fair trade and generate new opportunities for the growth of the community and the country’s commerce. In fact, many societal concepts of modern justice stem from ancient laws of the Roman civilization. These laws exist and continuously evolve so that people can be driven to social, commercial, and economic welfare within the comfort of a flourishing, profitable and safe societal structure.

In a country of so many deep-rooted cultures, social practices, and belief systems, it can be tricky to decide the absolutes of justice. The intellectuals of the country, however, the policy makers and builders of the society, remain ever so keen on exploring the nuanced promises of a rapidly advancing technology driven world, deeming in their pursuits the lawful and progressive from the unlawful and disruptive. 

A layperson’s reaction to anything related to law is an impulsive worry over tedious court proceedings, the exhaustive back and forth of legal formalities and the hefty legal fee, certain to pile up irrespective of a favourable outcome. 

The Legal Affair is our mission to alleviate people of such fears and arm them with swords and shields of information in their quests for justice.

- We have over 20,000 followers across our social media channels.
- Our social media content reaches an average of 1 million impressions each month.

Look Good, Feel Good, Work Hard, Play Hard.

Name: Seminare
Description:
Seminare is a video-streaming platform, hosting academic seminars, research talks and symposia from the world’s leading conferences.

We have seen in the last two decades the advent of open online repositories like arXiv and the benefit it serves in disseminating scientific research outputs to a wider public already at an early stage. The next big step in this line is Seminare. It is a video streaming, hosting, and archival platform that aims to bring together more than 100 million academic talks and seminars that are conducted every year around the world. 

Seminare support research talks on all possible disciplines including Science, Law, Arts, Languages, Social Science, Theology, History, Humanities and Health. 

Also, Seminare will give a wider community easy access to these conference talks, thus progressing research at a faster pace. Here you can submit and archive your previously published work or upcoming conference talks in video format to expand its reach.

As a researcher you can simply login to https://www.seminare.in and upload you recent or old publication. Seminare team will advertise these talks and help you increasing the outreach of your research and thus the citations. 

Any query write us at info@seminare.in

Name: Emotional Intelligence Magazine +

In addition to our in-house articles and resources, we aggregate EI content from across the web, so you no longer have to put in the effort of sifting through mountains of data. 

Additionally, we advocate for those who specialize in helping others develop their awareness, emotional intelligence, relationships, and foster a healthy environment for individuals and businesses to thrive. We couldn't help but notice an absence of resources that work to connect individuals with emotional intelligence specialists, practitioners, and coaches to help foster personal growth and development. 

At EIM+, you will find resources ranging from original articles by our talented contributors, aggregated content from trusted sites, easy access to a team of emotional intelligence focused professionals, and a host of EI-related events.

We're grateful to have you join us!

Name: ЛУН
Description:
ЛУН (LUN) - українська продуктова компанія. Розробляємо PropTech платформи, які допомагають людям комфортно обирати житло онлайн. Робимо інновації в сфері нерухомості з 2008 року.

Нашими продуктами для оренди і покупки житла користуються люди в Україні, країнах Європи та Азії.

 КОМАНДА
Над продуктами ЛУН працює більше 100 лун-мейтів в Україні та світі.
Кожен продукт розвиває окрема крос-функціональна команда. В залежності від продукту команда може включати в себе такі ролі: продакт менеджери, розробники, аналітики, дизайнери, SEO, PPС, спеціалісти по роботі з клієнтами, контент менеджери.
Також в ЛУН є команди AI, Маркетингу, HR, Legal&Accountant, які тісно співпрацюють з продуктовими.

Приєднуйся до нас: team.lun.ua

ІНЖЕНЕРНЕ КОМ`ЮНІТІ
Наразі в компанії працюють Backend, Frontend та Machine Learning інженери. Розвиваємо внутрішнє міжкомандне dev-community, щоб ділитися цікавими кейсами, підходами та досвідом.

Ми не прив’язуємось до конкретного стеку, тому що він модний, або тому що ми так робили раніше. Команда сама обирає які технології використовувати. Ми відкриті до експериментів, обираємо інструменти, які будуть найкраще вирішувати певні завдання.

ОФІС ТА ФОРМАТ РОБОТИ
Лун-мейти обирають формат роботи за бажанням — remote, офіс або мікс.
Офіс знаходиться у Києві у районі ВДНГ. В офісі регулярно збираємось на friday lounge, щоб відпочити, поспілкуватись або провести благодійний аукціон на підтримку ЗСУ.

 ПРОДУКТИ
ЛУН — платформа для вибору житла в Україні

Bird — iOS додаток для зручного пошуку квартир в оренду у Києві та Львові.

Korter — онлайн-маркетплейс для вибору житла в новобудовах у країнах Європи та Азії.

Рієлтор — сервіс для розміщення житла в оренду та продаж в Україні.

ЛУН Місто — соціальний проєкт, який виріс у громадську організацію. Співпрацюємо з міськими радами, урбаністами, дослідниками по всій Україні для покращення якості життя у великих містах.
Розвиваємо власну мережу станцій аналізу якості повітря.

Description:

* Google Analytics data 2020 with known bot traffic removed

Drovid is a Chilean science and technology-based company (DeepTech) that has developed a pioneering solution (Vertical SaaS) through a multi-user SaaS platform that integrates a new methodology, combined with artificial intelligence and autonomous drones, with the aim of transforming forest management towards a proactive and preventive approach. 

MISSION
Our mission is to transform global forest protection, to care for the environment, save lives, and ensure a sustainable future for humanity. Through advanced surveillance with artificial intelligence, we prevent fires and deforestation at their source, mitigating economic and environmental impacts. In this way, we empower our customers to optimize their resources, forging a legacy of planetary resilience.

VISION
We envision a planet where forests not only survive, but thrive. Our vision is to be the global catalyst that transforms forest protection, eradicating human-caused fires and illegal deforestation. We are driving a future so resilient that, as in the most optimistic scenarios, the Earth will be massively reforested, ensuring life and a sustainable legacy for generations to come.

Name: HBCU Lifestyle
Description:
Not Just an HBCU Platform, Your Career Champions!
We serve as the springboard for thousands of HBCU students and alumni to reach their highest aspirations. Did you know that 80% of black judges and 50% of black lawyers are HBCU alumni? Now, that's the power of an HBCU education!

 Igniting the Flame of Equality
Our passion? Leveling the playing field. Our cause? Making your dreams a part of the fabric of society. With HBCUs making up just 3% of colleges but producing 27% of African-American graduates with STEM degrees, isn't it time we celebrated the impact of HBCU education?

 The Perfect Match: HBCU Talent Meets Industry Giants
We're the ultimate matchmakers, linking HBCU talents with the giants of the corporate world. Not just jobs, but dream careers that make a difference. Like the 40% of African-American engineers who come from HBCUs, we're committed to building bridges to opportunities.

 Bridging the Gap from Classrooms to Boardrooms
We are the bridge uniting HBCU classrooms with global powerhouses. Did you know that HBCUs have produced 40% of the African-American members of Congress and 12.5% of CEOs? Let's put more HBCU talent at the top!

 Advocates of Diversity and Equal Opportunities
We're about making a difference. We challenge norms, open doors, and smash glass ceilings. With HBCU graduates comprising over 50% of black public school teachers, isn't it time we redefined what success looks like?
 
Join Our Journey
Whether you're an HBCU student, an ambitious graduate, or an employer valuing diversity, there's a spot for you at HBCU Lifestyle. Together, let's shift paradigms and paint a new picture of success.

 Dive into the World of Opportunities with HBCU Lifestyle
Join us on this transformative journey as we open gateways to diversity, inclusivity, and limitless opportunities. Ready to start? Visit our website and sign up for our newsletter to keep up with the latest career trends, job openings, and alumni success stories.
