Name: PopMatters
Description:
PopMatters is an international magazine of cultural criticism and analysis, which has been independently owned and operated since its inception. Our scope is broadly cast on all things pop culture and we are the largest site that bridges academic and popular writing in the world. We provide intelligent reviews, engaging interviews, and in-depth essays on most cultural topics in areas such as music, television, films, books, video games, sports, theatre, the visual arts, travel, and the Internet. Since 1999, PopMatters has been providing smart readers with sharp, entertaining writing on a wide range of topics in pop culture, offering a refuge from the usual hype and gossip. 

PopMatters cultivates smart writers from the world-at-large. Our staff ranges from the multiple-degreed and/or well traveled, to young writers of high caliber, to ‘seasoned’ folks who punch the 9-5 clock, regardless of what type of degree, if any, they may hold. PopMatters recognizes that creative, compassionate intellectuals reside in all levels of society, in all types of societies, and we value their ability to provide intelligent, entertaining cultural criticism in the form of thoughtful, magazine-style essays. Many of our writers are called upon for their opinion by notable members of the media such as the BBC, NPR, MSNBC, Radio Australia, and VH1. Publications such as USA Today.com, Alternet.org, and Imdb.com regularly pick up links to PopMatters articles and post quotes from PopMatters writers.  Our articles are also indexed by all English language Google News sites and by NewsNow in the UK. 

Naturally, this value for our staff and our content extends to great respect for our readers, who also hail from many parts of the world, are inquisitive and savvy, and bring many experiences and expectations to this magazine. Our intent is to reach the broadest possible audience with intelligent and thought-provoking writing that is often not readily available within the mainstream mass media.

Name: Design Cocktails
Description:
Design Cocktails, dünyadaki her şeyin tasarım perspektifiyle ele alındığı eğlenceli ve bilgilendirici bir podcast kanalıdır. İçerikleri, tasarımın her alanına, sanattan teknolojiye, moda trendlerinden mimariye kadar geniş bir yelpazede odaklanmaktadır. Her bölümde, bir tasarım uzmanı veya sektör profesyoneliyle yapılan keyifli söyleşiler ve interaktif tartışmalar yer almaktadır.

Hostlarımız, dinleyicileri benzersiz bir yolculuğa çıkarırken, ilham verici hikayeler, yenilikçi fikirler ve trendleri paylaşarak tasarım dünyasını aydınlatırlar. Design Cocktails, yaratıcılığı teşvik eden, sıra dışı fikirlerin paylaşıldığı ve tasarımın gücünü keşfetmek için bir araya gelinen bir platformdur.

Her bölüm, bir "kokteyl" gibi özenle hazırlanır. İçeriklerimizde, farklı disiplinlerin birleştiği bir karışım sunarız. Sanat, bilim, psikoloji, pop kültür ve daha fazlası, tasarımın çeşitli bileşenlerini oluşturan birer malzeme olarak kullanılır. Bu heyecan verici kombinasyon, dinleyicilere eşsiz bir deneyim sunar ve onları düşünmeye, ilham almaya ve yeni perspektifler keşfetmeye teşvik eder.

Design Cocktails, tasarım tutkunları, profesyoneller ve meraklıları için vazgeçilmez bir kaynak olmayı hedefler. Sizleri, her bölümde keyifli bir içecekle donatıp, tasarımın büyülü dünyasında birlikte gezintiye çıkmaya davet ediyoruz. İyi bir kokteyl yapmanın yanı sıra, tasarıma dair bir içgörü kazanmanın tadını çıkarın ve Design Cocktails ailesinin bir parçası olun!

Naszym znakiem rozpoznawczym jest szybkość działania i wiarygodność. Jako jedni z pierwszych publikujemy najnowsze informacje z rynku zdrowia – od zmian prawnych i finansowania po wdrożenia rozwiązań technologicznych w szpitalach i gabinetach. Szczególną uwagę poświęcamy zagadnieniom związanym z polityką zdrowotną, śledząc jej wpływ na system, pacjentów i sektor innowacji. Tworzymy treści oparte na faktach, danych i eksperckich źródłach, a nasze analizy trafiają do decydentów, lekarzy, przedsiębiorców i mediów branżowych.

Skupiamy się na tym, co naprawdę ważne: konkretach, liczbach, rozwiązaniach. Dzięki temu budujemy społeczność świadomych i wymagających odbiorców – od specjalistów ochrony zdrowia po liderów innowacji.

Jeśli szukasz rzetelnych informacji o zdrowiu, technologii i systemie – jesteś we właściwym miejscu. A jeśli chcesz współtworzyć z nami treści lub zrealizować wspólny projekt – zapraszamy do kontaktu.

Name: Digital Art Fair
Description:
Digital Art Fair is a leading annual art fair in the world of the digital art era, showcasing some of the most innovative and exciting digital art and NFTs from around the globe. The fair provides a platform for emerging and established artists to exhibit their work, and for art enthusiasts and collectors to discover and acquire new pieces.
Since its inception in 2021, Digital Art Fair has grown in both size and reputation, attracting thousands of visitors each year. In 2023, the fair will take place from Oct 17th to 22th in Hong Kong, and promises to be the biggest and most diverse yet.
The fair features a wide range of digital art and NFTs, including video installations, interactive pieces, augmented reality experiences, and much more. It also offers a program of talks and panel discussions, led by experts in the field, on topics such as the future of digital art, the role of technology in the art world, and the intersection of art and science.
Digital Art Fair is committed to promoting diversity and inclusivity in the art world, and actively seeks out artists from underrepresented groups to participate in the fair. It also supports emerging artists through its New Talent program, which provides a platform for artists who are in the early stages of their careers.
In addition to its annual fair, Digital Art Fair also offers online exhibitions in the metaverse with our partners and collector’s club events throughout the year, making it accessible to a global audience.
With its cutting-edge approach to art and technology, its commitment to diversity and inclusivity, and its track record of success, Digital Art Fair is a must-see event for anyone interested in contemporary art.

Name: NFThing
Description:
The age of stalking your audience is over.

For more than a decade, brands have been sold “data-driven.”
But what they’ve really been sold is digital surveillance — tracking clicks, inferring intent, stalking behaviour.
The result? Bloated budgets, fake certainty, decreasing brand image and a widening gap between what brands think people want and what they actually do.

That system is collapsing.
Cookies are gone. Privacy laws are tightening. Users are angry.
And AI will only make bad data multiply faster.

NFThing is the new way to understand people.

A platform that connects you directly with verified, human participants across the full brand journey —
from idea → product → story → sale.

+ Validate ideas before you spend. Ask real people what they actually want.
+ Test creative, packaging, or pricing with micro-surveys and feedback loops.
+ Run ads that are 100 % viewable, 100 % completed, and 100 % chosen.
+ Retarget intelligently based on consented answers, not creepy tracking.
+ Close the loop with post-purchase feedback to learn, adapt, and improve.

Ethical data collection is inevitable and it's much more efficient for brands.

Why brands are switching:

+ Cheaper: no wasted impressions, no bots, no bad guesses.
+ Smarter: every interaction produces insight, not noise.
+ Faster: feedback loops when trends are changing rapidly 
+ Future-proof: fully compliant with the next decade of privacy regulation.
+ Human: you don’t extract attention — you earn it.

NFThing turns every campaign, survey, and experiment into a single continuous conversation with your audience.

Description:
Streetsblog USA is a daily news site founded in 2006 that covers the movement to end car dependence in the United States, and to facilitate a just transition to a transportation system where everyone has meaningful access to mobility alternatives that meet their unique needs. 

Through hard-hitting reporting and insightful commentary, we make complex conversations about transportation reform accessible, emotional, and urgent. Our goal is to empower our readers with the perspective, inspiration, and resources they need to dismantle the structural forces that result in car dominance, both at the level of policy and in our culture more broadly. 

We reach millions of readers every year, including everyday people who just want more choices about how to get around, Beltway decision makers, built environment professionals, activists for safe, sustainable, and antiracist cities, and many more. 

Streetsblog USA is produced by OpenPlans, a 501c3 non-profit organization headquartered in New York City. We are funded by foundation grants, sponsorships and advertising, and generous donations from readers like you.

Visit our regional partner sites — Streetsblog New York City, Los Angeles, San Francisco, California, and Chicago — for in-depth reporting on the movement to end car dependence in those communities. Our colleagues at Streetfilms produce video content on topics related to the Streetsblog mission in communities around the world.

Name: HOPR Association
Description:
HOPR provides the tools and framework for the Web3 ecosystem, ensuring everyone has control of their privacy, data, and identity as they navigate online. The HOPR protocol introduces the first-ever open incentivized mixnet, where anyone can earn tokens for staking and running nodes. Dr. Sebastian Bürgel, who helped draft the DLT (Distributed Ledger Technology) Law in Switzerland, leads a diverse HOPR team which includes award-winning blockchain hackers and Silicon Valley tech veterans. 

HOPR combines the association as a proven legal entity in Swiss jurisdiction with the tenets of a Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAO) which results in a Decentralized Community-Enabling Governance (decenGov). The services and next generation technology of HOPR are made possible by a grant through the non-profit HOPR Association. HOPR has its main office in Zurich, Switzerland.

All code is free and open source today: github.com/hoprnet

Leading custody providers, wallets, and applications are integrating with the NEAR network. Above 1M accounts have been created, 100+ Guilds & DAOs, and more than 83k community members are contributing.

Near offers developers a holistic, well-rounded EVM that executes code in practically every language within the Wasm. Aurora equally provides tools such as SDKs and APIs to give developers the ability to accelerate the creation of their solutions with incredible ease.

NEAR also boasts an unparalleled user experience. Its user-friendly UI design allows you to navigate its website and protocol effortlessly. It is also the first blockchain to feature human-readable account names, thus eliminating the ambiguity that has always surrounded the old nomenclature.

Finally, NEAR offers great opportunities for you to start building on its blockchain. The foundation provides grants all year round (to date, 108 million USD has been distributed). NEAR has also partnered with the Open Web Collective, the biggest startup accelerator in the blockchain space, to offer creators a highway to transition seamlessly to its protocol.

Name: TeknolojiWins
Description:
Teknolojinin hafızası TeknolojiWins ile sizleri yarınlara hazırlamak için yola çıktık! 
İnternet dünyasını tamamen değiştirmeye hazırlanan Web 3.0 dünyasına hazırlık yapmak için günceli haber ve teknoloji gündemini yakından takip etmek çok önemli. “Teknolojinin hafızası olmak” hedefiyle hayata geçen TeknolojiWins; yeni teknolojileri, sektörün öncü şirketleri, güvenlik, yatırım ve girişim dünyası, metaverse evreni, blockchain, teknoloji destekli dijital dönüşüm, etkinlikler, araştırma sonuçları ve güncel teknolojik gelişmeleri sizlerle buluşturuyor. 

Dünya çapında bir devrimin eşiğindeyiz
Bu devrime süper hızlı 5G veri hızları, açık veri formatları ve yazılımları, yapay zekâ (AI) ve makine öğreniminin (ML) artan ve genişleyen yetenekleri ve blockchain teknolojisindeki hızlı ilerlemeler yardımcı olacak. Üçüncü nesil internet hizmetleri ve web’in evrimindeki bir sonraki aşama olan Web 3.0 dünyasına ve getireceği değişime çok uzak değiliz. 

Web 3.0 yolda ve çok sayıda fırsatları beraberinde getirecek 
Web’in yeniden tasarımı yani Web 3.0, çalışma ve iş birliği yapma şeklimizi değiştirecek. Dinamik bir akıllı ağa dönüşüm ve değişen altyapı, veri açısından zengin bir uzamsal web ve küresel bağlanmışlık doğuracak. Bu uzamsal ağ, sanal ve gerçek dünya arasındaki çizgileri bulanıklaştıracak dijital bilgilere sahip olacak. 

Web 3.0’ın merkezinde blockchain teknolojileri yer alacak
Blockchain güçlendikçe ve dokunduğu çoğu şeydeki verimsizlikleri ortadan kaldırdıkça Web 3.0, dünya çapında ağı daha önce hayal edilemeyen bir verimlilik seviyesine taşıyacak yenilikçi teknolojilerin buluşmasına tanık olacak. 

Yeni pazarlar, yeni iş modelleri ve bir dizi başka fırsatın ortaya çıkmaya hazırlandığı yakın geleceğe TeknolojiWins ile hazırlanmak isterseniz; haberlerimizi kaçırmamanızı, sosyal medya hesaplarımızı takip etmenizi ve e-posta listemize katılmanızı öneririz.

    You have subscribed to many ESG data providers, but:

Name: Nonprofit Sector News
Description:
Nonprofit Sector News covers all types of nonprofits, ranging from charities and foundations to labor unions and trade organizations, nationwide, with news, features, and investigative reporting. NSN's audience is the general public (and other journalists). NSN is not a trade publication for nonprofit employees, board members and major donors, unlike Chronicle of Philanthropy, Nonprofit Times, Nonprofit Quarterly, Nonprofit Pro, etc. NSN is the only regular news source for everyone about nonprofit organizations. NSN, a Pennsylvania nonprofit corporation, is tax-exempt under IRS Code Section 501(c)(3) as of 4/4/2020.

Nonprofit Sector News has six primary functions:
1) Nonprofit Sector News (NSN) covers news, feature, and investigative stories about all types of US nonprofits for the general public and other news media (not for nonprofits' employees, board members, major donors), including Patch.com.
2) NSN provides its original journalism free of charge to the general public through its website, LinkedIn page, Facebook page, and Twitter account.
3) NSN, which specializes in covering large nonprofits that are found in and/or affect every community, provides its original journalism free of charge to other news media on all platforms.
4) NSN helps to publicize US nonprofit organizations by increasing the amount of, quality of, and availability of original journalism about them.
5) NSN trains college journalism students in how to cover nonprofit organizations through an internship program that runs fall, spring, and summer semesters.
6) NSN curates a continuous selection of other news media’s coverage of nonprofit organizations, posting that content in its LinkedIn and Facebook pages, plus some of that content in its website’s Blog section.

Visit us at: http://nonprofitsectornews.org
Start following NSN today!

Thank you,
Dane S. Claussen, Editor-in-Chief & Executive Director (CEO)
Matt Stroud, Interim Publisher & General Manager (COO)
editor@nonprofitsectornews.org

Uma CNH vencida. Uma multa não identificada. Um condutor suspenso no volante. Tudo isso pode parecer detalhe — até o momento em que custa caro: em multas, em processos e, muitas vezes, na reputação da empresa.

A Beemôn nasceu para resolver esse tipo de problema antes que ele chegue. Através da plataforma Bee2Go, oferecemos uma gestão automatizada de CNHs e multas para empresas que operam com frota própria, veículos locados ou terceirizados.
Nossa solução permite que o gestor visualize em tempo real a situação de cada condutor, identifique riscos documentais e elimine o trabalho manual, que costuma consumir tempo, gerar falhas e expor o negócio.

Com a Bee2Go, você pode:
•	Validar CNHs automaticamente, com dados atualizados em nível federal
•	Ser alertado sobre vencimentos, suspensões e pontuação crítica
•	Consultar multas em tempo real, com integração ao SNE (com direito a até 40% de desconto)
•	Monitorar todo o histórico da frota em um painel inteligente, simples e acessível

Tudo isso sem planilhas, sem e-mails desencontrados e sem surpresas jurídicas.

Para quem lida com o dia a dia da operação, sabe que esses detalhes fazem a diferença entre uma frota eficiente e um prejuízo iminente.

Mais do que digitalizar tarefas, a Bee2Go entrega tranquilidade operacional para quem está à frente das decisões — e não pode mais perder tempo com o que poderia estar resolvido.

Frotas que rodam bem são aquelas que são geridas com visão, não com improviso.

Bee2Go. A gestão que antecipa riscos e protege a sua operação.

Name: R3PL1C4
Description:
We believe in the transformative power of robotics and artificial intelligence. We desire to share stories that inspire, educate, and challenge conventional thinking in these emerging technologies.

The name 'R3PL1C4' is a unique title rooted in the need to distinguish the project called 'Replica.' The name incorporates the binary number 1 =  I, representing one of the most crucial elements in artificial intelligence.

The number 4 = A is based on four fundamental principles around AI and its impact on society: bias evaluation, explainability, human augmentation, and reproducibility. Its author's main objective is to bring awareness and educate readers about technological advancements in AI.

The science fiction writer, Isaac Asimov's Three Laws of Robotics, represents the number 3 = E in the name of this project. These laws are guidelines for ethical behavior when designing robots or AI systems.

If followed correctly, these laws should prevent any harm to humans from machines. For example, the first law states that a robot may not injure a human being or, through inaction, allow a human being to come to harm.

Seit über 30 Jahren sind wir Ihr kompetenter Partner für zukunftsorientierte und wirtschaftliche Systemkonzepte im Bereich Zutrittsmanagment und Check-in Automation.

Was sind unsere Alleinstellungsmerkmale?
1. Modulares Systemkonzept
2. Kundenbetreuung durch ein Ansprechpartner
3. Unterstützung von Drittanbieter rund um unsere Systeme

Was können wir bei Key&Card AG besonders gut?
Zuverlässige & wirtschaftliche all-in-one Check-in Lösungen.

Welche Vorteile bieten Ihnen unsere Produkte und Dienstleistungen?
1. Effizienz: Check-in Automatisierung ersetzt manuelle Prozesse und optimiert Abläufe.
2. Kostensenkung: Weniger Verwaltungsaufwand dank digitaler Check-in Systeme.
3. Umsatzsteigerung: Bessere Abläufe erhöhen die Zimmerauslastung.

> So hat Ihr Team mehr Zeit für die persönliche Betreuung Ihrer Gäste.

Von welchen Lösungen profitieren Sie bei uns?
Auf die Bedürfnisse deines Unternehmens kannst du bei uns ein maßgeschneidertes Check-in- System zusammenstellen. Der Preis für Ihr Check-in System setzt sich entsprechend unserem Angebot komplett modular zusammen.

Für wen sind unsere Produkte und Dienstleistungen geeignet?
Dank dem Modularen Systemkonzept sind unsere Produkte sowohl für Hotels, Motels und Serviced Apartments geeignet, sowie auch für Schulen und öffentliche Betriebe.

Mit welchen PMS und mit welchen Zahlungsanbietern sind unsere Produkte kompatibel?
Aktuelle Informationen auf https://www.check24-7.in

Mit welchen Türschloss-Herstellern funktionieren unsere Check-in Terminals?
Mit allen gängigen RFID Keycard Systemen, weitere Informationen auf https://www.key-card.com

We’re building a new kind of export infrastructure: export factories that load, document, and move containers with the speed and predictability ocean networks require. As these facilities scale, they become a release valve for ports and steamship lines—improving container utilization, reducing friction, and increasing throughput across trade lanes.

Our mission is straightforward: build the AI platform that helps make the U.S. a dominant global exporter.

TimberEye operates at the intersection of physical execution and software—combining logistics, documentation, and workflow automation into a single system designed for transparency and repeatability.

Name: 07ZR.com
Description:
Fondée en 2007 par deux spécialistes chevronnés de l'automobile, 07ZR avait pour objectif d'offrir la possibilité à de petits commerçants d'avoir des produits auxquels ils n'avaient pas accès auparavant, et ce, à des prix très compétitifs. Après avoir bouleversé la distribution traditionnelle, 07ZR a su s’intégrer et être acceptée dans l’univers de la distribution automobile avec son offre innovante, en alliant produits, services et prix. En 10 ans, 07ZR est devenue le leader Européen du marché des plateformes B2B. Ce succès est le fruit d’une mise en commun des savoir-faire exceptionnels, de nos ressources humaines et de notre expérience de plus de 30 ans dans le secteur de l'automobile. 

En 2017, 07ZR a évolué, passant alors de la plateforme d'achat pour les professionnels du pneu, à la plateforme d'achat pour les professionnels de l'automobile, en proposant non seulement des produits dans le pneumatique, mais également des lubrifiants, des batteries, des jantes, des chaînes, et surtout des pièces détachées avec la première marketplace de pièces auto en France.

Aujourd’hui la place de marché pièces détachées occupe une position de leader en Europe avec + de 3 millions de références, 81 millions de pièces stockées et + de 700 marques équipementiers et constructeurs.

07ZR est devenue sans conteste, la première place de marché automobile à proposer un si large choix de produits et de services et le « one-stop-shopping » des ateliers de réparation automobile européens.

Name: Mastering Azure Virtual Desktop 2nd Edition
Description:
Azure Virtual Desktop is a cloud desktop virtualization platform that securely delivers virtual desktops and remote apps. Mastering Azure Virtual Desktop will guide you through designing, implementing, configuring, and maintaining an Azure Virtual Desktop environment effectively. This book can also be used as an exam preparation guide to help you sit the Microsoft AZ-140 exam.

You'll start with an introduction to the essentials of Azure Virtual Desktop. Next, you'll get to grips with planning an Azure Virtual Desktop architecture before learning how to implement an Azure Virtual Desktop environment. Moving ahead, you'll learn how to manage and control access as well as configure security controls on your Azure Virtual Desktop environment. As you progress, you'll understand how to manage user environments and configure MSIX app attach and other Azure Virtual Desktop features to enhance the user experience. You'll also learn about the Azure Active Directory (AD) join and getting started feature. Finally, you'll discover how to monitor and maintain an Azure Virtual Desktop environment to help you support your users and diagnose issues when they occur.

By the end of this Microsoft Azure book, you'll have covered all the essential topics you need to know to design and manage Azure Virtual Desktop and prepare for the AZ-140 exam.

Name: Knowledge Futures
Description:
Knowledge Futures builds public digital infrastructure that enables communities to publish documents and data more effectively.

Knowledge Futures is an independent nonprofit organization powered by academic, industry, and advocacy groups. Together we build and support products and protocols to make knowledge open and accessible to all. Founded in 2018 as a partnership between the MIT Press and the MIT Media Lab, Knowledge Futures was created to build sustainable tools and technologies for libraries, presses, museums, activist organizations, researchers, and others whose knowledge work seeks to serve collective understanding and the public. What began as a handful of grad students working on publishing tools grew to an organization focused on addressing the systemic challenges faced by public-oriented groups beholden to infrastructure that is designed with misaligned incentives and unjust power dynamics.

In September 2019 we formally organized as an independent 501c3 nonprofit. Today, we are committed to building a full-stack of technology protocols and products that demonstrate an effective, equitable, and sustainable knowledge economy is possible. We work with partners to design for interoperability and to catalyze a distributed ecosystem of development.

Name: WindowSight
Description:
It’s 2017. Terrassa, Barcelona. Joan, Pol and Oriol are having a lil’ talk:
Ah! That gallery exhibition was super. If only we could enjoy something like it every time we wanted to. Art and photography…

Yes, to create an ever-changing exhibition, easy to access, in any TV screen. Imagine how much that would add up to the walls! And a new source of income for the artists, right?!

It would be amazing had there been an app for everyone to be able to create their own ambience at their space and experience it with family and friends! Like, let’s say, the “Spotify of art”!


After that conversation the trio had just conceived WindowSight’s concept; An art streaming platform, that will eventually become the #1 reference for art consumption.

What started as a test has now become a powerful mission pursued by aspiring WindowSighters; to make art as accessible as music and movies are in every household or business, provide the best aesthetic journey and support the artists.

Our “pocket-sized” gem; 
An app in your phone that holds a wealth of unique artworks and photographs, with the   artists reflecting their stories, knowledge and experiences through their nuances. 

 Then an app in your TV to host this content, to magnify the message and detail every piece of artwork resonates. (Safe to say your TV will not be the same again!)

Whether you are at home or in the office while you’re reading this, have a look around you. Do you see a dull wall somewhere there? Or a TV which looks more like a black square rather than a digital canvas that will add up to the whole ambience and decor? It’s up to you to make it a source of inspiration, motivation and attractiveness. 

You know where to find us and we will be more than happy to welcome you! 

https://windowsight.com/contact/

Name: Présage
Description:
L’ensemble de la planète connait un vieillissement de la population humaine. L’avance en âge est caractérisée par plusieurs phénomènes dont la fréquence et le retentissement croissent avec l’âge : fréquence des maladies chroniques, concomitance de ces maladies chez les mêmes individus (polypathologie), dépendance fonctionnelle et besoin d’aide dans les actes de la vie quotidienne, recours à l’hospitalisation et au placement en institution gériatrique. 

Nous sommes convaincus que la médecine personnalisée, prédictive grâce à l'intelligence artificielle, va améliorer durablement la situation des personnes âgées à domicile ou en établissement.  

PRESAGE développe le 1er dispositif médical qui prédit à 7 jours le risque d’hospitalisation en urgence d’une personne âgée vivant à domicile. 

Issue de 4 années de recherche clinique impliquant l’Agence nationale de la performance en santé (ANAP), 2 ARS, l’AP-HP et la CNAV, ce dispositif à destination des professionnels de santé, est le premier dispositif médical basé sur l’intelligence artificielle pour anticiper les hospitalisations en urgence.
 
PRESAGE est composé d’une dizaine de salariés et d’un conseil scientifique regroupant professeurs de médecine, experts en e-santé et chercheurs en data science. 

Ses clients sont d’une part des tutelles (ARS, CD) et des collectivités territoriales qui désirent améliorer le suivi à domicile de patients à risque d’un territoire et d’autre part, des structures d’aide à domicile (Résidence autonomie, SAD...) qui utilisent PRESAGE pour améliorer le maintien de l’autonomie des personnes et éviter des passages aux urgences.

We have a platform to fast track the editorial commissioning and content creation process, which also gives our Commissioning Editor access to our pre-vetted network of expert content creators. 

Outsourcing content creation is time-consuming and riddled with difficulties because it takes a lot of time and effort to find suitably qualified expert writers and editors able to explain complex matters in simple terms. 

We provide spare editorial capabilities to organisations connected to science, medicine, technology and innovation so that they can scale up their coverage. Specifically, we offer the extra help their team needs to deliver clear, concise, compelling content and showcase their work.

Quality content matter because people involved in industries and activities related to research and innovation have a need to communicate in clear, concise, compelling language. This helps them be widely understood and make deals with business partners or innovation collaborators, get funding or fulfil the mandatory requirement to be accountable to society when publicly funded. This is precisely why SciencePOD was created.

Mottomuz doğrultusunda, okuyucularımızın dijital dünyayı daha iyi anlamalarını sağlamak için güvenilir, kaliteli ve güncel içerikler sunuyoruz. Dijital dünyada nelerin değiştiğini, nelerin trend olduğunu ve nasıl başarı elde edileceğini aktarmak için sürekli olarak güncel haberleri takip ediyor ve analizler yapıyoruz. Ayrıca, konuk yazarlarımızın yazılarını yayınlayarak, farklı perspektiflerden içerik sunuyoruz ve okuyucularımıza geniş bir bakış açısı sunuyoruz.

Ajans Dijital olarak, okuyucularımıza dijital dünyayı anlamalarına yardımcı olacak içerikler sunmanın yanı sıra, aynı zamanda sektördeki firmaları ve ajansları da destekliyoruz. Creative işler yapan firmaları ve ajansları konuk alarak, sektördeki deneyimlerini ve başarı hikayelerini paylaşıyoruz. Bu söyleşiler, okuyucularımıza ilham verici örnekler sunarak, dijital dünyada başarılı olmak için motivasyon sağlıyor.

Name: CampusPe
Description:
At CampusPe, we’re changing how students in Tier II and Tier III cities across India search for colleges, make fee payments, and get placed — all from their phones via chatbot.

I’ve spent years running placement drives and working closely with colleges — and I kept noticing the same challenges: students full of potential, but colleges lacked direct access to companies, and recruiters struggled to connect with the right campuses efficiently.

That’s why we built CampusPe — a system that runs through a simple chatbot. No apps. No portals. Just one easy, accessible experience.

Students can explore colleges, pay fees digitally, and access job opportunities. Colleges can go digital without needing a tech team. And companies can connect directly with campuses — no middlemen.

This isn’t just a platform — it’s a fix for the broken path between education and opportunity in places across India that are too often left behind.

We’ve already partnered with early colleges and hiring teams — and the response has been incredibly validating.

If you're a college, company, or someone passionate about bridging education and opportunity — let’s talk.

 Recognitions
• Winner – Startup Karnataka Elevate 2022
• Pre-Incubated – IIMB NSRCEL
• Featured – YourStory
• Registered – Startup India

 Our goal is simple: Make education more accessible and create more job opportunities — especially for students who need it the most.

 www.campuspe.com
 Contactus@campuspe.com
 Manjunath@campuspe.com

Name: Consorcio Tecnológico del Agua: CoTH2O
Description:
El Consorcio Tecnológico del Agua, COTH2O, es una red sinérgica que, mediante el trabajo colaborativo, fomenta y cataliza el desarrollo, escalamiento y transferencia de soluciones e innovaciones tecnológicas que contribuyen a la disminución de brechas en la gestión eficiente e integrada de recursos hídricos. Cuyas soluciones tecnológicas apuntan a aumentar la eficiencia, y sustentabilidad hídrica, así como a enfrentar de manera segura la escasez de agua en la macrozona  centro sur del país (Región Metropolitana, O´Higgins, Maule y Ñuble).

Esta red la componen la Universidad de Concepción en conjunto con la Pontificia Universidad Católica de  Chile, el Instituto de Investigaciones Agropecuarias INIA,  UC Davis Chile Life Science Innovation Center, la Universidad de Chile, la Universidad Bernardo O`higgins y la Universidad Diego Portales, además considera la participación de 20 empresas de sectores agrícola, sanitario, ingeniería, tecnología, industrial,  telecomunicaciones y Organizaciones de Usuarios de Agua.

El Consorcio Tecnológico del Agua cuenta con cinco líneas de acción donde se desarrolla hoy, un portafolio con trece proyectos de investigación aplicada y desarrollo tecnológico, a los que se irán sumando nuevos proyectos en función de las brechas que se detecten. El objetivo del portafolio, es poner a disposición y visibilizar soluciones tecnológicas que permitan avanzar en la gestión eficaz, eficiente y sustentable del recurso hídrico, insértándolas al mercado e implementándolas, tomando en cuenta la magnitud del problema, el sector, la singularidad territorial y ambiental en la que se sitúa.

Nuestras líneas de acción son: 
1. Eficiencia hídrica
2. Gestión integrada de la información
3. Calidad y saneamiento
4. Nuevas fuentes de agua   
5. Regeneración y reutilización de aguas sanitarias e industriales

Name: Ingeniería e Investigación Journal
Description:
Advancing engineering through rigorous research and open-access publishing.

The Ingeniería e Investigación (I&I) journal is an open access digital scientific publication issued since 1981, with a continuous periodicity of three issues per year. Its main objective is to promote the dissemination of original and unpublished scientific research and technological developments in all disciplines related to engineering. Papers published in I&I invite discussion on current issues relevant to the academic community.

I&I is an international journal published in English which uses a double-blind peer review system to ensure the quality and originality of the published content. Editing of the journal is carried out with high standards of professional quality, via a completely autonomous editorial management platform that hosts the content in different formats, with the aim to adapt to current needs regarding visualization and digital preservation.

The journal has no cost for readers or authors, as it is funded by the Faculty of Engineering of Universidad Nacional de Colombia under the Diamond open access model. I&I publishes scientific and technological research articles, review articles, and case reports in the following areas of engineering:

Agricultural Engineering
Biomedical Engineering
Chemical, Environmental, and Food Engineering
Civil and Sanitary Engineering
Electrical, Electronics, and Telecommunications Engineering
Industrial Engineering
Mechanical, Mechatronics, and Materials Engineering
Systems and Computer Engineering
Engineering Education

Discover: Get the content you want from the web - all in one place

Integrate: Bring fresh content into your apps, tools and platforms, every day

The Department of Science and Technology (DST), Government of India, under its National Mission on Interdisciplinary Cyber-Physical Systems (NM-ICPS), has funded IIT Bhilai to host the Technology Innovation Hub (TIH) in the area of FinTech. IBITF has been established as a Section 8 Company under the Companies Act 2013, on January 21, 2021, by IIT Bhilai to host this TIH and act as the nodal center for spearheading Entrepreneurship, R&D, HRD, Skill development, and Collaboration-related activities in various technology verticals including FinTech.

IBITF strives to create an enabling ecosystem for research, innovation, and startups to thrive. The company is mandated for translational research in the areas of emerging technologies in the domain of Fintech. IBITF strives to create a conducive ecosystem with relevant stakeholders to promote R&D, Innovation, and venture creation in the specified thematic areas:
Blockchain 
AI/ML
IoT
e-Payments Systems

Our Vision
- To perform cutting-edge research and development in financial technologies
- To scout for young individuals with entrepreneurial skills, and nurture them
- To ensure capability and capacity building using HRD and skill development at various levels
- To contribute towards India occupying the leadership position in the FinTech revolution
- To build a sustainable ecosystem with national and international collaboration

Our Mission
We believe entrepreneurs are the key to developing crucial innovative solutions for complex societal challenges. IBITF strives to provide strong support and an advisory system to these entrepreneurs operating in emerging technological domains to facilitate the transformation of innovative solutions into products and successful companies with purpose, driven by their vision.

Name: Zenhomes (acquired by Scout24)
Description:
Property ownership is ready for a revolution! Times and people change, but humans will always need a place to live in. But why is finding and operating our homes still one of the arguably worst possible experiences?

This is why we started Zenhomes: It is our vision to give everyone absolute peace around their home. With our intelligent platform 'Vermietet.de' we enable tens-of thousands of people to better manage their homes all across Germany. Our product drastically reduces the complexity of owning property. Name: FightMatrix.com, LLC
Description:
The FightMatrix software rating system takes an unbiased, objective look at all available professional MMA results from day one to the present. The rankings are a hybrid of boxing rankings and traditional MMA rankings in that they represent the “right now” like a boxing system, but fighters don’t “fall” as fast due to a loss.

Furthermore, there are also elements of foreshadowing and prediction-based penalties in an attempt to properly compensate for scenarios such as inactivity, bottom-feeding, and impressive debuting fighters.

Before the site’s creation, it was decided upon that displaying output of a purely statistical (Elo or equivalent) would make no sense for MMA. Elo methods are too basic, and an “accurate” statistical model, would’ve been finalized using past trends as benchmarks, which when used alone, is a poor methodology for the ever changing picture of MMA.  Furthermore, these models can produce wildly anomalous results.

This system needed to be able to factor in special considerations like impressive debuting fighters, “fluke” wins, inactivity, etc, so the decision was made to study respected rankings, and make a software system that properly place the keystone fighters in the divisions, but take bias out of the equation by ignoring overly hyped fighters, giving credit to underrated fighters, and being able to pull the cord on fighters who are well past their prime. In addition, the system also excels by being much more scalable then your typical Top 10s and 15s, by analyzing even the most minor shows.

In summary, FightMatrix is a computerized rating system that attempts to capture un-biased “popular thought” and combine it with prediction-based analysis.  FightMatrix’s system is truly one of a kind.

Name: MD Networking Publications LLC
Description:
O Projeto MD Networking nasceu no final de 2012 no Brasil com o objetivo principal de compartilhar conhecimentos técnicos da construção e sustentabilidade de maneira totalmente gratuíta.

Em 2014, o Projeto MD Networking se associou a uma empresa de Entretenimento Digital localizada na cidade de San Francisco na Califórnia. O que facilitou a ampliação de suas áreas de conhecimento criando e mantendo 4 sites em pleno funcionamento nos Estados Unidos de modo a compartilhar as publicações para mais leitores em diversos países nos Continentes Americano, Europeu, Oceania, Africano e Asiático.

A partir de 2016, a MD Networking deixou de ser apenas um projeto de blogs privado para ser tornar um projeto mais amplo de editoração e gerenciamento de todos os artigos de Autoria da Escritora Comendadora Marisa F. Diniz em blogs privados, públicos, sites, revistas, plataformas profissionais e redes de comunicação localizadas nos Estados Unidos, Espanha, Portugal e Brasil, além de gerenciar todas as redes sociais e profissionais alterando o nome para MD Networking Publications.

A partir de 2025, a MD Networking Publications se desliga da holding de Entretenimento Digital norte-americana e passa a ser administrada pela empresa brasileira MD Networking Negócios e Consultoria com sede na cidade de São Paulo - Brasil, tendo suporte de um escritório de Direitos Autorais no exterior e de uma empresa de Marketing Digital localizada na cidade de San Jose, CA que é responsável pela administração de todos os blogs, Google Maps, artigos e publicações nas redes sociais.

A MD Networking Publications conta com mais de 10 milhões de visualizações e mais de 1000 artigos técnicos e de diversos outros assuntos publicados em diversas redes de comunicação, além de manter uma equipe de avaliadores de serviços, produtos e estabelecimentos para engajamento das empresas no Google Maps, localizada em diversos países.

Name: Cogia Intelligence
Description:
Cogia is one of the leading providers of monitoring and analysis technologies using AI-based and patented semantic solutions in the field of "Big Data Analytics". The company has been offering products for intelligent information search, organization and analysis for web content, social media and internal data for over 10 years.

Cogia supports its customers primarily through two product solutions: Cogia Customer Experience Manager and Cogia Text Mining. 

The Cogia Customer Experience Manager is based on Cogia's award-winning AI-based sentiment and trend analysis. It enables companies to track, measure and analyze customer feedback from any touch point throughout the entire customer journey, including the social web.

Cogia Text Mining is based on Cogia's AI-based semantic search engine, which provides superior enterprise-class search and structuring capabilities for all types of internal data, SQL databases, mail server or intranet data. It can be used as a "knowledge hub", enabling companies to consolidate all their unstructured or only semi-structured data and to access it uniformly, for example by topic. 

Cogia's technologies have already proven their worth in numerous projects. Customers include companies such as VW, BMW Group, BMW Bank, Commerzbank, Lufthansa and ATU, as well as organizations and public administrations such as Fraunhofer FKIE, the Saarland State Chancellery and the Free State of Bavaria.

Since 2010, Cogia Intelligence, based in Frankfurt a.M., is managed by Pascal Lauria as CEO. He has more than 23 years of experience in IT business development and marketing. The company is a 100% subsidiary of Cogia AG.

Name: Forerunners Network
Description:
Nachhaltigkeit trifft auf Fortschritt – wo ESG, Infrastruktur und MINT verschmelzen

Der Wandel hin zu einer nachhaltigen Zukunft beginnt dort, wo Technologie auf Verantwortung trifft. Auf Forerunners.Network zeigen wir, wie sich Infrastruktur und MINT – also Mathematik, Informatik, Naturwissenschaften und Technik – mit den Prinzipien von ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) verbinden, um echten Fortschritt zu ermöglichen.

Ob bei der Dekarbonisierung von Energiesystemen, der Digitalisierung ganzer Wertschöpfungsketten oder dem Bau klimaresilienter Infrastrukturen: Innovationen sind dann zukunftsfähig, wenn sie den Menschen, die Umwelt und verantwortungsvolle Unternehmensführung zugleich im Blick behalten.

Wir machen sichtbar, wie technischer Wandel nicht nur effizient, sondern auch gerecht und nachhaltig gestaltet werden kann – mit inspirierenden Vorbildern, mutigen Unternehmen und Lösungen, die eine lebenswerte Zukunft sichern.

Forerunners.Network begleitet diesen Wandel journalistisch – mit Haltung, Tiefe und dem Blick nach vorn. Für alle, die Technik nicht nur als Werkzeug, sondern als Teil der Lösung verstehen.

We do this by allowing people to add AR and VR memorials to their loved ones final resting place.

Name: Can I Play That?
Description:
We have been doing video game accessibility work for a few years now and we’ve noticed a disappointing pattern in the video game writing community:

A new game is released that brings a new standard of accessibility. For a couple weeks there are stories applauding the game’s accessibility innovations and a huge portion of the games community is talking about it. Then the novelty wears off and accessibility largely disappears from mainstream game writing until the Next Big Thing comes out.

What’s more is that too often, it’s not disabled gamers doing the writing. It’s usually our abled allies that get the writing gigs and while they often feature disabled gamers in their pieces, they’re still the ones speaking for us.

Can I Play That? aims to change that.
We want to be the one publication that never lets the accessibility conversation end. And we want disabled gamers to take the lead and be in the spotlight. After all, who better to write about game accessibility than those that rely on and benefit from it?

So, welcome to Can I Play That? where the mic will be given to those often overlooked and the conversation about game accessibility doesn’t end simply because a game has been out for a few weeks. We can’t wait to talk with you.

"Mühendissel" kelimesini literatüre kazandırmak için çıktığımız yolda, alanında uzman mühendisler ile teknik konularda sohbet ettiğimiz ve onların deneyimlerinden faydalandığımız online program düzenliyoruz.

Name: SMART ENERGY
Description:
Chez Smart Energy, nous travaillons pour rendre la transition énergique pratique et accessible à tous en offrant des solutions innovantes aux collectivités et entreprises privées leur permettant de contrôler et d’optimiser facilement leurs consommations et dépenses énergétiques en électricité et en gaz.

 SMARTHELP, LA SOLUTION DE PILOTAGE DE LA FACTURATION ÉNERGÉTIQUE 

SmartHelp est la seule solution digitale indépendante sur le marché français à pousser aussi loin l’analyse financière des factures. Grâce à une intégration avec les différents opérateurs des réseaux électriques et du gaz, SmartHelp est capable d’obtenir des données de consommation très précises et à un niveau très détaillé. La solution se nourrit de ces données de consommation et les intègre à ses calculs algorithmiques simulant tous les différents types de contrats existants et leurs coûts, ainsi que les taxes et contributions.

SmartHelp est ainsi à même de calculer précisément ce que doit être une facture d’énergie sur une période mais aussi de contrôler chaque facture émise par le fournisseur en vérifiant toutes les couches tarifaires. Les anomalies sont ainsi automatiquement signalées par la solution.

 TRANSPARENCE & CONTRÔLE
 SUIVI BUDGÉTAIRE: SIMPLICITÉ & MAÎTRISE
 OPTIMISATION

Mais également : assistance informatique, technique et négociation.

Pour en savoir plus, contactez-nous !

---------------
A propos de Smart Energy:

 Start-up basée dans le 06 et rayonnant sur l’ensemble du territoire français.

Name: Medflow Tech
Description:
Medflow é uma plataforma para a construção de soluções com foco no suporte à tomada de decisão clínica.  Por meio das tecnologias de care pathway e low-code são modelados fluxos e estes são transformados em sistemas web e mobile. As condutas são criadas e modificadas facilmente por meio de uma linguagem própria o que torna a solução flexível, adaptável e escalável, fornecendo uma plataforma completa para a gestão das condutas auxiliando desde o atendimento até a jornada do paciente. 

O conhecimento da área da saúde é estruturado na forma de condutas interativas para fornecer uma experiência única. A plataforma também permite a construção de dashboards com indicadores em tempo real gerando dados para a tomada de decisão dos gestores. Com isso, pode-se organizar e padronizar as condutas reduzindo a variabilidade na prática clínica e melhorando o desfecho.

A tecnologia Medflow já foi utilizada em diferentes contextos  tais como hospital, clínica, ambulatório, internação, acompanhamento de gestantes, diabéticos e hipertensos, totalizando mais de 310 protocolos em uso, 300 unidades de saúde  e 25 milhões de atendimentos. Foram obtidos resultados de melhoria no desfecho do paciente e redução significativa de tempo/custo.

Name: my-landimmo
Description:
Wo jedes Haus eine Geschichte erzählt: my-landimmo.de

Der Vertrieb historischer Immobilien birgt für Immobilienmakler bekanntlich einige Herausforderungen. Von spezialisierten Kenntnissen über einen eingeschränkten Zielmarkt bis hin zu höheren Instandhaltungskosten – es ist eine komplexe Aufgabe, potenzielle Käufer zu überzeugen.

Dennoch sind wir stets auf der Suche nach innovativen Wegen, um Ihr Immobiliengeschäft voranzutreiben. Genau aus diesem Grund möchten wir Ihnen My-LandImmo.de vorstellen – ein spezialisiertes Fachportal, das Ihnen herausragende Vorteile bieten kann.

My-LandImmo.de ist der ideale Ort, um eine vorqualifizierte Zielgruppe anzusprechen, die aktiv nach ländlichen und historischen Immobilien sucht. Anders als bei großen Immobilienportalen, auf denen Tausende von Angeboten konkurrieren, ist der Wettbewerb auf My-LandImmo.de deutlich geringer. Die Leads, die über diese Plattform generiert werden, bringen bereits ein starkes Interesse an diesen speziellen Immobilientypen mit sich.

Durch die Platzierung Ihrer Immobilien auf My-LandImmo.de erhalten Sie als Makler ein wertvolles Alleinstellungsmerkmal. Hier können Sie sich als Experte für ländliche und historische Immobilien positionieren, was das Vertrauen potenzieller Käufer in Sie stärkt.

Trotz der Herausforderungen, die historische Immobilien mit sich bringen, bietet My-LandImmo.de eine einzigartige Chance, Ihre Verkaufsstrategie zu optimieren. Nutzen Sie diese Gelegenheit, um sich von der Konkurrenz abzuheben und Ihr Geschäft auf das nächste Level zu heben.

Für weitere Informationen oder eine persönliche Beratung stehen wir Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung. Besuchen Sie my-LandImmo.de und entdecken Sie die Vorteile für Ihr Immobiliengeschäft.

Name: Frankfurt Law Review e. V.
Description:
Die Frankfurt Law Review (e. V.) ist eine rechtswissenschaftliche Zeitschrift, die von Studierenden der Goethe-Universität Frankfurt am Main seit 2023 herausgegeben wird. Seit August 2025 ist die Frankfurt Law Review als gemeinnützig anerkannter Verein beim Vereinsregister des Amtsgerichts Frankfurt am Main angemeldet (VR 17518).

Die Zeitschrift erscheint zweimal jährlich als Open Access Journal. In unregelmäßigen Abständen erscheinen darüber hinaus Sonderausgaben, welche sich mit einem Themengebiet auseinandersetzen. Die aktuelle Ausgabe ist jeweils hier abrufbar: https://frankfurtlawreview.de/Aktuelle-Ausgabe/ 

Wir möchten in erster Linie Studierenden eine wissenschaftliche Stimme geben, aber auch eine Plattform für Rechtswissenschaftler:innen und Jurist:innen aus der Praxis bieten. Wir haben uns zum Ziel gesetzt, den studentischen juristischen Diskurs zu fördern und neue, spannende Perspektiven zu eröffnen.

Name: Vlagaj.si
Description:
Z mojim sodelavcem in dobrim prijateljem Juretom Ugovškom že skoraj celo kariero poslušava isto vprašanje:

 Kam naj vlagam?

Odgovor na to vprašanje ni nikoli preprost. Pred letom in pol pa sva naletela na ameriškega avtorja Nicka Maggiullija, ki na to vprašanje odgovarja skozi knjigo – razumno, konkretno in brez odvečnega balasta.

Po dobrem letu dni vam z veseljem predstavljava slovenski prevod knjige, ki je izšla pri založbi Orbis, v sodelovanju s Časnikom Finance. Naslov je: Vlagaj. Samo vlagaj. 

Zakaj to knjigo priporočava?

 Ne ponuja nasvetov tipa, če boste prenehali piti kavo, boste čez 30 let milijonarji.
 Ne išče naslednje tesle, nvidie ali bitcoina.
 Ne prodaja iluzij.

Ponuja pa nekaj veliko pomembnejšega: temeljna načela dobrega vlaganja in varčevanja, napisana v jeziku, ki ga razume vsak. 

To je preprost vodnik za vse, ki se želijo seznaniti z upravljanjem osebnih financ ter povečati svoje premoženje. 

Če ste naveličani finančnih nasvetov, ki vam ne ustrezajo, vam povzročajo stres in tudi ne delujejo, vam lahko ta knjiga odpre nov pogled na svet osebnih financ. Ne glede na to, ali varčujete za nepremičnino, pokojnino ali pa finančno neodvisnost, knjiga ponuja osvežujoč in realističen pogled na varčevanje in vlaganje prihrankov.

Name: Glam
Description:
Founded in 2003 and acquired by Static Media in 2022, Glam is your ultimate resource for beauty, lifestyle, and fashion. We know you're busy — that's why we're cutting through the noise and delivering you everything you need to know to feel and look your best.

Before we go any further, let's get one thing out of the way. Yes, we are a beauty brand, and yes, we are incredibly passionate about things like chic manicures and busting skincare myths. However, at our core, we believe every person's relationship with beauty is ultimately their own to define, and we fully recognize that living a glam life goes well beyond just how you look in the mirror.

Our mission is to equip our readers with up-to-date news, fact-based information, and inspiration that empowers them to build a life they love. For us, that means tackling makeup, skin care, nutrition, style, relationships, parenting, and career in a way that is as informative and useful as it is relatable. Like our readers, our editorial team consists of people who bring different backgrounds and experiences with beauty, and together we want to make it more attainable for everyone. Whether it's keeping you on top of the latest makeup trends, helping you understand the difference between retinoid and retinol, or preparing you for your next career move, we're here to guide you through it all. We also review some of the hottest new products every year so we can tell you if they're worth your time. 

Today, Glam reaches over 1 million monthly unique visitors, with that number growing each day. We've been in the business for long enough to know that the beauty and wellness industry and the way we talk about both is constantly evolving, and our goal is to create a space where everyone feels included and confident in the current moment, be it the makeup aficionado, or the person who's trying out a cut crease shadow for the first time. We hope that's the vibe you get when you hang with us, and we hope you're here to stay.

Name: Daylight
Description:
The Daylight API powers the home tabs, explore tabs, and push notifications of the majority of the wallet apps in the industry (Coinbase Wallet, MetaMask, Zerion, OKX Web3 Wallet, and more) with personalized transaction recommendations: mints, claims, quests, dapps, swaps, and more. It’s “onchain for you” - like Netflix and Spotify’s home tabs, but with things to do onchain instead of movies or music.

We already drive 5% of our wallet partners’ transacting users, and our mission is to drive 5% of all onchain GDP. Our founders have been working together in crypto for five years and on Daylight for two years, and we are backed by great funds like USV. We work on hard and interesting scaling and data problems, and we get to help everyone in crypto: from users to wallets to protocols to chains to creators.

We are looking for two staff backend engineers with deep experience designing and scaling REST APIs. Our API serves tens of thousands of requests per second, summarizing millions of rows of offchain data and terabytes of onchain data in 750ms or less.

The problems we work on are meat-and-potatoes software engineering: writing code understandable to others; optimizing Postgresql queries; tracing code paths for bottlenecks; getting the most out of AWS infrastructure.

These are some things we believe in as a team:
- Prioritizing the problems that most impact our goal
- Minimizing distractions
- Writing good tests
- Communicating openly and directly
- Everyone, and especially engineers, thinking about product and API design (the value to the customer)

Name: Zigzag Car
Description:
Zigzag car is a carpool and ride-share app that connects drivers and passengers. Drivers post the date and time of their road trip intercity or intracity, and riders sign up for a seat.
Riders are able to get to their destination for a price that is typically affordable and value for money. At the same time, the cost of a driver’s trip (gas, tolls, etc.) is essentially paid for. In fact a driver can actually make a profit for some trips with a fully booked car.
Zigzag car is a carpooling app that allows passengers to buy a seat in a driver’s personal vehicle for any distance trip inside city or between cities. While the cost of a driver’s trip is offset by payment from the rider(s), an otherwise empty car is filled with passengers who need to get to the same destination as the driver.
Our concept is simple: turn empty car seats into a cost-effective, eco-friendly, and fun mode of transportation.

 Formations en Community management, en Référencement, en Ecoconception de services numériques, en Communication responsable et RSE (inter/intra)

Name: Empirics
Description:
Empirics Asia is an open-access knowledge sharing platform that seeks to facilitate the collective exchange of insights, ideas and experience throughout Asia. The platform provides a democratic avenue for practical knowledge to be collectively published,  shared and accessed in the region. Without being restricted by advertising interests or commercial intentions, Empirics aims to enrich the lives of those living in the region through a unique form of digital crowd publishing and collective discourse that aim to be actionable, practical, educational and inspirational. Asia has been garnering a lot of attention in the recent years with its meteoric emergence. Empirics aims to effectively supplements this scene by providing access towards a practical understanding of the region through collective publishing from authors and participants at the grassroots level.
Through its operations, Empirics aims to create an open and active community where collective experience, innovative ideas and intelligent insights are shared amongst the regional communities.
Prior to its expanded launch, Empirics was originally founded as The Asian Entrepreneur, a business publication, by former Harvard University students and alumnus; the organization grew to become the world’s most authoritative non-profit business knowledge platform on Asian entrepreneurship. The organization amassed over 1,000 active writers and published close to 1 million open access articles whilst achieving substantial readership in over 40 countries. On record at the end of 2020, The Asian Entrepreneur became the largest repository of content on the topic.

MDPI publishes over 98 journals that are ranked as high impact within their fields. To view the current impact factors for MDPI journals (according to the Journal Citation Reports), please visit our yearly announcement page here.

With additional offices in Beijing, Wuhan, Tianjin and Nanjing (China), Barcelona (Spain), Belgrade and Novi Sad (Serbia), Manchester (UK), Tokyo (Japan), Cluj and Bucharest (Romania), Toronto (Canada), Kraków (Poland), Singapore (Singapore), Bangkok (Thailand) and Seoul (Republic of Korea), MDPI has published the research of more than 330,000 individual authors and our journals receive more than 25 million monthly webpage views.

Name: Spotz
Description:
Spotz is a new marketplace that connects renters seeking space with hosts. With Spotz, almost any space can be rented and monetized, and we give hosts the tools they need to ensure the process is painless.


How It Works

	Hosts are onboarded and provide details: Location, number of facilities, number of spaces, etc.

	Hosts then define how they want to rent: weekly, daily, half-day, or hourly.

	Photos of the facilities and spaces are uploaded, and prices are set by the host.

	Within 24 hours, the listing is live.

	Hosts can also choose add-ons, such as requiring renters to hire security. 

	If renters have special requests, hosts can easily fulfill them via a work order.

	Spotz also gives hosts tools to manage custom groups and priority booking management.

	Renters can take advantage of a mobile-optimized interface with easy search by location, facility type, capacity, and more. 

	Both parties can communicate on the Spotz platform.

	Once a booking is requested, the host approves, and payment is processed.

	With one button, renters can cancel, and hosts can issue refunds.

Name: InfoSec UNIGE
Description:
Les récents cas de piratages informatiques, la digitalisation croissante du monde professionnel font de la sûreté et la protection de l’information un pan essentiel de l’organisation de toute entreprise. 

INFOSEC est un programme de formation et de perfectionnement en Sécurité de l’information organisé par l’Université de Genève. Il regroupe plusieurs offres de formations diplômantes (CAS, DAS, MAS) destinées aux professionnels de la sécurité de l'information. Les formations sont spécialement étudiées pour répondre aux besoins sécuritaires dans le domaine exigés par les entreprises, surtout dans le contexte actuel.  

L’objectif d’INFOSEC est de permettre à ses diplômés de :

-	identifier les risques nouveaux,
-	planifier et assurer le suivi de la mise en place des mesures de protection pour y faire face, 
-	et sensibiliser ses collaborateurs de manière à ce que chacun puisse acquérir les bons réflexes de sécurité. 

3 types de parcours sont proposés par INFOSEC: des formations sur-mesure selon vos besoins:

-    Parcours dans la continuité : suivi des divers modules dans l’ordre chronologique pour permettre        l’obtention d’un CAS, puis d’un DAS et MAS de l’Université de Genève, selon le niveau de formation souhaité.
-    Parcours par thème : sélection de thèmes spécifiques, dans l’ordre souhaité, pour validation d’un CAS puis DAS et MAS.
-    Parcours à la carte : suivi d’un ou plusieurs modules à la carte, de manière indépendante, avec potentielle obtention d'un DAS, CAS, MAS.
Les formations proposées permettent aux professionnels en charge de la sécurité de l’information de développer de nouvelles compétences multi disciplinaires.

Name: theRenewMe
Description:
If you are new to Canada, you would love our story.

2 decades ago, in our twenties, we chose Canada as our new home. 

It's been the perfect fit, offering opportunities for educational and professional growth. The beauty of Canadian cities and nature has captivated us, but it's the kindness of the people that has truly made this country feel like home.

We built a successful life, personally and professionally, became millionaires in our thirties, and have been living the Canadian dream. But this did not come easy. 

Like anyone else, there was a time when we needed help. As newcomers, we faced challenges that demanded a deeper understanding of financial, legal, and professional systems. It was not easy to figure things out on our own. But this discovery journey has contributed to our personal, professional, and financial growth. 

We figured out the rules of the game.

Recognizing that the journey for newcomers could be smoother with additional support, we felt compelled to give back. 

Motivated by our own experience and success, we decided to extend a helping hand to those navigating the challenges of settling into a new life in Canada.

If you're interested in learning more about living in Canada and how to make the transition to the new life easier for newcomers, feel free to follow this page.

Through this page, we will share insights, tips, and stories about navigating life in this beautiful country. 

Your new life demands a renew you!

Name: The Future is Mindful
Description:
A revolution is happening in workplaces around the world. Businesses are struggling to re-invent themselves to become human-first workplaces in order to attract, engage, and retain talent.

Tami Simon, CEO of Sounds True (twice named in Inc. 500 & 33 years in business) said, “Every profession, every organization will have to be remade with a recognition of our interconnectedness in the coming years if we are going to have a just and loving world.”

Mindfulness is at the center of this transformation. A substantial body of research affirms how mindfulness increases well-being, engagement, and resilience to name a few.

Peter Bostelmann (Chief Mindfulness Officer of SAP) said, “The question is not anymore if mindfulness will come to your organization. It will come.”³

The increasing velocity of this change has created an unprecedented demand for guidance and resources for mindful leadership, mindfulness programs, expertise, and supporting technology.

For this reason, we are announcing The Future is Mindful. A virtual summit focused on how mindfulness is helping to transform the Future of Work.

A series of keynotes will be presented over a two-day period. A brand-new mindful event is planned and there will be options to participate in mindful breakout sessions.

Look forward to presentations from  Tami Simon, CEO of Sounds True,  Scott Shute, author of The Full Body Yes: Change your Work and Your World from the Inside Out,  Rhonda Magee, author of The Inner Work of Racial Justice and more leaders including Karl Mehta, Enrique Rubio, Jacqueline Carter, Mark Leonard , Brett Hill, Michael Foster,  and Mark Montalban.

Join us for important conversations at the Future is Mindful virtual summit on March 29th and 30th, 2022.

Name: GEWINNE ZUKUNFT - Nachhaltigkeit erfolgreich umsetzen
Description:
Wie kannst Du Dein Unternehmen erfolgreich transformieren und Klimakompatibilität erreichen? 

Wenn wir ehrlich sind, ist den meisten von uns bewusst, dass wir schon längst auf eine Welt mit +3Grad zusteuern. Die Aussichten sind also alles andere als rosig. Wollen wir mehr für unsere Zukunft herausholen, dann braucht es unseren mutigen Einsatz und innovative Ideen. Es braucht den Willen nicht nur klimaneutral zu sein, sondern unsere Gesellschaft klimapositiv zu gestalten. 

Aber wie ist das für wirtschaftlich denkende Unternehmer*innen möglich?

Ich wollte wissen, was wir von den Pioniere der Nachhaltigkeitstransformation lernen können. Daher interviewe ich alle zwei Wochen einzigartige Persönlichkeiten, die privat und beruflich konsequent einen Schritt weitergehen. Sie setzen nicht  nur konsequent auf die Symbiose der Digitalisierung mit der Nachhaltigkeitstransformation, sondern leisten mit ihrem Unternehmen von Grund auf einen Beitrag für eine 1,XGrad Welt. 

Ob aus der Industrie, der Energiewirtschaft oder der Digitalwirtschaft - sie verändern damit jetzt bereits unsere Zukunft. Folge meinem Podcast, lerne von anderen Entscheider*innen und Gründer*innen und verändere auch mit Deinem Unternehmen die Zukunft!

Name: CARI! (caribencana.id)
Description:
Cerdas Antisipasi Risiko bencana Indonesia (CARI!)* is a research & information technology start-up working to enhance knowledge management for disaster risk reduction and resilient development.

The paramount vision from the development of CARI! is to accelerate the development of a disaster-resilient environment throughout Indonesia and beyond. CARI! supports government, academics, enterprises, and many others to bridge the whole scientific knowledge to the public.

CARI! has two main products; Search Engine (Main Portal) and Indonesia Disaster Knowledge Update (IDKU). Our Main Portal is an automatic crawling engine that provides spatial-based disaster-related journal and research repositories across Indonesia and Southeast Asia. Currently, we have gathered more than 54.000 geo-tagged published research articles from major indexing tools. Our IDKU is a monthly update on the disaster knowledge landscape, strategies, and trends in Indonesia, summarized in two or three pages. Our IDKU is the first, and the one and only, periodically infographics bulletin that provides a systematic review of research articles on disasters in Indonesia by using interactive data visualization.
These two products are free to use and can be customizable for anyone. 

Aside from the products, CARI! also offered a wide range of services, from premium analytics, ICT system integration, human capacity building, and strategic planning.

Name: GivePenny
Description:
GivePenny developed a digital toolkit to help charities harness the power of digital technology. Lifestyle apps were connected to a charity’s fundraiser in order to create innovative virtual events that raised more for those in need. 

By harnessing the benefits of the world's favourite apps, GivePenny helped charities to raise more than £5,000,000 overall.

Charities could create ‘connected giving’ campaigns that raised more than traditional fundraising activities. Fundraisers built playlists with Spotify in memory of a loved one and allowed friends and family to add songs in return for donations. They could be sponsored for playing their favourite video game, and live-stream via Twitch onto their GivePenny fundraising page. Or run a half-marathon for their favourite cause, and allow sponsors to track progress by connecting Strava, Fitbit or Runkeeper. The options were almost endless.

Cancer Research, Help for Heroes, Shelter and many more benefitted from their adoption of GivePenny’s platform.

Name: AI and Knowledge Engineering Journal; IJAIKE.org
Description:
About	
Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Knowledge Engineering (JAIKE) is the Knowledge Solutions Society publication on artificial intelligence (AI) and Knowledge Engineering (KE).  It bridges the gap between AI & KE theories and practices. It publishes original, significant, and timely leading-edge theories and technologies of AI and KE that utilize a cognitive process of knowledge-mining, knowledge-acquisition, Knowledge-learning, knowledge-discovery, K-reasoning, K-processing, and K-optimization. It serves AI scientists, engineers, policymakers, and business stakeholders of all levels.
The journal was launched in 2024 and is published on an open-access basis by the Association for the Advancement of Knowledge Solutions (AAKS) in cooperation with the EurAsia Academic Publishing Group (EAPG). 

About Link: https://ijaike.org/about-jaike/
Journal Focus

Journal of Artificial Intelligence and Knowledge Engineering (JAIKE) specifically focuses on Artificial Intelligence (AI), Knowledge mining and discovery, Knowledge acquisition, Knowledge Intelligence, Knowledge-based engineering (KBE), knowledge-based systems (KBS), Knowledge Management (KM), Smart Processes/Products/Artifacts, Internet-Of-Things(IOTs), Knowledge management, and knowledge-driven automation (KDA), including their theoretical foundations, architectures, knowledge infrastructure and enabling IOTs and Internet technologies. 
Journal Focus Link: https://ijaike.org/journal-focus/ 
Journal Scope 

 Suggested topics in JAIKE include, but are not limited to, the following areas:
Artificial Intelligence (AI) :
Knowledge Mining and Discovery (KMD) 
Knowledge Acquisition (KA) 
Knowledge Intelligence (KI)
Knowledge-based Engineering (KBE)
Knowledge-Based Systems (KBS) 
Knowledge Management (KM)
Internet-of-Things (IOTs) 
Smart Products
Generative AI
Knowledge-driven Automation (KDA) 
Knowledge Architecture & IOTs Platforms
AIKE Application: 

J. Scope Link: https://ijaike.org/journal-scope/

Name: In-Mind: Psychology for You!
Description:
In-Mind is a volunteer-based online science-communication journal dedicated to making psychological research accessible and engaging for everyone. By publishing articles and blog posts that are both comprehensive and approachable, we bridge the gap between academia and the public and inspire curiosity across readers of all backgrounds.

 Our content spans all areas of psychology, always presented in a way that sparks thought and fosters understanding. We feature both regular issues covering a wide range of psychological topics and special issues focusing on timely and relevant themes. To maintain high academic standards, all our publications are authored by active researchers and rigorously peer-reviewed. 

 At In-Mind, we believe that psychology should be shared, not locked behind paywalls. That’s why we offer researchers a platform to communicate their work to a broader audience 
—  whether they are seasoned communicators or new to science communication. Our editorial board is available to support those who are new to this type of writing, ensuring that their work reaches and resonates with a broader audience.

 After a brief hiatus, the English version of In-Mind was relaunched in autumn 2023 with fresh energy and a renewed commitment to accessible science. Regional versions of the journal also publish articles in German, French, Italian, and Dutch.

 We invite you to explore our articles, learn from leading psychological research, and join us in making psychology accessible for everyone!
________________________

 Thinking of writing for In-Mind? See our website to submit your article. We look forward to hearing from you!

Name: Behavioral Economics Institute (BehavioralEconomics.com)
Description:
Behavioral Science Solutions is the business behind BehavioralEconomics.com, home to the popular Behavioral Economics Guide, the Behavioral Economics Academy, the largest online behavioral science network (Behavioral Economics Group), and many other behavioral science resources. 

The website aims to be a major knowledge broker in the behavioral sciences, particularly behavioral economics and behavioral insights. BehavioralEconomics.com consists of a growing network of individuals and organizations with a shared passion for behavioral theories, research, and applications. As an online community, the site’s mission is to connect people, provide resources, as well as promote the growth and relevance of the discipline.

BehavioralEconomics.com was established by Alain Samson, who started out his professional life in media. In the 1990s, he became a pioneer in online academic publishing, while completing his undergraduate studies at UC Berkeley. After a detour through the University of Michigan, Alain completed a PhD in Social Psychology at the London School of Economics. Since then, he has spanned the boundaries between academia and applied science as a business consultant, scientific advisor, and author.

Name: Budh Baridh Limited
Description:
समानी व आकूतिः समाना हृदयानि वः

समानमस्तु वो मनो यथा वः सुसहासति ।

Let your aims be common and your hearts of one accord; And all of you may be of one mind; so you may live well together

Rigveda 10.191.4


Budh Baridh Limited was established in the United Kingdom by Jagdeep Singh in 2021 under the auspices of Gurdev Nidar Singh Nihang, the 9th Gurdev (grandmaster) of the Baba Darbara Singh Akhara. In 1661, the same year of Guru Gobind Singh’s birth, this Akhara was established by the 2nd Jathedar (supreme head) of the Akali Nihang Singh Khalsa Buddha Dal (the foremost martial order of the Sikhs) named Akali Nihang Baba Darbara Singh (1645-1735).


Sadly today, Sanatan Shastar Vidiya is only taught in the Baba Darbara Singh Akhara; it is not found anywhere else in the world.


The sole purpose of the organisation is to promote Sanatan Shastar Vidiya globally and ensure the complete preservation of the art and its associated traditions for all time. 


Budh Baridh translates as “Ocean of Wisdom”.


Our innovative platform powering the Sanatan Shastar Vidiya app utilises the latest in AI, blockchain, and streaming technologies to deliver a seamless user experience. Download our app at www.shastarvidiya.org.

At SEADOC, we deeply value the importance of a positive and thriving work culture, recognizing it as a cornerstone of our company's success. When you join the SEADOC team, you become part of a close-knit community united by a shared purpose: to improve lives through innovative healthcare solutions. - Gratitude: we cultivate a culture of appreciation, recognizing and celebrating the contributions of every team member. We believe that acknowledging and valuing each other's efforts fosters a positive and motivating work environment.

- Commitment: we are dedicated to our mission and to each other. We are committed to delivering the highest quality work and supporting our colleagues in achieving their goals. We approach every challenge with dedication and perseverance.

- Transparency: we believe in open and honest communication. We strive to create a transparent environment where information is shared freely and team members feel comfortable expressing their ideas and concerns.

- Mutual Support: we are a team that supports each other through thick and thin. We believe in collaboration and recognize that we are stronger together. We encourage teamwork and are always willing to lend a helping hand.

- Open to New Ideas: we embrace innovation and encourage creativity. We are always open to new ideas and perspectives, recognizing that continuous improvement is essential to our success. We foster an environment where experimentation and learning are valued.

Join our team and experience a workplace where your contributions truly matter.

Name: Lawka
Description:
Lawka est une plateforme de recrutement dédiée aux mandats et aux emplois (permanents ou temporaires) dans les secteurs juridiques et fiduciaires.

Le problème :

Dans ces secteurs, les entreprises font souvent face à un dilemme : elles doivent soit embaucher des employés à temps plein qu'elles n'utilisent pas pleinement, soit se tourner vers des agences à bas coût qui ne répondent pas à leurs standards de qualité. Parallèlement, les professionnels du droit et de la fiduciaire de haut niveau recherchent des défis stimulants mais aspirent à plus de flexibilité dans leur pratique, sans les contraintes traditionnelles d’association ou d'emploi salarié. Actuellement, ces professionnels et entreprises doivent faire des compromis qui ne devraient pas être nécessaires.

Notre solution : Lawka

Lawka offre une plateforme B2B multimodale qui résout ces problèmes. Grâce à un compte vérifié unique (pour les entreprises, les individus, les indépendants, ou les talents non associés ou employés, tels que ceux en recherche d'emploi ou jeunes diplômés), Lawka permet de :

* Accroître la visibilité au sein d’un réseau de spécialistes juridiques, en mettant en avant des profils détaillés grâce à des mots-clés et des canevas décrivant les missions précédentes.
* Faciliter la recherche, la publication et la candidature pour des postes ou des mandats dans le secteur juridique ou fiduciaire.
* Connecter les entreprises avec le talent juridique approprié pour une variété de tâches, des opérations internes routinières aux travaux juridiques complexes nécessitant un conseil extérieur.
* Offrir un suivi en temps réel des mandats en termes de budget et de temps.
* Permettre des paiements en ligne sécurisés via QR-bill, sans prélever de commission, favorisant ainsi des transactions directes entre clients et prestataires.
* Collecter des retours d'expérience après chaque mission ou mandat pour améliorer le recrutement et optimiser les mises en relation avec des études juridiques.
