MRN Web Designs offers custom website design and digital marketing to help grow your business. Book a call today to create a website that generates leads and sales for your business!

We’ll design or enhance your website to attract your target market’s users and retain their interest.

Custom design
We'll develop a user-friendly, intuitive design accessible to all users and appeals to your aesthetic tastes. 

Responsiveness
A responsive website design detects the devices your visitors are using and displays the compatible version. Google gives preferential search ranking to mobile-first websites.

Load time
Load time describes how long it takes the content to appear once a user clicks a link to one of your pages. More than a three-second load time risks losing a site visitor and negatively impacts your Google search ranking. 

We test your website to ensure it loads in three seconds or less. 

Content
Search engines “crawl” your website’s content to determine its relevance and value to users, so it’s critical to develop content that represents your company, products, and services well.

Our copywriters can help you develop your content strategy and content.

Consulting

Website design & redesign

Your website is your company’s first impression for potential customers. Stand out for all the right reasons, and book your free consultation today!

Name: Science Diplomacy Capital for Africa
Description:
Science Diplomacy is intrinsic to a country’s innovation system and related strategy and policy-making. It also interfaces with economic diplomacy.

South Africa’s Science Diplomacy journey after its first democratic election in 1994, includes the 1996 White Paper on Science and Technology and the subsequent Cabinet approved 2019 Science, Technology and Innovation White Paper.

Continuing that science, technology, and innovation journey includes the Department of Science, Technology and Innovation (DSTI) and the Council for Scientific and Industrial Research (CSIR) this Science Diplomacy Capital for Africa joint initiative.

The Science Diplomacy Capital for Africa promotes science collaboration across Africa and beyond towards leveraging and connecting technology innovation with humanity. Collaboration that embeds a culture of learning – underpinned by sound governance.

The journey beyond 2022 will focus on value add interventions aligned with the Sustainable Development Goals – in the context of the Societal Grand Challenges. Planning for beyond 2025 includes the establishment of a legal entity for the Science Diplomacy Capital for Africa.

Durante estos años hemos evolucionado junto al mercado incorporando marcas de primer nivel, así como productos destinados específicamente al modding y al overclocking, liderando ventas en fabricantes tan importantes como AMD, NVIDIA, ASUS o MSI.

Nuestros COOLPC, totalmente customizables, están configurados por los mejores profesionales técnicos y permiten incluir las últimas novedades en tecnología, para obtener el mayor rendimiento según las necesidades del usuario.

Name: Aqua Farm Società Benefit Startup innovativa
Description:
AQUA FARM vuole creare una filiera alimentare sostenibile, in grado di promuovere un’alimentazione sana, naturale, a basso impatto ambientale, che faccia economia di risorse preziose, come acqua e suolo. Nei nostri impianti le deiezioni dei pesci vengono utilizzate per concimare le colture, che crescono molto velocemente. Le piante crescono direttamente sopra le vasche, affondando le radici nell’acqua concimata dai pesci. Uno dei punti di forza di questa coltivazione è che ricicla le acque e minimizza gli sprechi. Si utilizza il 90% d’acqua in meno rispetto alle coltivazioni tradizionali; inoltre, la crescita avviene in tempi dal 30% al 50% inferiori, grazie alla costante fertilizzazione delle radici, apportata dal flusso di acqua. Si fanno molti raccolti durante l’anno, grazie alla destagionalizzazione, e la produzione è varia e costante.

La nostra Mission è la creazione di una filiera agroalimentare basata sulla coltivazione in acquaponica, sistema ecologico ed ecosostenibile.
La nostra tecnologia ci permette di ottenere una produttività 5/6 volte superiore di una tradizionale coltivazione in pieno campo, con un risparmio di suolo e apporto idrico che supera il 90%.
I nostri prodotti e le aziende partners della filiera Made in Italy potranno essere certificati su rete Blockchain, al fine di documentare in modo univoco la provenienza e le modalità di produzione per garantire la massima trasparenza nei confronti dei consumatori.
Oltre ad una filiera controllata, certificata e altamente produttiva, proponiamo un modello di sviluppo economico e culturale innovativo, con il quale creare reddito, occupazione e integrazione.

CheckForce was developed as an SDK but allows for simply integration/installation into Salesforce and Accounting Seed environments. In additional to CheckForce, Check21.com has developed Docusplit, a native Salesforce PDF extraction system and Scanomation, a native Salesforce document scanning solution. Docusplit allows users to upload PDF files and extract a variety of pages to different Salesforce objects. Scanomation, the most recent solution to be added to our product offerings, allows Salesforce users to scan documents directly into Salesforce without requiring offline saving and importing.

Name: Presscart
Description:
Many people wrote off PR in the 2010s with the advent of paid media. But in 2024 and beyond, we believe PR is one of the most effective methods businesses can use to grow.

PR as in Public Relations? Really?

We get it, PR typically makes people think of archaic ideas such as journalists, publications, pitching, press releases, and expensive monthly retainers.

For us, PR simply means the act of using stories to build authentic trust with our ideal customer. In 2024, that can look like creating a post about your founder journey on LinkedIn, engaging in quirky conversations with your customers on X, delivering opinionated breakdowns on the latest industry news via your newsletter, and being featured on a trusted podcast or media site.
Increasingly, brands are recognizing this new PR opportunity and are working on pumping out brand content to build their audience. In doing so, these brands are effectively operating like media companies. Where the goal is to generate attention and convert it into demand. However, building a media company is an extremely difficult undertaking that requires a lot of time and resources. Time and resources that most brands don't have.

And that's where Presscart comes in.

Presscart aims to be the new PR agency. An agency that is product driven and utilizes the latest technology like AI to streamline our processes to deliver results efficiently for our clients. All while making work more manageable for our team members. An agency that values both traditional media and new media channels. More importantly, we recognize the importance of leveraging existing audiences to build trust. An agency that doesn't trap their clients into expensive monthly subscriptons or contracts and gives the costs upfront so that people know exactly what they're getting with their money.

To drive the point further home, Presscart is all about storytelling. With a key focus on the word "telling".

We believe everyone has a story. They just need to be told.

Name: EMC Test NRW GmbH
Description:
Impressum: https://www.emc-test.de/footer/impressum

EMC Test NRW ist ein unabhängiges Prüflabor und ein Zertifizierer für elektromagnetische Verträglichkeit in Dortmund. Wir testen alle Systeme, die durch elektromagnetische Beeinflussung in ihrer Funktion beeinträchtigt werden können oder andere Geräte stören können. Das beginnt beim kleinsten Sensor und geht über DC-Ladestation, Hochvoltkomponenten bis hin zu einem Mähdrescher. Also kurz, alles was in unsere Absorberhallen, Messkabinen und Testflächen passt.

Mit unserer technischen Ausstattung und dem Know-how aus mehr als 25 Jahren zählen wir zu den leistungsfähigsten Dienstleistern für Prüfung und Zertifizierung der elektromagnetischen Verträglichkeit in Europa. Jetzt auch mit der anspruchsvollen Zertifizierung durch die Ford Motor Company „FMC1278 Revision 3“ für Hochvolt-Komponenten im Automotive Bereich.

Wir wissen, wie wichtig es für unserer Kunden ist, Produkte in Bezug auf die elektromagnetische Verträglichkeit schnell zur Marktreife zu bringen. Deshalb bieten wir weit mehr als nur Prüfleistungen: Wir begleiten Sie und Ihre Produkte von der ersten Idee bis zur erfolgreichen Zertifizierung.
Unsere Richtlinien zum Umgang mit Ihren Bewerbungsunterlagen finden Sie unter https://www.emc-test.de/footer/datenschutz

Name: LEGACY NETWORK AG
Description:
About us

Legacy Network is an international technology
company based in Liechtenstein/Switzerland. Our
mission is to improve people's lives by developing
innovative technology and building international
communities around personal development. We
firmly believe, that personal development is the key
to success in all life areas, as well as the solution for
many global problems. For this reason, we
committed ourselves to find new ways in order to
provide something of true value to the world.
Our central product is a gamified education app,
which uses a play to earn system to reward its users
with crypto. The app is powered by the first ever
artificial intelligence, which analyzes several aspects
of a user's personality and reflects the collected
information back to him.


Our vision

Our vision is to create the world's biggest personal
development ecosystem with our technology as the
gate to a successful and fulfilling life. In our opinion,
great technology should work for the user, not
against him. We live in an era, where big tech
companies know much more about us and our
psychology, than we do. This valuable data is mainly
used to sell us more products and to make us
neurologically addicted to certain services.
We aim to create a technology, which collects the
same data but provides it to the user. A technology,
developed to give people deep insights into the
programming and functionality of their own brain
along with individual and playful step by step
guidance on how to use the new gained knowledge
in their own favor.

Amkka helps ambitious brands transform everyday shoppers into passionate brand advocates.

Our mobile-first platform empowers brands to build direct, lasting relationships with their actual buyers, even if they don’t sell D2C. Every scan, every interaction becomes an opportunity to know your consumer better and grow your business smarter.

Today’s fast-growing brands rely on Amkka to make loyalty:
~ Simple (no tech teams needed),
~ Personal (know who’s buying your product),
~ Impactful (more feedback, better decisions, repeat purchases).

And here’s the game-changer:
Even if your products are sold through retailers, marketplaces, or distributors; Amkka still lets you stay connected to your end consumers.
This unlocks a whole new world of possibilities:
~ Share product info, how-to guides, and updates instantly
~ Launch loyalty programs without changing how you sell
~ Cross-sell and upsell intelligently, based on real usage
~ Collect feedback and improve faster
~ Turn one-time buyers into long-term loyalists

If your brand sells offline or through partners, chances are…
 you don’t know who your consumers are.

Amkka fixes that.

It’s privacy-safe, plug-and-play, and built for brands who want to grow by knowing their consumers — not just chasing the next transaction.

Description:
Our mission is to enable anyone to make a creative income.

At Cent, we build tools to address the biggest challenges for creatives of all types: aggregating audience, managing distribution, retaining ownership of intellectual property, and monetization.

Cent is 100% ad-free. We first launched in 2017 as a social network and informal platform for creative experimentation. Our original blogging service lives on today as the Community section of our website.

In 2020 — as an experiment to show that creative content originally published off the blockchain can be monetized on chain — Cent created Valuables , a marketplace where iconic tweets can be auctioned as NFTs. Jack Dorsey famously sold his first tweet on Valuables for $2.9M USD.

Cent Pages, our premium NFT-publishing product, launched in 2022, providing creators with personalized, branded pages that can be customized and styled to suit individual needs. Name: TecSecurity
Description:
Our company is a leader in the cybersecurity industry, specializing in code auditing and vulnerability assessment through advanced techniques such as source code analysis and fuzzing. We have invested significant time and resources into building advanced fuzzing tools, including harnesses, mutators, and emulators, and developing automated, scalable tooling to identify security flaws. We are committed to improving public tooling and ensuring the security of widely deployed software and software with large user bases.

In addition to our core services, we have also helped deliver advanced web hacking training courses to further educate and advance the skills of professionals in the cybersecurity industry. Our team of experts is skilled in vulnerability research and zero-day exploit development, and we regularly participate in hacking competitions and bug bounty programs. We focus on discovering and addressing bug classes that could lead to pre-authenticated remote code execution, local privilege escalation, and sandbox escape/bypasses. When vulnerabilities are discovered, we work collaboratively with affected vendors to notify the public through advisories and actively participate in remediation efforts.

We also conduct innovative research and development of new exploitation techniques and mitigation bypasses. Our technical reports provide in-depth analysis and descriptions of the root cause of any identified security bugs, helping affected vendors understand the issue and take steps to address it.

Name: TG Academy
Description:
ما هي أكاديمية اللعبة TG Academy  وماذا يقصد بنظام اللعبة 
هي مؤسسة غير ربحية أنشأها الشاب الأردني (ثائر أبو غوش) في أواخر عام 2019، بعد عدة تجارب خاضها استطاع تحديد متطلبات أساسية لنجاح الفرد وقرر بناء نظام مفتوح شامل يقدمه للشباب لخلق فرصة عادلة للجميع عبر قناته على اليوتيوب بمحاور ثلاث أساسية  نظام شخصي فعال، احتراف مهني، وحرية اقتصادية.

ما هدف الأكاديمية 
أكاديمية تهدف لخلق بيئة تعليمية متاحة في أكثر المجالات ندرة في سوق العمل باعتماد نظام تعليمي مبتكر يجمع بين كفاءة الجامعات والإتاحة للجميع لنصل لمجتمع عالي الحرفية وخلق فرص عمل بدون حواجز التعليم العالي أو حتى المتوسط.
معنا الكل قادر على الاحتراف ورسم مستقبله دون أي مقابل.


ماذا تقدم الأكاديمية
تقدم الأكاديمية طريقًا واضحًا للطالب يمكنه السير فيه لتحقيق هدفه دون تشتت عبر برامج مصممة بخطط واضحة ومتابعة دورية صارمة  لضمان تحقيق نتائج فعالة في أقصر وقت ممكن، كل هذا باستخدام تطبيق متابعة تم تطويره بهدف مساعدة الطالب على المواصلة بأكثر الطرق سهولة وكفاءة. 

ما الذي يميز الأكاديمية عن غيرها 
ما يميز الأكاديمية المتابعة الحثيثة أثناء رحلة التعلم من قبل مشرفين متخصصين في مجالاتهم.
وما زادها تميزًا أنها ترتكز على ثلاث محاور لتحقيق هدفها:
_ تأهيل شخصي.
_ مسارات مهنية ( مهارة تتعلمها و تحترفها ).
_ الفهم العميق لسوق العمل .


نستطيع القول أنه بواسطة هذه المحاور الأساسية يمكننا إخراج فرد متميز في مجاله وذو عقلية قادرة على الاستمرارية والعمل تحت مختلف الظروف، وهذا هو أهم ما يميز الأكاديمية بنظامها الذي ينافس الجامعات حيث سيكون الشخص في فترة ما بين 3-6 أشهر قد أتقن مهارة يحبها و سيكون قادر على الالتحاق بسوق العمل.



نظامنا التعليمي:
بعد تجارب عديدة مع مئات الطلاب وجدنا نسب الاستمرار ضعيفة في صفوف الشباب مما دفعنا لتطوير نظام يعالج هذه السلبية ويساعدنا على رفع جودة التعلم في فترة زمنية قصيرة، وبعد عمل استمر لما يقارب العامين على أكاديمية المهارات وصلنا اليوم لمسارات فائقة الحرفية، وما يميز مساراتنا عن غيرها  بأننا نعتمد على نظام مرحلي لا يستطيع الطالب تجاوز المرحلة بدون اجتياز الامتحانات النظرية والعملية لذات المرحلة، وبمتابعة حثيثة من فريق الاكاديمية نضمن بأن الطلاب المتخرجين من أكاديميتنا أصحاب كفاءة ونجاحهم مسألة وقت.

Name: Fawa'id Al Qulub - فوائد القلوب
Description:
Fawa'id al-Qulub - When language, history and faith meet

Fawa'id al-Qulub was born of a burning love for the Arabic language, a deep passion for Islamic history, and an irresistible inner urge to write, to pass on, to do good.

This project is the faithful echo of my soul: the soul of a sensitive writer, a historian at heart, a woman attached to the light of knowledge and the noble values of Islam.

Through this project, I write fawā'id drawn from my readings, translated extracts, poems, reminders, personal meditations.
I like to bring words to life: to give them back their depth, their brilliance, their spiritual sweetness.

My pen speaks the language of souls: it heals, it touches, it calls to the essential.

I've always believed that Arabic is not just a language, but a light, a living memory, a divine breath. And that Islamic history is an inexhaustible source of inspiration, courage and dignity.

The figures of the past, the forgotten stories, the great battles, the scholars, the pious women: all this still vibrates within me, and accompanies me in what I share.

Fawa'id al-Qulub is a space where science meets poetry, where faith becomes writing, where the Arabic language rediscovers its grandeur, and where hearts find refuge.

 If you're looking for true words, deep texts, content rooted in the Qur'an, the Sunnah, a love of science and the bon mot: you've come to the right place.

 I also offer my services as an Arabic/French translator, specializing in religious, historical, literary or educational content.

Name: PyData Prague
Description:
PyData Prague aims to unite data analysts, engineers, scientists, and others involved in the usage, developments, and support of open source technologies in the area of scientific computation. These include pandas, numpy, IPython, R, matplotlib, Julia, Jupyter, and other related projects.

We ultimately aim to organise meetups as well as conferences, we want to provide a platform for spreading the ideas revolving around open technologies that help us in day to day work, be it commercial, non-profit, or educational.

---

If you have any questions, don't hesitate to contact me, Ondrej, at ondrej.kokes@gmail.com. We're open to all sorts of topics, so feel free to suggest what you want to discuss or present yourself.

There's a Czech Python Slack where we have a channel intended for PyData organisational purposes. Ping me an email if you want to be a part of this, we welcome support in all shapes and forms.

In case you want to keep track via Facebook, you can join this group - https://www.facebook.com/groups/pydataprague

---

PyData is an educational program of NumFOCUS, a 501(c)3 non-profit organization in the United States. PyData provides a forum for the international community of users and developers of data analysis tools to share ideas and learn from each other. The global PyData network promotes discussion of best practices, new approaches, and emerging technologies for data management, processing, analytics, and visualization. PyData communities approach data science using many languages, including (but not limited to) Python, Julia, and R.

The PyData Code of Conduct (http://pydata.org/code-of-conduct.html (https://meet.meetup.com/wf/click?upn=l-2FmQxaNVahlcgIEBhFi3TtAT5F0zNXwTmkuRMnL7QggFOHeFlCTbWeaUlZcHXTl8_SOZgderJvcqhQFbfO3RPxOyDce4DwxQkMvjK-2Fx-2FNUThsopwKJWBfrFLNNxWvumUQ5WxSXbhv4wRK5D5wKH9f6rKj6i8LOJD9mn-2BRD0DME9N-2FvCa2iYnuWmq44GxUL83ahnWcTy4GeYn3mpYzx5Z-2FOTI5CcsNdLUxngzi0zytTYmIAQyMvTHeXy5ZHrKy-2BEZ48fm4sQRpm2QPMYGsycrv1Q-3D-3D)) governs this meetu

Nevertheless, Norman and Ozi can communicate unspoken truths in humorous ways without being offensive in sotto voce. As Norman’s world depicts the absurdities and complexities of the corporate world, these comic series can be a good way of communicating empathy, compassion, and other human virtues in the way of humor. Norman Liker will help you solve your problems by making people laugh and not by breaking their hearts. Let’s explore the relatable absurdities in the world of Norman and Ozi.

La diversification est déterminante pour l’apprentissage du goût et de la texture des aliments. Plus un bébé fait de découvertes gustatives pendant ses 2 premières années, plus il a de chances de contracter de bonnes habitudes alimentaires à l'âge adulte. Or le manque de temps, d’inspiration et d’informations claires rend cette étape trop complexe pour beaucoup de parents. Nous faisons tout pour éviter ça ! 

A travers nos menus, recettes et conseils, nous accompagnons les parents pour une diversification sereine et simplifier la cuisine maison au quotidien, et gagner du temps grâce au Batch Cooking. Car nous sommes convaincus que le fait-maison est la meilleure option pour une alimentation saine et durable ! 

Notre idéal ? Simplifier la cuisine du quotidien pour que les plats préparés ne soient plus une solution de facilité ! 

Site : www.cuisinez-pour-bebe.fr

Name: abacane
Description:
Are you a brand / retailer looking for prospects who are receptive to your messages? 
On Abacane.com, present your offers and products in a novel way, through interactive videos to intentionist consumers and build a lasting exchange with them. 
 
How does it work? 
Brand Side 
You get in touch with your future customers through interactive videos, which need to be short form new content. Your content (produced internally or by abacane) is broadcast on our platform and is only accessible to members who match your target audience. 
During the video (broadcast live or via replay), a brand representative should be available to answer questions and thus create a complete brand experience. 
 
User side 
Registered members have access to a personalized feed made up of brand content, selected according to their preferences. It is up to the user to choose the messages they are interested in viewing. This allows the brand experience to be both consented and focused.    
 
Interaction and exchange at the heart of our offer. 
During the video broadcast, members and brands have the possibility of creating a real relationship, with: 
- A real-time chat 
- Broadcasting of surveys / questions live
- The possibility for the member to continue the exchange in 1to1 after the video is finished. 
 
What do we gain? 
At Abacane we want to restore value to users, offer brands a more effective alternative to classic advertising and change the relationship between users and brands, while offering an exclusive service. We are convinced that the value that users generate on the Internet should be theirs by right, so we pay them in return. 
 
Don't wait any longer, be part of the change! 
www.abacane.com

Description:

Zonder afhankelijk te zijn van koppelingen met andere bedrijven.

Eatcard integreert naadloos technologie in de dagelijkse operatie van restaurants, snackbars, cafés en hotels. Ons platform is ontworpen om het personeel te ontlasten, de gastbeleving te verbeteren en de omzet te verhogen. Van QR-tafelbestellingen en self-order kiosken tot een krachtig kassasysteem, reserveringsmodule en loyaltyprogramma’s. Alles werkt samen in één systeem.

We geloven dat technologie de horeca niet moet overnemen, maar juist ondersteunen. Daarom ontwikkelen we oplossingen die de werkdruk verlagen, de efficiëntie verhogen én gasten een unieke ervaring bieden, zonder ingewikkelde integraties of verborgen kosten.

Name: Cuadernos.info
Description:
Cuadernos.info es una publicación científica editada cuatrimestralmente (enero, mayo y septiembre) por la Facultad de Comunicaciones de la Pontificia Universidad Católica de Chile. Es una revista de acceso abierto (open access), cuyos artículos son sometidos a doble evaluación ciega de pares (double-blind peer review), que publica resultados de investigaciones en español, inglés y portugués sobre comunicación mediada en Iberoamérica. Abarca el periodismo, la comunicación institucional, audiovisual, multimedial y la publicidad.
Está indizada en Scopus, Web of Science, SciELO, DOAJ, REDIB, Latindex, Erihplus, REBIUN, Dialnet, CLASE y CIRC. Fundada en 1984 bajo el nombre de Cuadernos de Información, en 2013 se convirtió en Cuadernos.info (ISSN: 0719-367X) para reflejar su nueva identidad como revista íntegramente científica. Desde julio de 2020 es exclusivamente digital, disponible en https://cuadernos.info.

Name: Rheumato MDPI
Description:
Rheumato is an international, peer-reviewed, open access journal on rheumatology research published quarterly online by MDPI. 

Aims

Rheumato (ISSN 2674-0621) is a peer-reviewed, international scientific, open access journal, striving to publish high-quality articles in the field of all aspects of rheumatology research and make them freely available to researchers worldwide. It focuses on publishing original research articles, reviews, communications, and case reports, but other article types will also be accepted. There is no restriction on the maximum length of the papers. Our aim is to encourage scientists to publish their experimental and theoretical research in as much detail as possible. Full experimental and/or methodological details must be provided for research articles.

Scope

    The premises inherent to rheumatology
    The history of rheumatology and its principals
    The character of diseases affecting bones and joints
    The character of immunologic/autoimmune diseases
    The character of the rare and multisystem diseases
    Pattern recognition aspects of differential diagnosis
    Patterns of disease as population phenomena
    Technical aspects of utilizable diagnostic modalities
    Critical analysis of therapeutic interventions and their pros and cons
    Technical aspects of utilizable therapeutic modalities
    Archeological/zoological/paleontological evidence of/correlates with disease
    Pro and con opinion pieces
    Statistical methodology and its premises for rheumatologists

Rheumato is a companion journal of JCM (https://www.mdpi.com/journal/JCM).

Name: flowzz.com
Description:
flowzz.com is a price comparison platform designed for cannabis dispensaries, boasting an extraordinary success narrative. Merely two months following its debut in Germany, the platform has swiftly established itself as the favored patient destination for medical cannabis, reflecting robust growth rates in the double digits. Harnessing the significant volume of anonymous user data generated, a comprehensive market database has been curated, encompassing pricing, popularity, strains, and product efficacy. Originating from an Israeli startup with a resolute emphasis on technology, flowzz.com is poised for a promising trajectory. Additional features will soon be introduced, as well as an extension to further product categories.

The flowzz “Inside Medical Cannabis” report

Obtaining actionable data regarding the medical cannabis market in Germany, which can effectively support companies in their marketing and product planning efforts, presents a notable challenge. The major cannabis mail-order pharmacies wield substantial market share, particularly within the flower market segment. However, these shares are often excluded from the existing pharmacy panels, leading to notable bias in the available data. Additionally, there is a notable scarcity of data, especially within the context of dynamic pharmacy pricing and patient-driven purchasing decisions. This report aims to provide decision-makers with trustworthy insights to bridge these informational gaps effectively.

 

Find out more on our German Inside Medical Cannabis page at: https://flowzz.com/report

it’s about changing the way your business interacts with your customers  to provide a consistent experience whenever and wherever they need it.

5 key features of digitilisation that you need to understand:

1	The demand of digital is customer driven not industry driven

3	Digitalisation is the route to serving your customers and connecting with them on a deeper level

In this digital multi channel landscape, your customers are  browsing in-store, shop online, share feedback through mobile apps and ask questions for your support team on social media networks.

Identify Digital brings  all of these interactions together allowing you to offer a great experience from start to finish every time a customer interacts

Our 5 star rating and testimonials speak for themselves.

Name: Répertoire International de Littérature Musicale (RILM)
Description:
Founded in 1966, RILM is a global organization dedicated to documenting and making accessible the world’s musical knowledge across all traditions, languages, and disciplines. With a mission grounded in scholarly rigor and cultural inclusivity, RILM provides digital resources that support music research and performance worldwide.

RILM’s flagship publication, RILM Abstracts of Music Literature, indexes over 2,400 journals and a broad array of media—including monographs, dissertations, and conference proceedings—spanning musicology, ethnomusicology, theory, education, and interdisciplinary fields. With over 1.7 million records and sophisticated indexing, it connects users to global music scholarship from the early 19th century to the present. Since 2016, a growing number of full-text journals (currently around 300) are available through RILM Abstracts with Full Text.

RILM’s offerings are hosted on EBSCO and on its own platform, Egret. It also develops and maintains multilingual, cross-cultural music reference resources.

Accredited by UNESCO as an NGO providing advisory services, RILM plays an active role in preserving and safeguarding the world’s musical heritage as well as fostering cultural diversity.

RILM is a joint project of four major international organizations: IAML, ICTMD, IMS, and IASPM, and is guided by a Commission Internationale Mixte with representatives from each. Based at the CUNY Graduate Center in New York City, RILM’s editorial and technical teams collaborate with a global network of national committees and partners. 

To learn more, visit rilm.org

Co vám nabízíme?

Opakované zobrazení článku v různých sekcích magazínu, díky čemuž se váš obsah pravidelně objeví před novými čtenáři a nezapadne.
Profesionální SEO optimalizaci, která zlepší viditelnost a zaujme více návštěvníků.
Zpětné odkazy z našeho magazínu, které podpoří autoritu vašeho webu.
Sdílení článku na sociálních sítích – Facebook a LinkedIn.

Jak to funguje?

Jednoduše vyplňte formulář, kde uvedete nadpis, klíčová slova, tagy, meta popis, odkazy a přiložíte text s fotografiemi. Po kontrole a odeslání můžete pokračovat k objednávce a platbě.

Náš tým rychle zpracuje vaši objednávku, a váš článek se brzy objeví před širokým publikem. Nejenže zvýšíte svou online přítomnost, ale také získáte kvalitní zpětné odkazy a efektivní propagaci na sociálních sítích.

Cena za jednorázovou publikaci článku je 890,- Kč. bez DPH.

Formulář rychle zpracujeme a poté již bude váš článek na cestě k čtenářům.

S RETEL.cz získáte nejen viditelnost, ale také kvalitní zpětné odkazy a propagaci na sociálních sítích. Nečekejte a publikujte svůj článek ještě dnes!

رؤيتنا تتمثل في التفوق في صناعة الأفكار الحصرية وتقديم خدمات لا تقتصر على المنتج الإعلامي والإعلاني، بل تشمل أيضًا خدمات دعائية متكاملة تحقق أهداف الشركة وعملائها معًا.

رسالتنا تركز على تحقيق طموحات العملاء وتوجيه المسار الصحيح لتحقيق أهدافهم الإعلامية والإعلانية.

مستهدفاتنا تتمثل في تقديم خدمات احترافية ترضي طموحات العملاء، وصناعة الأفكار وتنفيذها بشكل عالي المهنية، والاعتماد على تحليل البيانات لضمان موثوقية العملاء، وتطوير العمل والأدوات بشكل يضمن الجودة، وتقديم حلول مدروسة لكل عمل، وتنفيذ حملات إعلامية وإعلانية على أسس علمية، وتحقيق النجاح لعملائنا من خلال صناعة محتوى متميز.

خدماتنا تشمل دراسات واستشارات إعلامية، صناعة المحتوى، تنظيم المؤتمرات والندوات والمعارض، إدارة حسابات التواصل الاجتماعي، تصميم الهوية البصرية والشعارات والبروشورات والكتيبات والمجلات والنشرات، إنتاج الأفلام الوثائقية والدعائية، والمطبوعات والإخراج الصحفي.

Name: Open Coconut Networks
Description:
Open Coconut Networks is a startup founded by two engineers with a strong background in the telecommunications industry. We have started this project because we believe we can remove a lot of pain points that we have experienced during the last 15 years when it comes to building a highly reliable worldwide backbone. Together we've built the largest backbone dedicated to voice-over IP. So we thought we'd be the best team to achieve this.

How?

We came out with a highly innovative way to build backbones in a few clicks through our powerful web platform. This platform is probably the best tool Network Engineers will see in the coming decade. However, the platform will be of high interest if you are a Network Architect or a NOC Technician as well. And even if you are not a technical person, the platform is meant to be a huge time saving for your entire organization.

It is a one-stop shop for your network leveraging SDN technology and NFV hardware which allow us to put all its power straights in your hands.

If you ever experienced things like:

    - Finding out the best route for your traffic between your data centers or to a business partner
    - Looking out for the best provider on the market available in your datacenter
    - The frustration to have to exchange basic information with a NOC
    - The consternation of being tied to a contract over a multi-year period
    - The hardship to have to negotiate the best pricing for your circuit

Then you must request a demo of our solution, we guarantee you won't be disappointed and if you are, beers are on us!
(we're from Belgium so we don't joke about beers!)

To request a demo, just hit the Contact Us button on the top bar menu.

Let's talk!

Unsere Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.webmasters-fernakademie.de/datenschutz und das Impressum: https://www.webmasters-fernakademie.de/impressum

Unsere Fernstudiengänge enden mit einem Diploma-Abschluss des Europäischen Webmasterverbandes Webmasters Europe e.V. (WE) sowie mehreren WE-Zertifizierungen. Sie bestehen aus mehreren Modulen, die Sie als Fernlehrgänge auch einzeln buchen können, sowie einer Abschluss-Projektarbeit, welche die Basis für den Diploma-Abschluss darstellt. Fernstudiengänge sind die umfassendste Form der Ausbildung/Weiterbildung, die wir Ihnen anbieten.

Fernlehrgänge sind einzelne Module der Fernstudiengänge und enden mit genau einer Zertifizierung (Webmasters Europe e.V.).

Online-Seminare decken nur ein Themengebiet ab und enden nicht mit einer externen Prüfung/Zertifizierung. Sie erhalten jedoch (wie bei allen anderen Fernkursen ebenfalls) ein qualifiziertes Abschlusszeugnis.

Für unsere Online-Seminare, Fernlehrgänge und Fernstudiengänge haben wir ein Konzept entwickelt, das Elemente des klassischen Fernunterrichts, die seit Jahrzehnten bewährt sind, mit modernem E-Learning und Online-Learning verbindet.

Name: Earth MDPI
Description:
Earth (ISSN 2673-4834) provides an advanced forum for multidisciplinary research on the interactions/connections among global environmental systems. It publishes reviews, regular research papers, and short communications, as well as Special Issues on particular subjects.

The aim of Earth is to encourage scientists to publish their experimental and theoretical results in as much detail as possible. Therefore, the journal has no restriction on the maximum length of the papers. Full experimental details should be provided so that the results can be reproduced.

In addition, the journal has the following features: Manuscripts regarding new and innovative research proposals and ideas are particularly welcome; electronic files or software regarding the full details of the calculation and experimental procedure as well as source codes can be submitted as supplementary material.

Fomos pioneiros na criação de um e-commerce de moda que opera 100% com estoques descentralizados, integrando mais de 70 lojas franqueadas em um único canal digital. Também nos destacamos como um dos primeiros especialistas na plataforma VTEX IO, além de liderarmos a gestão de um dos e-commerces de bebidas de maior crescimento durante a pandemia, redesenhando a forma como o conteúdo impacta o cliente.

Em 2023, os projetos gerenciados pela Pimenta Full ultrapassaram a marca de R$ 50 milhões em GMV, com mais de R$ 50 milhões em mídia digital sob gestão. Entre nossos clientes estão marcas reconhecidas como Sidewalk, Triya, Blue Bird Shoes, Martha Medeiros, Handred, Darling e Banco BTG.

Nosso time é formado por sócios com ampla experiência no mercado online e um time técnico próprio, com desenvolvedores especialistas em e-commerce, que garantem autonomia e agilidade na execução.

Se o objetivo é escalar, inovar e transformar a operação digital da sua marca, a Pimenta Full é o parceiro certo.

From a catalog of urban objects (lights, traffic lights, signs, litter garbage cans,...), categorized by family, brand and model, the user enters a geographic area of interest and obtains a georeferenced inventory of the objects of choice, through a GIS system. .shp files are obtained for interoperability with different GIS softwares and BIM systems; .csv for information processing; .dxf for CAD processes; or .pdf and .jpeg for immediate output of the data visualization.

Name: weinkenner
Description:
Weinkenner - Das Weinmagazin bietet neueste Informationen, Wissen & spannende Stories rund um das Thema Wein. Herausgeber: Jens Priewe. 

Weinkenner.de bietet Partnern aus der Weinwelt vielfältige Möglichkeiten, sich bei einer anspruchsvollen und weinaffinen Zielgruppe zu positionieren. Ob durch Advertorials, Anzeigen, Microsites (Winzerprofilen) oder gezielte Marketingmaßnahmen wie Newsletterbewerbung und Mailings – Weinkenner.de schafft optimale Voraussetzungen für eine maßgeschneiderte Markenkommunikation. Zusätzlich bietet weinkenner.de ein Matching zwischen Winzern und Händlern an, um den direkten Kontakt und Austausch in der Weinbranche zu fördern.

Dass Portal weinkenner.de wurde 2009 von einer Gruppe Weinexperten und -liebhabern ins Leben gerufen. Jens Priewe, der Weinjournalist, Weinbuchautor und heutiger Geschäftsführer des Portals, vereinte sein Wissen im Bereich Wein mit der unternehmerischen Vision von Daniel Wild, einem Serial Entrepreneur und Business Angel., der Mitgesellschafter wurde. Dazu stieß Benjamin Breuer, ein Experte für digitales Marketing und passionierter Weinliebhaber. 
Gemeinsam schufen sie eine Plattform, die sich über die letzten 15 Jahre zu einem wichtigen Online-Medium für alle Themen rund um den Wein entwickelt hat. Im Jahr 2024 hat sich das ursprüngliche Gründerteam erneut zusammengefunden, um Weinkenner.de auf ein neues Niveau zu heben. Weinkenner.de ist kein Blog, sondern eine Plattform für fundierte journalistische Artikel samt Newsticker, kulinarische Empfehlungen, Reiseberichte, Liftestyle, Sommelierempfehlungen.

Name: iMeta Science
Description:
iMeta Science is an academic association founded in Beijing, China, in July 2021. It comprises over 1,000 researchers specializing in bioinformatics, microbiome, metagenomics, biotechnology, and related disciplines. The association is dedicated to advancing bioinformatics and multiomics research globally. Its primary objectives include supporting researchers at all career stages, facilitating the exchange of scientific information, enhancing research infrastructure, and assisting scientists in disseminating their findings and methodologies.

iMeta Science publishes two flagship open-access journals, iMeta and iMetaOmics, in collaboration with Wiley. These journals are committed to publishing innovative and high-quality research in the fields of multi-omics and bioinformatics. Noteworthy features of these journals include video abstracts, bilingual publications, and dissemination through social media, catering to a broad and diverse audience.

The journal iMeta has achieved significant recognition, being indexed by ESCI/WOS/JCR, PubMed, Google Scholar, and Scopus. It received its first impact factor of 23.7 in 2024, ranking 2nd out of 165 journals in the microbiology field. iMetaOmics, launched in 2024, aspires to attain an impact factor exceeding 10 in the future.

Contact:
iMeta Science Homepage: http://www.imeta.science
iMeta Wiley homepage: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/2770596x
iMetaOmics Wiley homepage: https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/29969514

Name: Kentucky Colonelcy
Description:
Chronicling America Creative Commons history and news research group promoting the semantic ideas of the Kentucky Colonel, bring a new dimension to the legal rights, privileges and responsibilities of the Honorable Title and Office of the Kentucky Colonel. 

Kentucky Colonels: Where Sharp Wit Meets Deep Roots

We ain't your run-of-the-mill historians, son. We're Kentucky Colonels, teeth filed on frontier grit and tongues dipped in bourbon truth. Our veins thrum with the tales of Old Kaintuck, its pioneers, and their fight for freedom, back when "Colonel" meant more than a fancy suit.

This ain't no dusty archive, brother. We're pickin' apart the seams of history, unearthing the forgotten rights, privileges, and responsibilities that come with this honorable title. We're talkin' treaties forged with sweat and steel, not fancy ink, and the bloodline of diplomacy runnin' strong through every Kentucky Colonel.

Want to wear the mantle with pride? Then step into our circle, young buck. We'll school you on colonelcy, proper and sharp. You'll learn to spin a yarn tighter than a fencepost rope, barter for your rights like a frontier hustler, and stand tall even when the wind's howlin' and the whiskey's low.

This ain't a history lesson, son. It's a baptism by Bluegrass bonfire. Join us, and feel the spirit of Old Kentucky rise again, sharper than a Damascus blade and stronger than a Kentucky oak.

Name: IOTroniks
Description:
The Fourth Industrial Revolution, or Industry 4.0, brings digital and physical technologies together to create responsive, interconnected operations. From the supply chain to the smart factory, enterprises are using AI, robotics, edge computing, and the cloud to make informed, timely decisions. IOTroniks Solutions designed for the Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT) use connected sensors and edge devices to help improve product quality and factory operational efficiency in real time.

The shift to software-defined infrastructure (SDI) makes it possible to add new functionalities to industrial systems simply by adding software applications. IOTroniks is enabling this convergence of information technology (IT) and operations technology (OT) with open, standards-based computing platforms. IOTroniks provides the hardware and software building blocks and specialized technologies that let you consolidate discrete functions—including process control, visualization, and data acquisition—onto a single system at the edge. With fewer individual, proprietary systems to purchase and manage, you can reduce capital expenses and lower operational costs for downtime, waste, and management.

Industries that IOTroniks serves,
- Pharmaceutical
- Chemical
- Oil & Gas
- Textiles
- Food & Beverage
- Power Generation
- Health Care 
- Agriculture 
- Construction
- Mining
- Supply Chain & Warehousing
- Steel & other Metal Industries

Main area of expertise of IOTroniks,
- Power Management

- Smart Air-conditioning & Smart HVAC 
- Smart Surveillance, with Face / Shape / Text detection
- Moisture Sensors 
- Integration capabilities of IOTroniks Solutions with existing ERP systems

Name: METODOLÓGICA
Description:
METODOLÓGICA es una plataforma independiente que creé y desarrollo personalmente. Soy Alexis E. Rebolledo Carreño, metodólogo y editor científico, y en este espacio concentro mi trabajo de divulgación sobre investigaciones científicas de vanguardia, con un enfoque especial en la producción de Chile y América Latina.

 ¿Qué hago en METODOLÓGICA?
Busco, selecciono y analizo estudios originales que muchas veces no reciben atención mediática, especialmente aquellos con resultados incrementales o nulos, pero que son fundamentales para el avance del conocimiento científico. No me limito a replicar comunicados de prensa; exploro activamente revistas científicas, bases de datos y repositorios para identificar investigaciones que valen la pena divulgar.

¿Qué distingue a METODOLÓGICA?
Ofrezco una mirada crítica y metodológicamente informada. Presento los estudios desde sus preguntas, métodos y resultados, entregando contexto y claridad para que más personas puedan entender no solo qué se investigó, sino cómo y por qué se hizo.

Si te interesa la ciencia bien contada, con mirada latinoamericana y atención al rigor metodológico, METODOLÓGICA es mi forma de compartirla contigo.

Name: Curiosity And
Description:
Hello! We are Curiosity And, a community-driven digital magazine by the New York-based nonprofit Center for Curiosity. 

We get people to think, talk, and use Curiosity - that very human desire to know things, ask questions and wonder. 

Why?

Because that's the surest way to fulfill our purpose: help people, organizations, and societies everywhere be more curious and be more in any area of human endeavor. 

Curiosity is the key to solving humankind's biggest challenges - the ingredient that helps us discover the new, recombine the old, and uncover novel connections among disparate areas of human knowledge.

Make no mistake, this is the only way to question, verify, and apply burgeoning information in a world prone to vagaries. That's how the journey toward meaningful change begins.

Ultimately, Curiosity helps us stay relevant amid uncertainty. It makes us comfortable in acknowledging our ignorance. And, it makes us uncomfortable enough with the limitations of what we know to take action.

Join us. Take action. Be more curious, be more.

anue鉅亨網有透明化的、開放的工作環境與氛圍，我們尊重專業，鼓勵員工主動、當責一起透過團隊完成任務。 期待對財經媒體與金融科技新創有熱忱的您加入anue鉅亨網團隊。 

【anue鉅亨網核心價值】 
我們相信每一間成功企業，都有明確的核心價值。因此我們依照產業狀況與公司文化，規劃出下列三個anue鉅亨網的核心價值。 

《中立帶來信任》 
anue鉅亨網十幾年來皆持中立立場報導，堅持忠實傳達給投資人投資決策所需的資訊。我們未來仍將堅持此立場，不辜負投資人對我們的信任。 

《投資人的最佳夥伴》 
anue鉅亨網與投資人是信任、互利共生的合作夥伴。我們的產品與服務，會專注解決不同族群投資人的痛點，協助他們投資獲利。 

《大膽擁抱創新》 
身為台灣首個網路原生財經媒體，創新基因一直存在於anue鉅亨網品牌中，我們將持續敢於嘗試全新事物或工具，做出能解決投資人的產品與服務。

- Integrates seamlessly with all machine-readable sources of data in your organisation.

- Implementation is pain free and fast; benefits are delivered immediately.

От оферти за пътувания в България и чужбина до билети за най-популярните събития, първокласни СПА и уелнес почивки, както и широка гама от лайфстайл услуги, Grabo.bg свързва потребителите с висококачествени предложения, които правят ежедневието по-вълнуващо.

За своето 14-годишно съществуване Grabo.bg се е утвърдил като един от най-посещаваните и харесвани електронни магазини в България, носител на 11 награди. Екипът се състои над 80 професионалисти, разположени в 10 града.

Основана през 2010 г., платформата бързо се превръща в най-разпознаваемата в региона. От 2014 г. Grabo.bg е част от групата на Нова телевизия и Нетинфо, а от 2015 г. разработва и най-изчерпателния каталог за забележителности в България – Opoznai.bg.

През 2015 г. Grabo.bg става част от NBG (с мажоритарен дял), като допълнително затвърждава позицията си като ключов играч на пазара на преживявания и услуги.

Name: Bulletin of Computational Intelligence
Description:
The journal Bulletin of Computational Intelligence (BCI) is committed to publishing the most innovative and impactful research in Bulletin of Computational Intelligence (BCI) applied to the sciences, with a particular focus on computational mechanics in applied sciences. Its mission is to establish itself as a leading platform for advancing CI methodologies and demonstrating their transformative role in solving complex problems across all fields of applied sciences.  It is published quarterly online by Scilight Press.

Recognizing the interdisciplinary nature of applied sciences, the journal seeks to attract contributions from researchers and practitioners in diverse domains, including but not limited to engineering, physics, biology, materials science, and bioengineering. By fostering a broad research interest, BCI aims to unite scientists from various disciplines under the common goal of advancing CI applications to tackle pressing challenges in their respective fields.

The journal emphasizes the development and application of CI methods, including machine learning (ML), deep learning, and other artificial intelligence (AI) techniques, as well as fuzzy logic, evolutionary algorithms, and hybrid systems. Its scope encompasses applications in computational mechanics such as structural analysis, fluid dynamics, heat transfer, multi-physics simulations, optimization, material design, and dynamic systems. Emerging trends such as digital twins, advanced simulations, and Industry 4.0 technologies are also key areas of interest.

Building on the growing importance of CI techniques in applied sciences, BCI serves as a forum for original research, breakthrough discoveries, and state-of-the-art reviews. The journal prioritizes significant contributions that enhance decision-making, improve reliability, and foster innovation across diverse scientific and engineering disciplines.

As part of this strategy BCre8ive along with Digital Catapult organised  Creative Investment seminars in 2017 and 2018.  Following these seminars we realised the scale of the funding problem facing sole traders and micro companies in the creative industriesand as a result it progressed a with proposals for new strategies for investment and business support in this area.

Work on the online support service for Artists and Makers in northern Devon started in 2020 with research into the needs of the local artist community and with the support of Innovate UK, Artmakers was launched October 2021 as part of a national strategy to provide affordable and effective support for creatives across the UK.

Since launch, we have developed a network of 80 local artist members,  sold  a range of local artworks through the website, run 3 internationally viewable virtual exhibitions with a 4th pending in July 2022 and organised a series of masterclasses and workshops across Torridge and North Devon. Name: DJES - Danish Journal of Education Studies
Description:
DJES – Danish Journal of Education Studies – er en platform for undersøgelser og diskussioner af uddannelsesvidenskabelige problemstillinger vedrørende uddannelse og læring set i en samfundsmæssig kontekst, herunder eksempelvis organisatoriske, ledelsesmæssige, forvaltningsmæssige, styringsmæssige og videnspolitiske perspektiver på den uddannelse, pædagogik, undervisning og kompetenceudvikling, som individer indgår i, samt på spændingsfeltet mellem samfund og individ på både lokalt, nationalt og transnationalt niveau.

DJES sigter mod en styrkelse af Uddannelsesvidenskab som fagområde både indadtil og udadtil igennem publicering af peer-reviewed artikler og andre forskningsformidlende og debatterende indlæg. DJES støtter udarbejdelse og spredning af videnskabelige undersøgelser og diskussioner som et ’open access’-tidsskrift der forbinder forfattere med forskellige baggrunde men et fælles fagligt omdrejningspunkt.  DJES byder både akademiske og praktiske bidrag, danske og internationale bidrag, samt bidrag fra forfattere på forskellige karrieretrin velkommen ud fra en antagelse om, at mødet mellem forskellige perspektiver bidrager til en mere nuanceret diskussion.

Redaktionen i DJES arbejder ud fra en vision om, at redaktører, reviewere og mentorer understøtter og kvalificerer arbejdet på en engageret og konstruktiv måde. Name: Prowess
Description:
Hiring is broken and current signals for skills (pedigree, a day of interviews and references) are biased and inaccurate at best. 

At Prowess, we are building a merit based skills evaluation and progression system that empowers product professionals to 
1.	Demonstrate skills by sharing projects. 
2.	Know where you stand with anonymous expert reviews.
3.	Standout in the job market with expert vetted portfolios.

Demonstrate skills:
We enable professionals to control their career narrative by capturing their skills progression journey over the course of their career. Professionals can set career goals and receive personalized skills plan for every skill they should develop to be competitive in the job market. Professionals can then share their projects on the platform to demonstrate their ability to get things done.

Know where you stand:
Professionals can request carefully vetted product management experts to review their project and provide actionable feedback. Our merit-based and anonymous feedback system matches projects with experts in the same domain while maintaining the anonymity of the professional. This anonymity enables experts to provide an unbiased review of the project based on rigorous skill rubrics. Professional not only learn about their strengths and improvement areas but also receive actionable next steps to grow their skills. 

Standout with expert vetted portfolios:
All the hard work done by professionals to grow their skills is captured in an expert vetted skills portfolio that shows professional’s project work, current skill level and skill progression over time. This unbiased, data driven, and skill-based portfolio enables professionals to go beyond antiquated resumes to showcase what they can do and differentiate themselves in the job market. 

Anyone from any background can join us to showcase their prowess. If you are looking to grow in your career or looking for a career change, we encourage you to check us out!

such as needs analysis, concept development, evaluation and validation,
commercialization and product take back at its end of life.

This is an applied research area. Therefore, it is essential to work closely with
industry to identify and prioritise requirements, co-develop solutions
and implement and validate new models and systems. A systems ethos which
includes people, process and technology related issues are employed
in the research.

The center of focus maybe on a specific process, business unit, enterprise or value
network which would typically include an enterprise and its relationship with its
customers, suppliers, regulatory bodies, and other key stakeholders.
The research area is multidisciplinary in nature and spans functions such as
engineering, technology and business.

frameworks to gain a deep insight into how organisations effectively manage their

Name: The Turkish Journal of Gastroenterology
Description:
The Turkish Journal of Gastroenterology (Turk J Gastroenterol) is the double-blind peer-reviewed, open access, international publication organ of the Turkish Society of Gastroenterology. Journal publishes original papers, review articles, and letters to the editor on clinical and experimental gastroenterology and hepatology. 
The Turkish Journal of Gastroenterology is indexed in Science Citation Index Expanded, PubMed/MEDLINE, Scopus and TUBITAK ULAKBIM TR Index.

Processing and publication are free of charge with the journal. No fees are requested from the authors at any point throughout the evaluation and publication process. All manuscripts must be submitted via the online submission system, which is available at www.turkjgastroenterol.org. The journal guidelines, technical information, and the required forms are available on the journal’s web page.

Name: Attini
Description: Attini is designed by DevOps engineers that want to automate their own work. We see a troublesome consequence of constantly evolving cloud environments that organizations use for their applications. The fast evolution of cloud services solves many problems. However, it also increases complexity. The industry's response to this complexity is new CI/CD tools like "Infrastructure as Code (IaC)" and their abstractions "Cloud Development Kits (CDK)". So now, organizations use increasingly complex technologies to manage increasingly complex IT environments. To make matters worse, IaC is often combined with other management tools like configuration software (Ansible, Chef, etc.), serverless functions, build servers, and more. Together these factors make the DevOps engineer's work increasingly difficult. This trend often results in complex manual maintenance, tightly coupled deployment processes, and complicated documentation. Attini wants to build a hands-off deployment framework that structures your whole workflow. The framework will make it easy to reproduce any deployment, find drifts, compare IT environments and automate any operational task. We at Attini want cloud environments to be easy to work with and quickly understood! We want to eliminate complex and repetitive manual work and make project handovers smooth and predictable.

The online platform nevronas.gr had and has as its main objective the collection of all the data and information that could be useful to people with and without disabilities or neurodiversity around Health, Education, Technology, Legal Rights, Culture, Sports, Accessibility and Inclusion.

The dominant and driving idea of our group remains that disability is not a barrier but a challenge!

With our presence and our Inclusive themes, we aim at the interaction and the meeting of People with Disabilities, Vulnerable Groups, Associations, Institutions, Health - Education - Sports and Arts Professionals, Companies with health products and services, contributing to the creation of the space that is necessary for the implementation and the idea of Inclusion and respect for human diversity

The Research and Action field of nevronas.gr.
We move in a wide range of areas, covering Articles, Interviews, NevronasTV, News, Legal and rights issues of people with disabilities in health-education, medical and technological developments, coverage and support of Inclusive sports activities and artistic performances and events and of course Accessibility.

We believe that Accessibility is the dominant tool for achieving the above-mentioned objectives and the answer to the challenges of disability.

That is why, in collaboration with other groups in the fields of Education - Technology - Art - Architecture and Sport, we identify, create and develop the "tools" that make people with disabilities functional and life accessible to them. In our team that consists of both health professionals and
education, we know empirically that there is no perspective for people with disabilities unless Accessibility is established... the, in essence, the engine of functionality.

Accessibility=Functionality=Perspective

Speciale Libia, Research Center on Libyan Issues, aims to become a point of reference as a study club for Peace and Sustainable Development in Libya.

Our Message

Finding accurate information from its source with high credibility and analyzing it and finding sustainable solutions to any issue.

Finding solutions to Libyan issues requires a deep understanding of all stakeholders, impartially and objectively. That requires the participation of local sources who may not be known to political and international organizations and entities interested or involved in the Libyan dossier.

As a research center interested in Libyan issues, we have worked to establish local partnerships of individuals, civil, social and political institutions, and we are working with local experts and consultants to understand the main challenges. To increase the quality of our work, we have committed ourselves to impartiality, credibility and accuracy in reporting the news or publishing our studies.

Our Mission

Speciale Libya, Research Center on Libyan Issues, is an independent organization that works to understand Libyan issues and give a voice to anyone able to express himself. We offer support to local and international institutions to enable societies to thrive. We are directly committed to seeking and sharing information and to encouraging intelligent action for peace in the North African country and, consequently, in the entire region.

Washing a car in car washes uses over 200 liters per car on average, and if you do it by yourself, more than 400 liters! And it has been forbidden to wash the car on the street. Polluted water is flushed out directly into nature and destroys the environment we live in.

Name: Quantum Ethics Project
Description:
Quantum computing and quantum technology are positioned to transform society in unimaginable ways. Current research and development in quantum computing is focused on building the devices, and writing the algorithms to deliver on this vision - yet the benefits of such a post-quantum world are not likely to be felt by all.

The Quantum Ethics Project is here to do something about this. Founded by a transgender Ph.D. student at the Institute for Quantum Computing, supported by the Union of Concerned Scientists (an NGO based in the US), and with support from a growing network of international partners - we are in the early stages of growth and we are looking for collaborators.

The QEP is looking to make an impact in three key ways:

1. Develop the first course on Ethics of Quantum Computing for the Institute for 
    Quantum Computing

2. Connect new graduate and undergraduate students to research mentors 
    working on projects related to quantum ethics, education, and policy

3. Expand opportunities for students with marginalized backgrounds to get 
    involved in meaningful research in quantum technology

RoleSpot was started because we saw first-hand the transformation of the workplace as we know it. COVID has now accelerated this transformation beyond what we could have ever imagined.

Companies want to easily scale up and down their teams to work around workload peaks and troughs without just using an “approved supplier” that provides a subpar service whilst charging an arm and a leg.

On the flip side, we as humans are wanting more interesting work that fits around our life - Whether that means working a few days a week, few months a year, at the office, at home, a mix, or even completely remotely on an island in Fiji (with good internet of course)! We stand for leading this movement.

Our why is not that we create technology to replace human beings, but for it to be an enabler to bring the best people together to do amazing things.

Name: Luni
Description:
We are encouraging little girls’ interest in technology through playing and engaging with what they already like.
By creating content and tech kits that appeal to girls’ interests, we aim to raise generations of women empowered to learn about technology from an early age.
It’s not true that girls don’t like tech. They just often don’t like how we present it to them.

𝐖𝐡𝐲
World Economic Forum predicts that in 10 years from now 90% of all careers will be related to tech.
We want to show girls tech in its full colors and shapes. Not just through blue cars, male role models, and video games.
Numerous research shows that girls often shy away from tech because of stereotypes and resources used in way we teach them about technology.
We offer you fun alternatives.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐜𝐞𝐬:
We provide you with:
- eBooks,
- Robotic Kits,
- Tutorials,
- Recommendations
- And much more!
All with the same purpose: to enable girls to have fun with technology.
Additionally, we’ll share valuable research data, guidelines, and inspiring stories about why it’s important to be proactive when it comes to engaging girls’ interest in technology and science.

𝐎𝐮𝐫 𝐠𝐨𝐚𝐥:
It is not to make every little girl a programmer.
We want girls to:
- recognize the possibilities of technology,
- feel free to explore it,
- realize tech comes in many different shapes and flavors, some of which may become their favorite.
We are helping girls connect technology with what they already like and love. Because technology can be anything girls want it to be.

𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐜𝐚𝐧 𝐈 𝐝𝐨 𝐫𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭 𝐚𝐰𝐚𝐲
The first thing you can do is to subscribe to our free newsletter.
You get one email every two weeks with tips and important research takeaways to help you engage girls’ interest in tech.
Even if you are not convinced this makes sense, read some of the research we highlight before you decide.
It’s not too late to change your mind.

Name: Wydawnictwo Marginesy
Description:
Wydawnictwo Marginesy rozpoczęło działalność w 2008 roku, od 2013 roku jesteśmy częścią szwedzkiego konsorcjum Bonnier, zachowując jednocześnie nazwę, formę działalności i całkowitą niezależność w kształtowaniu oferty. 
Dzięki ciekawym tytułom polskim i zagranicznym, świetnie dopracowanej stronie edytorskiej oraz bardzo dobrze prowadzanej promocji zaznaczyło swoją obecność na polskim rynku wydawniczym.
Wśród naszych książek znajdują się bogato ilustrowane autobiografie i biografie, powieści polskie i zagraniczne, literatura faktu, kryminały i książki dla dzieci. 
Jakość książki jest dla nas najważniejsza. Pracując nad końcowym efektem, poświęcamy wiele czasu i energii na to, by były one pięknymi, przyjemnymi dla oka przedmiotami, a jednocześnie dbając o ich treść i starając się, by lektura dawała czytelnikom prawdziwą satysfakcję. Dlatego pracujemy z najlepszymi tłumaczami i redaktorami, a nad stroną graficzną książek oraz koncepcją graficzną wydawnictwa czuwa jedna z najwybitniejszych artystek w tej branży Anna Pol.

Wydawnictwo Marginesy is a company based out of Ludwika Mierosławskiego 11A, Warszawa, Mazowieckie, Poland.

Name: Prospecta con Éxito
Description:
Bienvenido a Prospecta con Éxito

Si trabajas en desarrollo de negocio, estás dando tus primeros pasos en la prospección comercial o ya llevas tiempo vendiendo… seguramente te habrás cruzado con decenas de consejos, métodos o plantillas creados en Estados Unidos o Reino Unido.

Algunos son excelentes. Otros, muy inspiradores.
Pero quizás ya te hayas dado cuenta de algo: no siempre funcionan igual en España o en América Latina.

¿Por qué sucede esto?
No es por falta de esfuerzo. Es por algo más profundo y sencillo: las diferencias culturales.

En España, en el sur de Europa en general, y también en muchos países de Latinoamérica, la forma de iniciar una relación comercial tiene matices distintos.
Valoramos más la cercanía, la confianza genuina y el contexto de cada interacción.
Y eso cambia radicalmente cómo debemos prospectar.

 Algunos ejemplos concretos:

En mercados anglosajones, dejar un mensaje de voz es habitual y recomendado.
En España y muchos países latinos… la mayoría ni siquiera tiene activado el buzón, y si lo tiene, rara vez lo escucha.

Las secuencias automatizadas de emails funcionan en EE.UU. por su cultura directa y pragmática.
Aquí, si no hay un mínimo de personalización real, es difícil obtener respuesta.

Un mensaje directo en LinkedIn pidiendo una reunión inmediata es normal en Londres.
Pero en Madrid, Buenos Aires o Ciudad de México, puede percibirse como demasiado agresivo si no se ha creado antes un contexto.

Por eso nace esta página.
Para compartir técnicas, ideas y experiencias que realmente funcionan en nuestro contexto hispanohablante.
Adaptamos lo mejor de las metodologías internacionales… a nuestra forma de vender, de hablar y de relacionarnos.

Gracias por estar aquí.
Y si en algún momento encuentras algo útil que te ayude a abrir una puerta, cerrar una cita o avanzar con un prospect…no dudes en compartirlo! :)

That is why we made the process of joining the community and listing any products and services for sale as simple as possible. It takes only a few minutes to get started, plus you receive all the major benefits that normally come along with globalized platforms including built-in payments, feedback/reviews, and verified profiles. Ses valeurs sont : 

- LE PARTAGE & LA COMMUNICATION 
Le partage et la communication en tant que facilitateur.
Transmettre, diffuser, partager, informer … 

- L'INCLUSION,  LA SOLIDARITE & L'HUMANITE
L'inclusion, c'est se faire accepter dans la société, avoir des échanges positifs avec ses pairs et être valorisé pour qui on est.
L’inclusion valorise la diversité et permet aux personnes (avec et sans handicap) d’avoir réellement la possibilité de nouer des relations significatives. 
Rompre la solitude, soutenir les plus fragiles, accompagner les situations douloureuses dans le respect du désir des personnes ou du groupe familial. 
Proposer une écoute bienveillante, dans la confidentialité et la discrétion.

- LE NON JUGEMENT &  LE RESPECT
Le non-jugement et le respect de chacun là où il en est dans ses pratiques éducatives
Nous avons tous un certain socle de connaissances et notre expérience nous a fait acquérir notre socle de compétences.
Chacun avance à son rythme et est plus ou moins confortable avec certaines notions.

- L'HUMILITE & L'EMPATHIE
L’empathie et l'humilité dans les échanges.  
Écouter plus que parler, aider les autres, se fier au jugement des autres, apprécier les talents des autres, ne pas avoir peur de faire des erreurs et les admettre.
Les professionnels doivent veiller à cultiver ce savoir-être et à se rendre disponible à l’autre .

Description:
The Soulhaus, a 27th Annual Webby Award Honoree, is the first digital media outlet dedicated to documenting the modern-day Black creative renaissance around the globe. The mission of our culture-shifting platform is to navigate the gap left by the historically non-inclusive design world by fostering a diverse design community and amplifying Black creative voices excelling in the fields of architecture, interior design, real estate, and other creative disciplines. 

As a destination inspiring re-imagined possibilities through an all-digital publication that features content written and art directed by a BIPOC global collective of resident writers and design creatives. Power in possibilities, inspiration and creative resilience are through-lines for the immersive editorials consisting of thought-provoking personal essays, poetic digital photography exhibits and creator features – curated by Jocelyn McCall, its Editor-in-Chief. 

The name and editorial categories are a nod to the multidisciplinary nature of Germany’s iconic Bauhaus School of Design. Today Bauhaus is an expression that is synonymous with design all over the world. The influence of Bauhaus has been enormous and aided in an unstoppable cultural movement, despite the school’s short lifespan. The Soulhaus aspires to be a similar guiding light.

Most recently, The Soulhaus was on boarded as a small publishing partner of Ebony Magazine, through the Ebony Alliance, the legacy media outlet’s ad network.

Just minutes from WorcLab you can access Worcester’s premier restaurants on Shrewsbury Street, see a show at the famous Hanover Theatre or DCU Center, grab a drink at local Wormtown Brewery, and explore Worcester’s social scene in the Canal District. Our mission is to provide women with the resources, support, and inspiration they need to thrive personally and professionally. Through mentorship, collaboration, and advocacy, we foster a network where women can share their stories, build meaningful connections, and unlock opportunities for success. What We Do:

 Empowerment Programs: We offer workshops, mentorship initiatives, and resources designed to help women develop confidence, leadership skills, and personal growth.

 Community Building: By creating a network of like-minded individuals, we provide a safe and supportive space for women to connect, collaborate, and inspire one another.

 Advocacy and Awareness: We champion women’s rights and raise awareness about the barriers they face, encouraging meaningful action to break down those obstacles.

 Celebrating Strength: We highlight the resilience and achievements of women, showcasing their stories as inspiration for others to rise above their circumstances.

At LinkedIn Women’s Network, we are more than just an organization, we are a movement. A movement to uplift women, foster courage, and build a future where every woman has the opportunity to thrive. Together, we are rewriting the narrative and proving that strength and growth come from supporting one another.

Name: Revue GéoProximitéS
Description:
La revue GéoProximitéS (GPS) est une revue scientifique à comité de lecture de géographie et de sciences sociales. Son champ thématique est celui des proximités entendues dans toute leur diversité. 
C’est une revue de géographie ouverte sur les disciplines connexes avec tout ce que cela implique. Les numéros doivent comporter des approches de géographes et de non-géographes autour d’un même thème. Les articles de géographie doivent demeurer majoritaires. L’inscription principale dans le champ de la géographie signifie une nécessaire dimension spatiale des approches qu’elles soient géographiques ou non.

Elle a été fondée par 4 géographes : Sylvie Coupleux (U. Artois), Sylvie Delmer (U. Lille), Corinne Luxembourg (U. Sorbonne Paris Nord) et Nicolas Lebrun (U. Artois).

Membres du Comité éditorial

1.	Coupleux Sylvie, PhD, Géographie, maîtresse de conférences, Université d’Artois
2.	Delmer Sylvie, PhD, Géographie, maîtresse de conférences, Université de Lille
3.	Lebrun Nicolas, PhD, Géographie, maître de conférences, Université d’Artois
4.	Luxembourg Corinne, PhD, Géographie, Professeure, Université Sorbonne Paris Nord

Directeur de la revue

Lebrun Nicolas, PhD, Géographe, maître de conférences, Université d’Artois

Description:

Palm Robotics’ advanced remote sensing technology has been developed and is field-proven, with pilot projects taking place at several locations across the Middle East.

Palm Robotics is currently focused on meeting the specific challenges related to palm trees in general, and the red palm weevil in particular. In addition, advanced stages have been reached in the development of unique solutions regarding various other fruit trees. The company’s vision is to become the recognized source of cutting-edge solutions that protect the health and increase the survivability of a wide range of fruit trees and field crops – providing early stress detection through the use of precision agriculture, remote sensing, and drone technology for agriculture, including drones for crop monitoring.

Name: National Authority for Remote Sensing &Space Sciences
Description:
NARSS has been established in 1991 as a National Authority for Remote Sensing belongs to Ministry for Scientific Research. NARSS was then organizationally restructured in 1994; following the Presidential Decree No. 261 for 1992, as a National Authority for Remote Sensing and Space Sciences belongs to the Ministry of Scientific Research. NARSS is mainly aiming at promoting the use of the state of the art of space technology and earth observations for the sustainable development of Egypt.

NARSS is the pioneering Egyptian institute in the field of space technology and earth observation. NARSS is research institute with two large sectors for remote sensing applications and space science and technology. The sector of remote sensing applications works on the use of data provided by earth observation satellites and various airborne sensors to produce maps and spatial data for various applications such as the evaluation and monitoring of natural resources, natural hazards and environmental management. The sector of space science and technology is concerned with the research and development of sensors and satellite subsystems etc.

 

NARSS Vision

The main aim for NARSS program is to promote sustainable development agenda nationwide based on partnerships with national institutions, provincial partners, and key GIS partners. The partnership initiative designed to extend the functional capabilities of national institutions by developing mutually supportive relationships. At the initial stage, these relationships focused on training and dissemination of GIS. Ultimately, NARSS program seeks to develop a robust, productive GIS environment to attain the common goals of an accurate information base that can be used for sustainable country development through

 Human capacity building and development of infrastructure to raise and strength scientific research.
 Supporting investment in scientific research and linking it with industry, development plans and society needs.

Name: zkDAO @ Harmony
Description:
WHAT IS ZKU.ONE?
ZKU is an online course and informal study group, for software developers to learn how to build market-ready products in web3 using zero-knowledge proof technology. The goal is to launch a zk-product on mainnet with in a couple of months. This is no doubt challenging; we’re here to help.

WHY ZK?
ZK has the potential for revolutionizing how crypto ecosystems are engineered and engaged with. By verifying the correctness of computations without knowledge transfer, ZK enables development of a new class of faster and more scalable protocols (such as in the case of ZK-rollups). Applications utilizing ZK can keep user information 100% private, and can make sure that randomization processes are fair and resistant to collusion. The largest barrier preventing ZK dApps from being developed is a current lack of developer knowledge in ZK. Therefore, accessible and project-based education is the impetus for launching the next generation of industry-changing products.

WHY TAKE THIS COURSE?
In this 7-week intensive course, students will learn to build on top of existing tools, so as to be able to deploy an actual ZK-product on mainnet (ONE/ETH/xDAI/etc) in order to showcase their own ideas and learning. In other words, this is a practical hands-on course, with input and mentorship from industry experts. ZK is math-heavy, but we’ll try our best to make it intuitive, and allow students to learn by building things rather than solving equations by hand. So if you are someone eager to learn about ZK, not just for your intellectual curiosity, but also with the view of potentially launching your career as a developer in this exciting area, this course is ideal for you.

Name: Obscura Zine
Description:
Obscura is not your regular fashion publication. 

It is your one-stop watering hole for both objective news reporting and oddball features and editorials with a humanistic approach. Through our reporting, we are sparking conversations in our open forums that are unswayed by the industry. Informing, observing, creating and investigating are what we do by centering content on market needs rather than individual brands. 

The camera obscura phenomenon was a revolutionary stepping stone in creating the first photographic camera by having light pass through a small hole into a dark room, projecting the view from outside onto the walls. The original camera obscura projections, or pinhole images, projected these scenes upside down and reversed.  

The word obscure can be defined as uncertainty and ambiguity, while the word obscura, an inflected form of obscurus in latin, can be defined as shadowy and indistinct. 

It is no coincidence that both ties to the word curated the perfect juxtaposition to what we wanted to do with our publication – shed light on issues the future generation looks to change through engaging, transparent storytelling. We want to flip the fashion industry on its head, much like the images created by the camera obscura. 

Reporting on the good and bad while staying true and unswayed by the big names, we are building a hub for true fashion news and aberrant views.
