Name: Cardabel
Description:
Cardabel develops a financial data analysis product from reconciliation to fraud detection.

Cardabel innovates in the research and development of supervised and unsupervised machine learning algorithms dedicated to the detection of typical and atypical behavior in financial transactions.

Cardabel is a SaaS or on-premise solution for
banks, asset managers and trading firms.

● Inappropriate Trading Detection :
A new system that detects all anomalies without rules : Cardabel's set of unsupervised machine learning algorithms specifically tuned to financial data analysis.

● Reconciliation of financial transactions :
At the forefront of machine learning innovation, Cardabel makes it possible to replicate reconciliation tasks that until now could only be performed by experts.

Visit our website : www.cardabel.com
or contact us : request@cardabel.com
for more details.

Name: wattacar
Description:
Elektrikli Otomobillerin Dünyasına Açılan Kapınız!

Elektrikli otomobiller hakkında merak ettiğiniz her şeyi bulabileceğiniz, Türkiye'nin yeni sosyal kanalı Wattacar'a hoş geldiniz!

En yeni elektrikli otomobil modellerinin kapsamlı test sürüşlerini ve derinlemesine incelemelerini burada bulacaksınız. Teknik özelliklerden sürüş deneyimine, şarj sürelerinden menzile kadar her detayı sizin için ele alıyoruz.

Wattacar olarak amacımız, elektrikli otomobillerin çevre dostu, ekonomik ve eğlenceli dünyasını geniş kitlelere ulaştırmak. Deneyimli ekibimizle birlikte, anlaşılır ve bilgilendirici içerikler sunarak elektrikli mobiliteye geçiş sürecinizi kolaylaştırmak için çalışıyoruz.

Name: TotallyEV
Description:
TotallyEV provides expertly written articles and reviews that span across a broad range of topics; the key focus is to provide unique, interesting and engaging content that surrounds all-electric and hybrid vehicles. 

EVs are growing in popularity: from all-electric cars to hybrid planes. With ever-increasing pressure on local governments, councils and manufacturers to act on climate change, the world is rightfully moving toward a greener, more sustainable future. As such, the editorial team at TotallyEV aims to report on actualities that surround the topic of electrification – from government infrastructure to new vehicles that have embraced positive change. 

Unless otherwise stated, content on TotallyEV is independently written and vetted by the editorial team. TotallyEV has no affiliation with any manufacturer. If a company, manufacturer or representative has made any payments towards the company, it will be signposted within any relevant content on the website or across TotallyEV’s social media channels.

Name: CYAN
Description:
Hello and welcome to the world of CYAN Digital Ecogency , where each digital strategy is steeped in innovation and ecological awareness. Imagine a digital partner that grasps the essence of your brand and propels it with responsible, tailor-made digital solutions. That's the mission we live by every day: turning your ideas into impactful digital realities, while preserving our planet.

Beyond buzzwords and trends, at CYAN Digital Ecogency, we strive for a simpler reality: streamlining your business management, freeing up time for what drives you, and aligning with new economic realities. We're your eco-friendly partner in the digital realm, helping to redefine and enhance your online presence with a splash of green innovation.

Our expertise lies in the creation of state-of-the-art websites at the forefront of ecology and innovation, where beauty and environmental responsibility go hand in hand. We offer custom automation solutions that transform your routine tasks into pure efficiency and collaborative applications that reinvent collective success.

We also raise awareness among businesses about digital overconsumption, especially regarding the carbon footprint of websites. With telling figures – 72% of sites analyzed in Luxembourg exceed the international CO2 average – we're driven to make a significant change. We invite you to test your site at https://www.websitecarbon.com/, and if needed, we offer suitable solutions to reduce your ecological impact .

Whether you're looking to establish or reinvent your website/eshop, develop mobile applications, or create a customized marketing strategy, our goal is to enhance your visibility and elevate your brand identity.

Name: Lea.fr
Description:
Lea.fr est le premier réseau pédagogique et collaboratif des enseignants débutants ou experts du primaire et du collège, et des professionnels de la communauté éducative. 
L’ADN de ce service en ligne est d’accompagner les professionnels de l’éducation au quotidien dans leur métier en leur permettant d’échanger, questionner mais aussi de tester en direct des propositions pédagogiques innovantes. 
Cette communauté d’enseignants réunit aujourd’hui plus de 190 000 membres. Son objectif est de partager et de diffuser les bonnes pratiques, les idées stimulantes, les innovations pédagogiques qui naissent tous les jours dans les classes. 
En bref, elle permet de mutualiser les connaissances des enseignants, de consulter des ressources, de rechercher des idées d’animation de classe, de s’informer, de se former à l’aide de modules vidéos, de consulter des documents pédagogiques, d’échanger avec les membres de la communauté, ou encore de participer à des projets de travail collaboratif.

Name: Fourth Floor
Description:
Established in 2020, Fourth Floor publishes essays and profiles creatives from around the world. Focusing on themes such as art, music, film, sport, politics and literature. Our platform serves as a safe space for conversation and debate. The diverse beliefs and cultures are a key part of our story and we wouldn't have it any other way.

We take enormous care in challenging and confronting issues surrounding representation. Our aim is to create a space and provide agency for creatives of all forms. The voices of our world-wide community are amplified through their creative work and progressive journalism. 

Updated regularly, the site is a hub for contemporary culture, we host exclusive interviews, essays, discussions and photo essays for an international and social audience.

Name: Travel Off Path
Description:
Travel Off Path is an independent digital media company and travel news publication established in 2017. Headquartered in the United States, the company specializes in daily reporting on international tourism developments, aviation industry news, and digital nomad visa policies.
The publication operates with a remote editorial team of international journalists and is a verified source within Google News. Travel Off Path focuses on human-generated journalism and serves a global readership of approximately 6 million monthly visitors.
